| | _**The Trump I Know**_ tells the story of a Hollywood filmmaker who strikes up an unexpected friendship with Lara Trump. Lara introduces him to the women in the Trump family, administration, campaign, and business. Some are the children of immigrants, some from very humble beginnings, but all are strong, intelligent, talented patriots. They were chosen by the President because he saw something in them that many didn’t even see in themselves.

_You’ll have to hurry._ Once all these copies are claimed, we won’t be restocking. **I’m giving you an EXCLUSIVE opportunity to get your hands on one before ANYONE else.**

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: This race is about the future of Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

This race is about the future of Texas. A future where we look out for one
another instead of a Texas where the government protects corporate profits
at the expense of everyday folks.

You don't have to look much further than last year's deadly power grid
failure to see the difference between Beto’s vision and Greg Abbott's.

When Abbott's incompetence and carelessness left millions of Texans
without power, Beto got in his truck to drive to the areas most affected
and deliver water while helping folks however he could.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53146?refcode=ema20220215-176400&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=176400%2E444211%2E_gwWuN ]Beto O'Rourke raises $1.4 million for Texans recovering from storm,
spotted buying pallets of water in Robstown.

Abbott's response was vastly different. Instead of accepting
responsibility or helping people, Greg Abbott went on Fox News.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53146?refcode=ema20220215-176400&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=176400%2E444211%2E_gwWuN ]Gov. Greg Abbott and other Republicans blamed green energy for Texas’
power woes. But the state runs on fossil fuels.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53146?refcode=ema20220215-176400&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=176400%2E444211%2E_gwWuN ]While Greg Abbott puts profits over
people, Beto is running for Governor to serve ALL Texans. Our next
mandatory deadline is already coming up on Saturday, and we need this
grassroots team to step up to help us take on Greg Abbott. Pitch in
$3 or more today.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53146?refcode=ema20220215-176400&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=176400%2E444211%2E_gwWuN ]Contribute $3

It's simple: Greg Abbott has hurt the people of Texas. Instead of
listening to the people he is supposed to serve, Abbott has focused on
advancing the agendas of his donors and keeping himself in power —
regardless of the cost to the people he swore to protect.

Time
and time again Abbott has turned his back on Texans. Beto has what it
takes to defeat him, but we'll need your help to turn out a historic
number of voters this year.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53146?refcode=ema20220215-176400&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=176400%2E444211%2E_gwWuN ]Please, will you donate $3 or more right now to elect
new leadership in Texas?

Let's do this,

Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53146?refcode=ema20220215-176400&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=176400%2E444211%2E_gwWuN ]Donate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=176400%2E444211%2E_gwWuN

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

Hi Peter,

I’ve got someone I want you to meet. You may have heard his name before...

**JOHN JAMES!**
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=288bb26cc6264b04a53993b3dabeb63a&_e=mRFN17h9l-kgO8ilv0q0Hpc7RljwOMbAiJkMvLL6gnePUKmghK5oCGycfjz3mNtajMYMTRea31MFZRdZBS2pp2xD8IPzq5VfLUfPcYbZMeLjm7khJjmiET-YUcfU3JLSiLP13Opq6C6DNsrRQsss3uW78JZKCEonm0pRENBpnoL8afmYr3YOYVbOgxEImIfceZ9LaZ52xXfUAHjy83rnaDC64Ruj9kgza8ZrLRT8XzHP6EBTrvVuujVxs1HIry8VrnY0iT0lKxhbhX9kNa_iZJZnNqSoi6yAptFtHgZvQz_xtKWnQcEqQQ4Ozy2E5fCi9Z_icTAR9XPluyMt4WEdxDidKSRPc1u6MDQMWRVpwCdaIPUCP63s5YtyoR2Y36V0nQys34Ppmw-BaaCizGiHbfm1CeNTy7_-0_6vT4FJzoXpoQvQM2nYMIBJIA97GY3lS9GFBgVrwFi0Q7G5DNYqgRoXMQDcT22y6gQDJmqzkwQWRMQrf2qLcWvBIhPexGA1)
If you’re not familiar with John’s story, he's an Army Veteran and Apache pilot who served during O _peration Iraqi Freedom. _

John's drive to serve his country and community didn’t end when he got home**ー** _he grew his family’s small business, an automotive supply chain company_ , and _now is raising his three sons in Michigan_.

If you would like to unsubscribe visit this %7b%7bunsubscribeUrl%7d%7d | | Hi Peter, I’ve got someone I want you to meet. You may have heard his name before... JOHN JAMES! If you’re not familiar with John’s story, he's an Army Veteran and Apache pilot who served during O peration Iraqi Freedom. John's drive to serve his country and community didn’t end when he got homeー he grew his family’s small business, an automotive supply chain company , and now is raising his three sons in Michigan. Peter, I'm asking you to send me the best. To get America back on track, we need proven leaders who are ready to serve and get the job done for the American people. John has already served our country honorably, and as a businessman, he’ll ensure the work gets done. Peter,

It’s all hands on deck at the Alek for Oregon campaign headquarters. **Not only is our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight at midnight, but we are meeting with the NRCC in just TWO days.**

I don’t want to head into that meeting with bad news, Peter- **but if we don’t raise $8,532 in the next 48 hours, I’ll have to tell them we fell short of our critical mid-month fundraising goal.**

[**If we want to remain on track to flip the House in November, we cannot fall short of a SINGLE goal.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=cd1d6a05b4834a26b3305c83240b1e0b&_e=aZGdUfx9iy_AWYiZuGzqpquumhw6bENUXB7u2SMJUVSStuiVhpeTcT39prNLbGgrsxGHHhKsiHctpQ2oWtT7nTwry3HHfVXEYxUPFOh8Gg4PufBSkgjkfXi55xeFhlaa_Ixqrmvm7H9W_PqQmnDXziNZSXz6b9dIS3wBYyr30r8vE2or2inHb3yT-JtAllsEm2DcCAF4uo51TnGvCxSE8zH81ehIpAKRAlACtQHnMybc1QbzbW_Luq7Sy99QPNGlEOgbUQnLWAbUV-ffCneIvCXxkv82OaqH705-CnqBfilt91KVenvWVwfqcnP9WyVg7FNifVWyY8rEQ-Lve-KYxPEgkg7GPoHbjyLXlhUTsmsYQ-7rZoWZUEAwy1o0LQRHktniUVLGHGqFjngUQH0Z3Ch6RPFJRoSyJKnHiEc7a6_1AazUUfBNtAAB1a5TyP2L)

clean_body: We've come too far to turn back now I need your immediate help to reach this $20,000 goal before the meeting! | Peter, It’s all hands on deck at the Alek for Oregon campaign headquarters. Not only is our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight at midnight, but we are meeting with the NRCC in just TWO days. I don’t want to head into that meeting with bad news, Peter- but if we don’t raise $8,532 in the next 48 hours, I’ll have to tell them we fell short of our critical mid-month fundraising goal. Peter, you have been a part of my team for two cycles now. We came within 5 points of flipping this seat in 2020. I don’t want to come that close and lose again,and I know you don’t either. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

Have you ever believed in something so strongly, that you’re willing to give up everything? | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=6962731f6a3b47149841e4ab02a395e3&_t=09zSE4bAYwpxpG-eGKw5MOplI0PlZYmTwfDh4jcXzc6Wh5d0byJ5IMlCFvk3CPmlDWmnsB6sHHOhTRCoLAYOPMsyQNtsBKTuptKi332a0gAl8GcsDjDbwaQpHJHmVKitUwgIkw7ukjVVoFdEorbz_EsH6weekAcoN0OJ8UBz5MY%3D).

[
](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6962731f6a3b47149841e4ab02a395e3&_e=MFlJZLRAgz1fwr_qMwWMT0su2AAv6xYE0Gq5tnMGNpyi1zMPflzAi-unbTp0lLQqfgUGUrlnU0DVhOmVuBWA6zBSqCcUEEGgjbH7YPIEUykgq1O9cH-K1aguhs0ThP-NTVI3H4YBGIr029d4A0SdzlkLgcuKkoVmdzL-i2AtZlp6jNjo3L9jXlBN7wzp_18ZGbA29sEVhAYdsy-zIX3atfqQo5LP2eE98UVttqd1y6Qpb0L9FGzC_n-GwT3khl5KvYA3O3gk-YorTsIswTRWZpP1D3TJk5aVCZ2AVrvhTLYdaU-3IMNZeOf-h1WYe8SmMSpuwkDoHU2Q_kz3O--gFOg29wmfnQbeU7W1y6VPq1v5Ph3Fb1cQrnompJn11PssgMZlTm_JAqBmQbJ8MYSOObm9KilMGbG09urRt_Lg7Zv--_FxTOAoW6EuP4gQNWn9SEYnFb7JetzsrNMn7oEylw%3D%3D)

Peter,

Have you ever believed in something so strongly, that you’re willing to give up everything?

**_My family did and I am thankful every day for their sacrifice._**

I was born in Havana, Cuba, and escaped Castro's Communist Revolution with my family in 1960. I grew up watching a communist dictator destroy my native country. Our family friends who remained were forced to ration food and were oppressed every single day. But Fellow Conservative, I’ve always believed that my life is blessed – and I am grateful every day that my parents risked everything to make sure that we grew up in America where we could be free! They took a chance and together, we made it to the United States.

My parents came here with nothing but through hard work they were able to provide the example and the foundation for me to live the American Dream.

**I am living proof that the American dream is real!**

[**My name is Leora Levy and I’m running for the United States Senate.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6962731f6a3b47149841e4ab02a395e3&_e=MFlJZLRAgz1fwr_qMwWMT0su2AAv6xYE0Gq5tnMGNpyi1zMPflzAi-unbTp0lLQqfgUGUrlnU0DVhOmVuBWA6zBSqCcUEEGgjbH7YPIEUykgq1O9cH-K1aguhs0ThP-NTVI3H4YBGIr029d4A0SdzlkLgcuKkoVmdzL-i2AtZlp6jNjo3L9jXlBN7wzp_18ZGbA29sEVhAYdsy-zIX3atfqQo5LP2eE98UVttqd1y6Qpb0L9FGzC_n-GwT3khl5KzEngTZ3ePN3BNLYqRtrIzUhx75A-xvnmbZ0P0RzWw0ToUCA-TqWDedsBuPoWiEO6Cbpg8hSFKloZmEWv8NBRLj3UZUhsTKONGu8in6T-sDWCFiGx7J_Ri3AZu3TU3ZSIS2MHONjtInQzimVdo4qpc_qZYYSME7ladW841svCLv_2jLY0WWrxRpmaEKhkanv1pXdJzaP2C6NXQLAvgnVIPQ%3D%3D) I am running to lead the fight for freedom and to take on the far-left who want to make our country look more like Communist Cuba than the United States.

[**Will you join my team with a contribution to my campaign of $10, $25, $50, or $75 so we can win the fight for freedom together?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6962731f6a3b47149841e4ab02a395e3&_e=MFlJZLRAgz1fwr_qMwWMT0su2AAv6xYE0Gq5tnMGNpyi1zMPflzAi-unbTp0lLQqfgUGUrlnU0DVhOmVuBWA6zBSqCcUEEGgjbH7YPIEUykgq1O9cH-K1aguhs0ThP-NTVI3H4YBGIr029d4A0SdzlkLgcuKkoVmdzL-i2AtZlp6jNjo3L9jXlBN7wzp_18ZGbA29sEVhAYdsy-zIX3atfqQo5LP2eE98UVttqd1y6Qpb0L9FGzC_n-GwT3khl5K1q7XMoOA4yjchcgpvl2bxBI2OA2ZmWr0ncjoESvz46TUrC179ajVv8ShCsJTwG-Wth8SWHVAgIBn_DCAHYDYc8BDZn7bTl5aJO0M7u8rjaNsQ7AgwjwMtKQQSdj-U8ASl7Z8MGDreENyY-GoguCpA4GeGmIQW4zoyUM9-rSiDl3_80uAqRhxHxz0Qg3varUzhUgcqYZY2cF64QcdGMOQrg%3D%3D)

[ _**DONATE**_ >> ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6962731f6a3b47149841e4ab02a395e3&_e=MFlJZLRAgz1fwr_qMwWMT0su2AAv6xYE0Gq5tnMGNpyi1zMPflzAi-unbTp0lLQqfgUGUrlnU0DVhOmVuBWA6zBSqCcUEEGgjbH7YPIEUykgq1O9cH-K1aguhs0ThP-NTVI3H4YBGIr029d4A0SdzlkLgcuKkoVmdzL-i2AtZlp6jNjo3L9jXlBN7wzp_18ZGbA29sEVhAYdsy-zIX3atfqQo5LP2eE98UVttqd1y6Qpb0L9FGzC_n-GwT3khl5Kw-OufqLCrXdj5Ccsyif8vxkGXr_qOE02a0xcmrwZ6M6iTQ5OG0V0x84yXLg9fRr7t7ApvDyS0wYhi1tZTnZdR9bR7IQEyRRsb-u9GVAtLEawuUuwZhBnbRP7w0zT36yaFEfDPgjuCMrifwviUeOT6FFPc5CGHYgmfIITqAs6oZ2jWIIXe2RFrsHOnmhiLZjGJ1GdwKCS0t5cAwNLNeatIA%3D%3D)

For too long, Democrats in Congress have sought to undermine our freedoms and destroy the very fabric of America. I am committed to leading the fight for American Freedom promised to us by our Constitution - because I know first-hand what it’s like when you lose it.

Think about this: in the first year of Joe Biden’s presidency, we have experienced record-setting inflation and fuel prices, and encountered utter disregard for our country's founding principles, faced a humiliating and deadly retreat from Afghanistan, leaving Americans behind and losing 13 brave American soldiers... _and this is just the beginning._

There’s no doubt that radical Democrats will continue to implement their left-wing agenda - _the same agenda my family once escaped from in Cuba._ [**This is why we need your help to win back the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s assault on our values.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6962731f6a3b47149841e4ab02a395e3&_e=MFlJZLRAgz1fwr_qMwWMT0su2AAv6xYE0Gq5tnMGNpyi1zMPflzAi-unbTp0lLQqfgUGUrlnU0DVhOmVuBWA6zBSqCcUEEGgjbH7YPIEUykgq1O9cH-K1aguhs0ThP-NTVI3H4YBGIr029d4A0SdzlkLgcuKkoVmdzL-i2AtZlp6jNjo3L9jXlBN7wzp_18ZGbA29sEVhAYdsy-zIX3atfqQo5LP2eE98UVttqd1y6Qpb0L9FGzC_n-GwT3khl5KIoSRzr7chJW338XA2wa2z4i47Ko49A6GivjmCk-d4PocaFqJL9_PZ1yn5R459IYV6vMEqxB4wta0-eXo3qkGoNxG2gQzLv0BItSKUyYa7e8_qvthCB4d2rrDc-pV3IuqY_3xPcjvVVG7hO06hwp59j5Cc_hYbl0MdK3X9npjg24aF0Igc1vbsxqHudPMH8P9MASa9yX7_1_v3dM7-1fiyQ%3D%3D)

[ _**DONATE**_ >> ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6962731f6a3b47149841e4ab02a395e3&_e=MFlJZLRAgz1fwr_qMwWMT0su2AAv6xYE0Gq5tnMGNpyi1zMPflzAi-unbTp0lLQqfgUGUrlnU0DVhOmVuBWA6zBSqCcUEEGgjbH7YPIEUykgq1O9cH-K1aguhs0ThP-NTVI3H4YBGIr029d4A0SdzlkLgcuKkoVmdzL-i2AtZlp6jNjo3L9jXlBN7wzp_18ZGbA29sEVhAYdsy-zIX3atfqQo5LP2eE98UVttqd1y6Qpb0L9FGzC_n-GwT3khl5KEbc6OAjFbWM6Si4U-BixzOSfCRTeeXq6Z_LntASGpISWqiyVr3jNewxa4DrsB_svPt2LrwQZSoH8uwqHBqoZnl660BV_QLAf-Sx9_0WJFQ2WeceVHBkmU_k6ymc8cL4rNUhyFU2XqtWA34hGYKiCv7-6OQCNb4TMyEnjix2LRjTPm8KYjXoDwI3FdXeIZyeYbjXFz_qIrL62AXyFDBhpRw%3D%3D)

To live our shared American values, we need strong leadership that is willing to stand firm against the advance of far-left socialist, Marxist policies in our country. What we don’t need is another squishy moderate who will abandon or betray us when it comes down to the important votes.

Know this, Peter - Joe Biden may not be on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to **Beat Back Biden** is to beat Dick Blumenthal and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done. We must restore a Republican majority in the Senate!

[**I hope I can count on you to join me taking our country back.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6962731f6a3b47149841e4ab02a395e3&_e=MFlJZLRAgz1fwr_qMwWMT0su2AAv6xYE0Gq5tnMGNpyi1zMPflzAi-unbTp0lLQqfgUGUrlnU0DVhOmVuBWA6zBSqCcUEEGgjbH7YPIEUykgq1O9cH-K1aguhs0ThP-NTVI3H4YBGIr029d4A0SdzlkLgcuKkoVmdzL-i2AtZlp6jNjo3L9jXlBN7wzp_18ZGbA29sEVhAYdsy-zIX3atfqQo5LP2eE98UVttqd1y6Qpb0L9FGzC_n-GwT3khl5KvxrCd7Tl3gqTRbyF6WoMAyO5rdHTt_qR-zUor-HXJBZQThmgvbeaZFZQsmw-n9UikQXH_6TKKHwDaeZXYD8MQRtbyFy_aUl1miK-oMbClryoEiZZf_SBReECYZBCVqPVmzCkGHuCFnM_4Rce0r9xdV0vxuBoVj4-QjvmL65WxeWVJsHesKGMA_pDcWAwNfsqTV31OC1mZTheuuqcZr0W9Q%3D%3D)

For America and for freedom,
Leora Levy

| | **About Leora**
_I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done._

---
| Paid for by Leora Levy for U.S. Senate, Inc.

| "**Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats** fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. clean_body: It’s clear we’re only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. | Fellow American, We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof: | "Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign. " - The Hill, 2/9/2022 Many of Hollywood's top celebrity activists are funneling thousands of dollars each into the campaign account of our opponent. It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. More deep-pocketed Hollywood celebrities are going to send max-out contributions with the intent of keeping their favorite Democrat in the Senate. We've set a goal of raising an additional $35,000 before midnight tonight and could use your help. That may sound like an arbitrary number, but it's the amount of money we need to be raising - DAILY - to run the most competitive campaign possible. While our opponent supports Hollywood's values, I'm fighting for Georgia and our conservative values. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Winning in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The Texas primary election is just 15 days away and we have the opportunity to elect two progressive champions to Congress.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220215-2798-header&t=1&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)
It was a big weekend in Texas.
The Texas primary election is just 15 days away and we have a massive opportunity to elect two progressive champions to Congress: Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar.
**Electing these two candidates will grow our voice in Congress calling for Medicare for All, reproductive rights, a Green New Deal, and much more.**
It’s the reason why Alexandria traveled to San Antonio and Austin this past weekend to help get out the vote before early voting starts on Monday, and met with organizers on the ground.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220215?refcode=em20220215-2798-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2798_2526796_w641WG&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)
Alexandria is working around the clock to grow our movement in Congress, but it will take a mass-mobilization of grassroots power to win in Texas. [If you’re able to, can you chip in $3 right now to support Jess, Greg, and our work to mobilize voters in Texas before the primary on March 1?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220215?refcode=em20220215-2798-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2798_2526796_w641WG&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220215?refcode=em20220215-2798-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2798_2526796_w641WG&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)**
During the visit, Alexandria met with local grassroots organizations to discuss how they’re organizing Latino and Black communities year-round and addressing the shifting political landscape we saw in Rio Grande Valley in 2020 with voters leaning more Republican than in previous years.1
Alexandria attended two rallies with the candidates in addition to a rally with DSA Austin that focused on the Green New Deal in light of the first anniversary of the massive 2021 storm in Texas. Several thousand people attended the events!
For candidates like Jess – similar to Alexandria's primary campaign in 2018 – going up against an entrenched incumbent is not easy, and winning the primary is the hardest battle. It’s especially hard in a voter repressed state like Texas.
That’s why it’s crucial that we support these campaigns $5, $10, $50 at a time so they can knock on as many doors as possible to energize voters and set a record for voter turnout.
[Please pitch in what you can and your donation will automatically be split between Jess, Greg, and our campaign to reach voters across Texas.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220215?refcode=em20220215-2798-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2798_2526796_w641WG&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)
In solidarity,
Team AOC
P.S. We need volunteers to help contact voters in Texas! If you’re able to, please sign up to [**join a Jess Cisneros phone bank here**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10404?source=aoc-em20220215-2798&utm_source=aoc-em20220215-2798&t=24&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG) or a [**Greg Casar phone bank here**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10405?source=aoc-em20220215-2798&utm_source=aoc-em20220215-2798&t=25&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG).
1 - [Texas Public Radio](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10403?t=26&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220215?refcode=em20220215-2798-P_FND_SPL_END&t=27&refcode2=2798_2526796_w641WG&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220215-2798-P_FND_SPL_END&t=28&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=29&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=30&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=31&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=32&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=33&akid=2798%2E2526796%2Ew641WG)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Alvin Williams
subject: BREAKING NEWS in Michigan!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
I’m putting this at the TOP of your inbox.
| |
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=1)
---
| Peter, There's nothing Democrats fear more than outspoken Black conservatives exposing their Liberal LIES about "racist" conservatives to Black voters... ...but a popular Black, Christian conservative, _Army combat veteran, and successful businessman_ like John James **running for Congress** is the **Democrats' worst nightmare**. **[I'm hoping you'll endorse John James for the U.S. House of Representatives, but first let me explain why the Democrats are so terrified of him.](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=2)** The Democrats are gearing up for war, and they fully expect to maintain control of the House this election. **But behind the scenes,_they're terrified_ that John James is about to thwart their entire takeover plot.** And they have good reason to be afraid. | [](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=3)
---
##### Captain John James will be the next U.S. Congressman from Michigan, but only with your help.
After all, they saw first-hand in previous elections what John is capable of - _watching in horror as he soared from a 21-point deficit to just 7 points within a few short months._
Shocked that their supposedly _"unbeatable"_ Senator was on the verge of losing to a _"nobody"_ political outsider...
...the panicked Democrats were forced to dump **over $15 million** into slowing down John's relentless surge just enough for well-known, deep-pocketed, and entrenched Democrat Senator Debbie Stabenow to narrowly squeak past.
# John James won more votes (1.9 million) than ANY Republican in Michigan in over a decade.
The Democrats are terrified because they know that if John can nearly topple one of the most powerful Democrats in the U.S. Senate...
**...then they don't stand a chance against John James this election!**
John is a successful, articulate, and intelligent Black conservative whose impeccable character is impossible for liberals to deface with slander and lies.
He's a West Point graduate, Ranger-qualified aviation officer, and retired Army Captain who served with distinction while leading two Apache helicopter platoons in Iraq.
He's also a successful businessman, having quadrupled his company's revenue and added 100 new employees in his first 5 years as President.
And through each step of his journey, John has led with courage, conviction, and a servant-first mentality that comes from his Christian faith.
[](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=4)
---
##### "I am a conservative who happens to be black. I'm in the Republican Party because the platform most aligns with my values. I am pro-life. I am pro-Second Amendment. I am pro-family. I am pro-business."
John calls himself an _"unapologetic Christian, pro-life, pro-business, pro-Second Amendment, conservative outsider"_ but Fox News and others are calling him _**"The future of the GOP."**_
**[And if this isn't enough to make you want to help send John James to the U.S. House of Representatives...](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=5)**
**...let me tell you what scares the Democrats most about John James.**
**John is on a mission to reclaim Black voters by exposing the Liberal LIE that conservatives like you and me are racists.**
He's opening their eyes to the _"Democratic brand of dependency that's being peddled"_ by unmasking Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who prey on Blacks with lies, empty promises, and failed policies.
And John's damning critiques of the Democrat Party and honest outreach to the Black Community are reclaiming Black voters to the Republican Party.
**John James is a serious threat to the Democrat Party, and they know it!**
_"He's SPECTACULAR. Rarely have I seen a candidate with such great potential. West Point graduate, successful businessman, and an African American leader...**He will be a star.** "_
-President Donald Trump
---
**To say the Democrats are panicking would be an understatement.**
They know John can reclaim enough Black voters to convert Michigan from a long-standing Democrat stronghold into the newest "red state."
And they know that winning a U.S. Congressional race will catapult John to national stardom, guaranteeing that millions of Black voters across America will hear his powerful message and begin fleeing the Democrat Party.
Once elected, Congressman John James will work tirelessly to:
* **EXPOSE** the Liberal Lies to the entire nation
* **RECLAIM** Black voters to the Republican Party
* **END** the Democrats' death-grip on the Black Community

**And Democrats know that if they lose just 12% of the Black vote, it'll be impossible for them to ever win another election.**
# That's why Democrats are terrified of John James and WILL STOP AT NOTHING TO SHUT HIM UP
**[That’s why I pray you'll also make an urgent, recurring donation of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more to help John FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' vicious attacks!](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=6)**
BAMPAC Action Fund played an ACTIVE roll helping John James shrink the margin between him and his opponent in the previous election.
With your help, we were able to place billboards in key areas throughout Michigan, like the one you see here:
[](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=7)
---
We also ran radio ads in 3 of the largest black communities in Michigan and reached voters through online video ads in 10 key Michigan counties.
These online video ads were targeted towards Black Americans who’d voted in 2 of the last 4 elections up to that point.
And with your help... _we’ll do it again!_
John James really is _**"the future Republicans have been waiting for,"**_ but that future may never arrive without your committed support.
The Democrats are desperate to STOP John from taking this critical Congressional seat and END his campaign to recruit Black voters to the Republican Party.
And make no mistake about it: the future of our shared conservative values depends on our ability to reclaim Black voters from the Democrats.
**[That’s why your _monthly_ gift of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more is so critical now more than ever!](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=8)**
Real change takes time and commitment, and I know that you’re in this fight for the long-haul.
I know you won’t allow our conservative values to fall to the wayside by failing to build a conservative future.
That’s why I’m counting on your help TODAY.
**[So please help defend John James from Democrat attacks and DESTROY the liberal lies with your _monthly_ gift of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=9)**
Thank you, and God Bless.
| [](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=10)
---
_For America,_ |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund
[DONATE](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=11)
---
**P.S.** John James is the **Democrats' worst nightmare** because he's reclaiming Black voters to the Republican Party by exposing the Liberal LIES about "racist" conservatives that keep Blacks voting for Democrats... **...and he's the ONLY ONE who can win this crucial House race and thwart their plans to retake the U.S. House of Representatives this election.** **That's why they'll stop at nothing to SHUT HIM UP!** **[That’s why I pray you'll make an urgent, monthly contribution of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more to support John James up through Election Day.](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=12)** **As a conservative leader in your community, your support is critical to beat back the Democrats' vicious attacks and propel John James to victory.[So please give what you can today.](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesmonbaf?info=2022ER0102&recruiter_id=62248&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=13)**
---
|
###### © Black America's PAC Action Fund
###### Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.
---
You're receiving this email because you've been critical to our mission of reclaiming Black voters, destroying the Liberal Lies, and supporting Black conservative candidates like John James, Tim Scott, and Burgess Owens. If you're giving up on this critical fight, then please [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0102&n=14) to stop receiving emails.
---

And John's damning critiques of the Democrat Party and honest outreach to the Black Community are reclaiming Black voters to the Republican Party. John James is a serious threat to the Democrat Party, and they know it! "He's SPECTACULAR. Rarely have I seen a candidate with such great potential. West Point graduate, successful businessman, and an African American leader...He will be a star. " -President Donald Trump To say the Democrats are panicking would be an understatement. They know John can reclaim enough Black voters to convert Michigan from a long-standing Democrat stronghold into the newest "red state." And they know that winning a U.S. Congressional race will catapult John to national stardom, guaranteeing that millions of Black voters across America will hear his powerful message and begin fleeing the Democrat Party. Once elected, Congressman John James will work tirelessly to: EXPOSE the Liberal Lies to the entire nation RECLAIM Black voters to the Republican Party END the Democrats' death-grip on the Black Community And Democrats know that if they lose just 12% of the Black vote, it'll be impossible for them to ever win another election. That's why Democrats are terrified of John James and WILL STOP AT NOTHING TO SHUT HIM UP BAMPAC Action Fund played an ACTIVE roll helping John James shrink the margin between him and his opponent in the previous election. With your help, we were able to place billboards in key areas throughout Michigan, like the one you see here: We also ran radio ads in 3 of the largest black communities in Michigan and reached voters through online video ads in 10 key Michigan counties. These online video ads were targeted towards Black Americans who’d voted in 2 of the last 4 elections up to that point. And with your help... we’ll do it again! John James really is "the future Republicans have been waiting for," but that future may never arrive without your committed support. The Democrats are desperate to STOP John from taking this critical Congressional seat and END his campaign to recruit Black voters to the Republican Party. And make no mistake about it: the future of our shared conservative values depends on our ability to reclaim Black voters from the Democrats. Real change takes time and commitment, and I know that you’re in this fight for the long-haul. I know you won’t allow our conservative values to fall to the wayside by failing to build a conservative future. That’s why I’m counting on your help TODAY. Thank you, and God Bless. | For America, | Alvin Williams President & CEO BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund P.S. John James is the Democrats' worst nightmare because he's reclaiming Black voters to the Republican Party by exposing the Liberal LIES about "racist" conservatives that keep Blacks voting for Democrats... ...and he's the ONLY ONE who can win this crucial House race and thwart their plans to retake the U.S. House of Representatives this election. That's why they'll stop at nothing to SHUT HIM UP! As a conservative leader in your community, your support is critical to beat back the Democrats' vicious attacks and propel John James to victory.** | © Black America's PAC Action Fund Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. You're receiving this email because you've been critical to our mission of reclaiming Black voters, destroying the Liberal Lies, and supporting Black conservative candidates like John James, Tim Scott, and Burgess Owens. If you're giving up on this critical fight, then please to stop receiving emails.

subject: Don't get your medical advice from a politician
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
That's why mandates don't make sense. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=823e4f8b7cf84975af1711a141d42927&_e=wCmHffw-PepDLFVy_tI2_NTiDvnYHSMhdou1f04UcDK6Zq8GfcKmachIT7uWGaGJeaEJhB0C0_njBVSJOP16KN0Tql3qjaqm9DYF3RvdpBc1x0hZBXnImeiLwgp01ujLOJ6vCkMg2rtth0t7MKEkGN5vk5gCO6RiWirlGgwd3UQCW-JS6KI-SLbc8oA0J65M3_CjGdQ6UWT9JgdHm3dmMnhHQYttuVlhECjxFlToXjxExzb6yeBm16OIWjwcXJGNQzJz067ZUN2ezze-sENfqnpFcKSZwjvWQkdGFNzT56vfiAqUK_38-TqiCoq54CbWxvX4qlHEKmWORjXXdJ3bPUSakse7waytj0dfb1SVKHA%3D) My friend, Mandates directly violate our rights as Americans and take away our liberty. Minnesotans should be able to decide, with advice from their doctor, the best direction for themselves and their children, including in school. I’ve believed, and now it has been proven, that mask mandates for kids were harmful to their mental health and ability to learn. [**_Will you help me fight unconstitutional mandates and stand up for our children by making a donation to my campaign?_**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=823e4f8b7cf84975af1711a141d42927&_e=wCmHffw-PepDLFVy_tI2_NTiDvnYHSMhdou1f04UcDK6Zq8GfcKmachIT7uWGaGJeaEJhB0C0_njBVSJOP16KN0Tql3qjaqm9DYF3RvdpBc1x0hZBXnImeiLwgp01ujLOJ6vCkMg2rtth0t7MKEkGHPBbgTumv205LiOTAFJP4DnSWykBtcWm4MFDQcECTWbuK4Ckh1G9gmSYzroBmFxnsIVqvQtMJWuOsOUwA8abimKLat3IyLmmWfNujZMx9CR3wS-2Ws36ZNdC4Iiu7Hyv2EzHDoMFOyZLHBkBtZnzliZq60islLlK_4grpjcXDqk8PRgQ__b8QXsmrpH3_Hcp_iHTyNWQjoVMestV7SBl3g%3D) [**Will You Help Me Fight Unconstitutional Mandates?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=823e4f8b7cf84975af1711a141d42927&_e=wCmHffw-PepDLFVy_tI2_NTiDvnYHSMhdou1f04UcDK6Zq8GfcKmachIT7uWGaGJeaEJhB0C0_njBVSJOP16KN0Tql3qjaqm9DYF3RvdpBc1x0hZBXnImeiLwgp01ujLOJ6vCkMg2rtth0t7MKEkGC5k3mT67UNBFBs7A2CZLQsnL8ovirx8npT1G5lWCZXcdfz7MUbs_id3xSFi99FGLPDTf84qIRBCo_BRvsnotrCja-VI8q4Q9wA9WRFuI0SpSVpoyGEfC7xhJwwpRfDkOyH8vUvHHYgEhanwgYQ3wPNR6tw-2EzQw1Rr-Qz2yJ3R3K_0wOQBflG_Qk8aPvBlvC-ybN9G4R1ZaCd_qmBDcWk%3D) Vaccines should not be mandated for kids. It's a parent's role to decide what they think is best for their own children, not a politician. After all, you don't go to politicians for your medical advice, you go to a doctor. As your governor, I will never impose mask or vaccine mandates. When I was the Senate Majority Leader, we did not have any mask or vaccine mandates. EVER. **[With your support, we can restore sanity and liberty to the way Minnesota is governed.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=823e4f8b7cf84975af1711a141d42927&_e=wCmHffw-PepDLFVy_tI2_NTiDvnYHSMhdou1f04UcDK6Zq8GfcKmachIT7uWGaGJeaEJhB0C0_njBVSJOP16KN0Tql3qjaqm9DYF3RvdpBc1x0hZBXnImeiLwgp01ujLOJ6vCkMg2rtth0t7MKEkGDkP7o1DkJ3JbYPEChOlvVm-vAzYAeVQvAkV-72QIz_edMY1veuyyElOvcoZJqznqussLbrcU-h3-5EMCN3izbRMJsTeenyEQiYi7ZoX6DtYrIBFJB6_0-wGODm3AQ6x7fr_orBAxGtLg59ckF4p0Iq3-g0u24TM1VN61c84c3i_6IqHuQjvQ-ZUskZkQdz8MqmAgq9Bn73nLPAOPKuAOAk%3D) name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Saw something interesting in our stats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This says a lot about the current status of the campaign. Take a look if you can today:
#
Hey Derek — we're almost at our mid-month deadline, a.k.a. the halfway point to our next public reporting deadline with the FEC.
Remember, the news media (and our GOP opponents) are going to scour these numbers next quarter to gauge our campaign’s momentum.
A lot of donations? _That means John Fetterman has the momentum to win._
Too few donations? _That makes John Fetterman look beatable._
Because this is high stakes stuff, we generally try to make a really big push right before these deadlines.
**Derek, the truth is, we're behind where we need to be for the month. And if we don't see a quick surge of support, we could miss our goal.** We were trying to find out why, and then we logged into ActBlue noticed this... our average donation has gone down since our campaign first began:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44176?refcode=ema20220215-4603&t=1&akid=4603%2E434096%2E12fbl6)
**We started up there in the $31 range. Now we're down to $21.90.**
In a weird way, we're proud of it! Here's why:
A low average donation is the hallmark of a real people-powered campaign. It shows that we’re not funded solely by a bunch of rich elites with deep pockets.
But, on the other hand,**it means the money we used to raise from two donations — well, now we need three to raise the same amount!**
We can't afford to miss our mid-month goal because of the aforementioned high stakes — reporters, media narratives, yada yada. So, we're asking everyone who hasn't donated to make their very first contribution to John Fetterman today — that'll help us close the gap.
**[Can you make your first $21.90 donation right now to help John Fetterman reach our mid-month goal? Every donation helps us show the strength and size of this grassroots campaign to flip PA blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44176?refcode=ema20220215-4603&t=2&akid=4603%2E434096%2E12fbl6)**
**[Contribute $21.90](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44176?refcode=em20220215-4603&amount=5&t=3&akid=4603%2E434096%2E12fbl6)**
Look, if you can give ANY amount at all today, that makes you a hero in our books. Seriously, it means a lot to us.
If you can't give today, we understand, and that's OK too.
**At the end of the day, we're proud that we're the only campaign in this race with way more than 375,000+ grassroots contributions.** It says a lot about the kind of inclusive, grassroots movement we’re building. And it means a lot when it comes to flipping a swing state like Pennsylvania.
Thank you for all you do.
— Team Fetterman

P.S. Even if you can't donate $31 or $21 or anywhere near our average donation, any amount you can spare *really* helps. And if you're the kind of person who can afford to do more, that helps a lot too. **[So, please, consider making a donation now before our deadline hits.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44176?refcode=ema20220215-4603&t=4&akid=4603%2E434096%2E12fbl6)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220215-4603-footer&t=5&refcode2=4603_434096_12fbl6&akid=4603%2E434096%2E12fbl6)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=4603%2E434096%2E12fbl6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=4603%2E434096%2E12fbl6)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Make Mayorkas Resign
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress.com/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-6171782?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| I don’t need to explain how bad it is at our southern border right now.

**Record crossings.
Record apprehensions.
Record drug seizures.
**
There was a 1066% increase in fentanyl seizures this year in one sector alone.

President Biden and his administration have created this crisis. They open our border up to criminals, and they have done NOTHING to stop the flow of criminals and drugs into our country.

**Kamala is missing.
Biden hasn't visited the border.
Mayorkas is acting more like a “get out of jail free card” than the head of Homeland Security.**

This administration has put every American in danger – we must hold them accountable.

**That is why this week, I called for DHS Secretary Mayorkas to resign.** He isn’t keeping our nation safe. He isn’t securing our southern border. He isn’t supporting law enforcement.
---
| [ ](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=117804b0c4&e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **He has failed, and he needs to go. We can’t have weak officails in power who will not enforce our laws.**

---
|
---
| [MAKE MAYORKAS RESIGN](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=6a705ce8d2&e=13f35c4add "MAKE MAYORKAS RESIGN")
---
|
---
| **I visited the border with President Trump. I have seen the crisis. Biden, Kamala, and Mayorkas have caused it, they are ignoring it, and they are putting us in danger.**

Day 1 in the Majority, we will take action to hold them accountable and secure our border.

Best,
Chris Jacobs
---
| |
---
|

**JACOBS FOR CONGRESS**
P.O. Box 387
CLARENCE, NY 14031

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=b6cb02ac78&e=13f35c4add&c=049c624049) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=b6cb02ac78&e=13f35c4add&c=049c624049).

---

name: Press - Dolan for Ohio
subject: What They Are Saying About Matt Dolan's Latest Ad Blitz
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Dolan For Ohio, Inc
body:
No images? [Click here](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-e-bjytduy-idulfldlt-e/) [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-r/) **What They Are Saying About Matt Dolan's Latest Ad Blitz ** On Monday, Republican candidate Matt Dolan made national headlines with a new ad launch and polling that indicates increased traction in the race for U.S. Senate. The commercial, "Pencil," features Dolan talking about the Biden Administration's failure to secure the Southern Border and the resulting drug and human trafficking challenges this crisis poses for Ohio and the nation. **[Dolan takes aim at Biden over border security in massive ad buy](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-y/)** _" A former county chief assistant prosecutor and state assistant attorney general before running for elected office, Dolan highlights that 'as a prosecutor and a legislator, I cracked down on drug dealers and traffickers here in Ohio. In the U.S. Senate, I will fight for more Border Patrol and to finish the Wall'."__ "Border security is a top issue with Republican voters in Ohio and across the country, and Dolan emphasizes at the end of his ad that 'without a border, we have no country'."_**_Here 's what they are saying about the ad:_****[Erick Erickson](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-j/), Host, The Erick Erickson Show** _" Interesting way to blend a local issue with border control."_**[Jim Trakas](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-t/), Councilperson At Large, City of Independence** _" Anyone who has dealt with treating addiction or have a loved one hurt or die by drugs knows Matt Dolan is dead on. Red China is poisoning Americans, and the Biden Administration is literally allowing this to happen without a fight."_**[Franklin County Republican Party](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-i/)** _" Great new ad from Matt Dolan - the only Ohio Senate candidate who consistently remains focused on advancing conservative solutions to the issues that directly impact Ohio!"_**[Jay Hottinger](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-d/), President Pro Tem, Ohio Senate** _" Once again, Matt Dolan is the only Ohio Senate candidate focused on issues affecting Ohio. These are critical issues and Matt is the only one talking about them."_**_[Doug Moorman](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-h/), Vice Mayor and Councilman, City of Madeira_** _" Again, Dolan is focused on addressing real issues facing our state- and in this case an issue literally plaguing Ohio."_**[Matt Holt](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-k/), Reporter, National Journal** _" State Senator Matt Dolan out with an ad hitting Biden's border policies--very much has a general election vibe to it."_**[Christopher Galloway](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-n/), Auditor, Lake County** _" Matt is right. And he is the only one in the race focused on these issues."_**[Howard Wilkinson](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-p/), Senior Political Analyst, WVXU Cincinnati** _" Matt Dolan is still the only one in the field not spending his time sucking up to Trump and running against Biden instead."_In other notable news, Monday witnessed the [second independent poll](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-x/) in a week that had Dolan gaining ground in the Senate race. [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-m/) The following was Matt Dolan's response to the survey: [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-c/) Learn more about Matt Dolan's campaign for U.S. Senate at [www.DolanforOhio.com](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-q/). [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-a/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-f/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-z/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjytduy-idulfldlt-v/) | Paid For By Dolan For Ohio, Inc. [Preferences](https://dolanforohioinc.updatemyprofile.com/y-bjytduy-FC066A9E-idulfldlt-s) | [Unsubscribe](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-u-bjytduy-idulfldlt-g/)
---

name: Great America Update
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6709%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=1U40bPw7R1GzqV8YXyTKDQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69028%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xyTNR3zjx7pnFirQC0ydAg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69029%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sIcU1JwJhFJ9xNDtMM4tQg&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69020%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fAbEI7dvJhuw%2fga85Pxxfg&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69021%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HQD%2bPmDK%2bJwEhiMQeUUguQ&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69020%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fAbEI7dvJhuw%2fga85Pxxfg&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69022%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hvymM3DhmUZNfDapHInzSA&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6709%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=1U40bPw7R1GzqV8YXyTKDQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6709%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=1U40bPw7R1GzqV8YXyTKDQ&sysid=1)

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Pig at a bacon contest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmi7dum1onm37afegq2b2a7kariutg0n02u0cdkg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6pb2eljbatbkm5gj8pr4cdr66ptje3hjbcrjm4pn7cphc9q6dc32ctj3ecbje1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8qmcd376diefclhcoob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgmao30cjh68p324no)
Target on my back

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zooamjdiob4tl7ghhsp41fga3fgv1910a4j0aat0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1g69oj4chh2bs)
---

Friends,

I’m as nervous as a pig at a bacon contest about what’s going on in our country right now.

Open borders, 2nd amendment rights threatened, tax hikes that will cripple the economy... _The only thing that could happen now to put our country in more danger is an alien invasion and even THAT may be a safer bet at this point._

I’m reaching out to you because you know I always tell it how it is. And truth is, I’m in trouble. I’m in trouble because the Radical Left has put a target on my back for standing up to their double standards and cancel culture. I’m standing up to their tax hikes and complete disregard for our border security.

Here’s a secure link that only you will be able to access for a limited time. Please take advantage of this opportunity. **[CHIP IN HERE.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zibcb06feramjh5hpmtm7dllqel8qvl93df7kn3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1g69oj4chh2bs)**

With that being said, they’re putting every dollar they can behind attacking me and attacking your conservative values, so I need your help to fight back. Our February mid-month deadline just passed, and to be honest I’m embarrassed to tell you just how much the Democrats’ outraised us. **I desperately need your support to help us catch up as much as possible by midnight.**

Anything you can give before midnight means you’re doing everything possible to stop the radical Left from destroying our great nation by helping us hit our mid-month goal. I’m counting on you and the rest of the country is too.

Thank you and God Bless,

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmru98nljnk89j8aatnjifj19te73e9r14us3f30_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1g69oj4chh2bs)
Senator John Kennedy | Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
---

Baton Rouge, LA 70808

Open borders, 2nd amendment rights threatened, tax hikes that will cripple the economy... The only thing that could happen now to put our country in more danger is an alien invasion and even THAT may be a safer bet at this point. I’m reaching out to you because you know I always tell it how it is. And truth is, I’m in trouble. I’m in trouble because the Radical Left has put a target on my back for standing up to their double standards and cancel culture. I’m standing up to their tax hikes and complete disregard for our border security. Here’s a secure link that only you will be able to access for a limited time. Please take advantage of this opportunity. With that being said, they’re putting every dollar they can behind attacking me and attacking your conservative values, so I need your help to fight back. Our February mid-month deadline just passed, and to be honest I’m embarrassed to tell you just how much the Democrats’ outraised us. I desperately need your support to help us catch up as much as possible by midnight. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4l15suli423dqkqj42b89qbv6t18cbq728s5pro_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1g69oj4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3hmhj33dr0caoe8ohjcuq72sbmc6rmcdhnmapras3jcmqjat7366pn2d37mjjrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5lm1jrcob6ejib6phnm2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztdcpl6a0ig4al0baudam95l3io5qvr52e0mrhb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1g69oj4cph2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs26dpmi6ji4nr3hi32k3mi3kkik1f9neisd1gr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1g69oj4cph2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqqvorq45ed30dfe9q8jismr1s2jnus68vt8d208_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1g69oj4cph2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh8af1dftmodv141orbeoauot5efd5n1qcnpgf9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1g69oj4cph2bs)**
---

name: American Update
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9577%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ZxhIPqlW32NRpncDT1UxhA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14575%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UcWgnFAPbo52%2fAWJsF1nLQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14576%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f70Deb%2fuozCsYceMVUo5zg&sysid=1)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14577%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RjCRIsExeq3hhnSug9q%2byw&sysid=1)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14576%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f70Deb%2fuozCsYceMVUo5zg&sysid=1)**
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

clean_body: While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. | | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others? Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King” examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel. | | This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link: By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum. | | | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying “The David Story.” Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of “The David Story” while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty. Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below: 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

This is horrible news,

It’s regarding your credit card purchase records.

They’ve been exposed.

As of February 16th, 2022, over 13 government agencies have full access to your entire credit card purchase history.

Here’s why this is very bad for you,

Even if you think you have nothing to hide...

All it takes is for them to find ANY purchases they deem as “suspicious”... and they could easily:

Investigate you for “extremist activity”

Freeze your assets

Even throw you in jail!

So if you’ve purchased any guns, ammo, survival supplies, or anything like that in the past 10 years...

You need to know 3 simple steps to become invisible to this disgusting surveillance of your finances.

You can see exactly what they are in the new and FREE book “Avoiding the Eye” by Richard Marshall.

Which part of your car talks to Big Brother... and how to shut it up.

How common appliances spy on you

- and how to blindfold them for good.

Even though they can listen to your phone... you can do this simple thing to block them.

And more!

The CIA openly admitted before Congress all of this is happening.

So he’s decided to give a few copies of his incredible book away for Free.

To keep the government’s nose out of your business click here and get your Free copy before the rest are gone.

name: Jim DeMint
subject: The Genocide Olympics
body:
Ever since China was awarded the 2022 Winter Olympics, we knew it was going to be bad. But this bad? The opening ceremony was
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcgoq1e83u712b4u8688h3sulpq03uptm9253fb0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr76shkc1hr8p73e5qb2pr16io6cppicopm2o3kcsrm7dlmmqorfcr0sprredpgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6lj38p5jc5jrepj66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5im0p32c3hm2oh5u)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot: Ever since China was awarded the 2022 Winter Olympics, we knew it was going to be bad. But _this bad? _
The opening ceremony was a Hollywood-produced commercial for Beijing’s communist dictatorship. You know, the tyrants who just:
▶︎ Unleashed a lethal pandemic on the world;
▶︎ Kidnapped a Chinese tennis star for speaking out; and,
▶︎ Is conducting ethnic cleansing against their Uighur minority.
This would be bad enough to have sit through. But America’s woke, corporate Left is adding insult to injury:
▶︎ NBC embarrassed itself by parroting Chinese propaganda about the Uighur genocide.
▶︎ Nancy Pelosi urged brave athletes not to speak out against China’s human rights atrocities.
▶︎ The head of the International Olympic Committee urged silence, too, because speaking up could – _gasp_ – end the Olympics.
▶︎ And of course, the entire event is being financed by U.S. corporations.

Olympic advertisers and partners are trying to keep a lower profile this year, but the truth is the truth: the Genocide Olympics have U.S. corporate sponsorship.
**[Help Americans wake up to the dangers of Woke Capital by supporting CPI today!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3vvsbdaogus6s2n9c0mo075ab7p3l0mt5mdk6k0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i64o73c5h2bs)**
Sadly, it gets worse.
A new report just found that Big Tech’s alliance with China is deeper than we ever realized. Silicon Valley isn’t just outsourcing jobs, they’re helping Beijing develop new military and public surveillance technologies.
This is the fruit of the Left’s anti-Americanism: U.S. corporations helping China murder its own citizens and threaten the United States, and being given cover for it by American television networks and reporters. This isn’t the free market – it’s the capture of the market by a foreign adversary and the global corporations in its pocket.
**[CPI is leading the fight against Big Tech corruption, but we need your support.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkqb1fe4pkht5jg3qhfc39n8pmhq193n23m1s8j0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i64o73c5h2bs)**
CPI’s **Digital Defense Initiative** has been leading the conservative charge against Big Tech. We’re working with leaders in the House, Senate, and around the country to shine a light on their monopolies, politics, and corruption.
Big Tech is a threat to American freedom. They are censoring our speech, silencing our leaders, twisting the news, rigging our elections, and spying on us 24/7 – kind of like their pals in Beijing.
Conservatives must be prepared to take them on and if necessary, break them up. The Left has chosen their side – we have to do the same, or liberty will have no champions.
**[Please help Americans defeat Big Tech tyranny by supporting CPI's Digital Defense Initiative today.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp352nmdeu5gc4fcevtmmkqs3714bhph4h1ja15g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i64o73c5h2bs)**
At CPI we will fight for your freedom, and everyone else’s, as long as it takes. When we chant **U-S-A!, U-S-A!** , it’s not just for our athletes. It’s for our country and the ideals on which it was founded.
Together, conservatives will restore them to Washington and defend them everywhere in the world. For Freedom,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|
---
---
**CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE**
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 Fax

---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3u480rjmn9m6cgmhimo8923d7khdslkal1g812g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i64o70sth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqnacb1e1hr9dhksljb0ohgmoq75c9kmporas36eqon8s5gelpj4thgmljb6c3n6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libbc30eph6cdj76kqjfc5lclp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqdi842q88d4ltv7vvf2b344pkm7si43ri5v7a00_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i64o70sth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs30u2d9puemnmf24c1e83n7nro6tb5s7pkq7oq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i64o70sth2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zei0r05s1n4tj1kvuudb1fu4dibn94dfj44kt7v0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i64o70sth2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zpffh90c9jhh8tv4pl3rv1s9g45b5jl1ul0956og).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv1aavemqlm2cja97571ic068jha6alkfmlthdf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i64o70sth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)
