name: Harriet Hageman
subject: I'm primarying Liz Cheney and I need your help.
body:
Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-a
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7jkc3dgmceo6l1m2bned9j8u4276mkjq032mjjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onk6hgb8oljmiqecotl6mpncp76clij8db1euqn1d366urb9pbj61pn0tpieepr0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4db66hib6oj7m9o6ccbgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?... |
Dear Friend,

Will you help me **FIRE Liz Cheney** and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?

No sooner had President Trump endorsed my primary challenge to Liz Cheney did she shoot back with her usual arrogance to _"bring it."_

[**Well, I'm counting on you to help me bring it by chipping in with an emergency donation to my campaign.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf7q2m6i7sj7m1inckchuorn6ke92qf5p8embb78_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgd866jvull6kvd88tegq01fmtk5bm6pep5ifrjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)
You and I don't have a moment to lose...

That's because establishment elitists, like George W. Bush, headline ritzy fundraisers in other states to raise _millions_ for Cheney.

That was even after Cheney admitted in a _60 Minutes_ interview that her record-breaking fundraising haul was helped out by Democrats.

If there was ever a time for conservative Americans to stand up to the elitist establishment, it's now. And it's against Liz Cheney. [**Will you help me with an urgent donation today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z621v9172liqdibb5gsorhfo9e1koo7r156d0p1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)

I'm getting ahead of myself.

Before you decide to give to my campaign to FIRE establishment-anointed Liz Cheney from Congress, **let me tell you a little about who I am, why President Trump endorsed my primary challenge, and why we need your immediate help.**

My name is Harriet Hageman, and Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just the values that Joe Biden and his socialists hate - they run absolutely counter to the establishment elites who have for too long controlled our Republican Party...and sold out our country to the highest bidder.

**I should know - like many in my state, and many more around the country, I was dupped by these same "Republicans."**

**And as a constitutional lawyer who fought against Bill Clinton's EPA regulations, I watched in disgust as establishment elites like Liz Cheney embraced big government and abandoned our conservative values.**

Unfortunately, it's only gotten worse since President Trump left office.

And now, backed by their friends on the left and the media, Cheney and the establishment are waging a full-blown war on Americans like you and me!

[**No more. Will you support my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney by making an emergency donation today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zosav648bv40hqlf2l14niroivrffrru3ppp1ia0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr4tauj8afshsfog9gf1r39k32rn0lvv2eelrooo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)
As I said at the start of this email, **President Trump is 100% behind me.**

He knows the people of Wyoming - and the American people - deserve better than Cheney, and he knows I'll never abandon our conservative values once elected to Congress.

In Wyoming, we have a long and proud history of standing up against an overbearing government.

In Washington, I promise to do the same...

...unlike Cheney, who spends more time fist-bumping Joe Biden and complimenting Nancy Pelosi than she does fighting back against big government bureaucrats who _waste our tax dollars_ , _fling open our borders_ , and _silence, censor, and even lock up conservatives_ who disagree!

**But even though I have President Trump's complete and total endorsement, there's one endorsement I still need:_yours_ .**

[**Will you make an emergency campaign donation to let me know I have it?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zngmcgo8aetb6dg2bsa4c05f5cr0afgunukvrmio_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4i1sfm23m2nt9f3n997gd4p35ar64fhp5846er0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)
You should know that, even though polls show Cheney is grossly unpopular in Wyoming, she still thinks she can win re-election.

**In fact, when liberal _60 Minutes_ asked her if she could beat me in the primary, she said "absolutely...this is going to be the most important House race in the country."**

Well, she was right about something - this will be the most important race in the entire country - but only because it will be the first step in saving America from the big government elites who enable Joe Biden.

Again, I'll need your help to beat her.

As I said, Cheney can count on the deep pocketbooks of the entire establishment.

That's not even saying anything for her left-wing supporters, who see this as their chance to weaken our Republican Party for good.

**But with your help, I know we can beat them. And I know we can send the disastrous Cheney political dynasty packing _for good_ .**

[**So please, won't you make an emergency campaign donation to FIRE Liz Cheney right away?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9lk05skshidb0vje9kd336p49rj19c9fkr56u9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2bmikmgkot1vgha2vkc6kugm5havtpj46h84u9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)
Liz Cheney represents everything the left stands for, and everything we must fight against.

Will you help me make sure we win that fight?

Respectfully,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhcr2mo7rotk8onm32iof6t1k3rmh8nqdd3apsp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

PS: It's disgusting to see Liz Cheney teaming up with George Bush to demonize conservatives and raise millions to back Nancy Pelosi's unconstitutional power grabs in Congress.

It's even more disgusting to watch her claim she speaks for the people of Wyoming and America.

[**No more - will you make an urgent donation to my campaign to defeat her in the Republican primary?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgmdc3h93amcjtt36qa6h746umctmmej32k3p1n8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)

[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3bdtfh9i4q07a9qllcopkc36eplg0crs2oopac0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)

---
| [ ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvtqo5752fo74nflc2s5nteni31o2u4n54kug0co_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth2bs)
---

| Paid for by:
HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING
P.O. Box 4157
Cheyanne, WY 82003
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4rq53sfa0080ek4lp6n9171234igr7fu0lomo1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1i62or0cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | **🚨 UPCOMING BATTLEGROUND ELECTION ALERT 🚨**
Patriot,

The **FIRST** election in the race to take back the House is SOON. Like really SOON.

The Corrupt Democrats, like Lame Duck Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Sleepy Joe Biden, and Stacey Abrams, are coming to Texas. We have to stop them.

**[We need you to step up and donate in the first chance to take back the House in 2022 before MIDNIGHT.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ic2a-1yjtb-4qqlpo7/ "We need you, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, to step up and donate in the first chance to take back the House in 2022 before MIDNIGHT.")**

---
| | | **Your donation will...**
---
| | | | | [$5 → feed one more volunteer](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ic2a-1yjtc-4qqlpo8/ "Generic Button")
---
| | | [$10→ buy a tank of gas to reach an undecided voter](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ic2a-1yjtd-4qqlpo9/ "Generic Button")
---
| | | [$15→ put up one more Yard Sign](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ic2a-1yjte-4qqlpo0/ "Generic Button")
---
| | | [$25→ air our TV ads](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ic2a-1yjtf-4qqlpo1/ "Generic Button")
---

This FIRST election of 2022 will set the tone for the rest of the year. We can not afford to lose.

Pelosi is dumping tons of dark money from her liberal elitist friends into these races. She is hoping for an easy win.

With your help, we can show her what conservative grassroots support does to an election. **[Chip in any amount you can to show Pelosi that Republican grassroots supporters will WIN back the House Majority>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ic2a-1yjtg-4qqlpo2/ "Chip in any amount you can to show Pelosi that Republican grassroots supporters will WIN back the House Majority>>> ")**
---
| | | [CHIP IN HERE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ic2a-1yjth-4qqlpo3/ "Generic Button")
---
Through your donation, we can knock on more doors, make more calls, produce more TV commercials, and reach more undecided voters. Because of YOU we will be able to win back the House majority and send Pelosi packing.

We are sincerely grateful for your support in the fight to win back the house.

Thank you,

Texas Battleground Fund
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ic2a-1yjti-4qqlpo4/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ic2a-1yjtj-4qqlpo5/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ic2a-1yjtk-4qqlpo6/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

subject: This will take 20 seconds to read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
We need to hit every goal to stay competitive against Ron Johnson and his special interest, corporate allies. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41853196/330612521/-1436015341?refcode=EM_FR_220216FR_N_TL_90DA_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWI2NDMyMS0yYjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DFzGtgMvyEjZY-ULl-BhNfDOWaIJh9zPz4POPo9lc9k=)
---
Hey Peter.

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: An Introduction to C.S. Lewis
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsvCz0aHuN

Hillsdale College

I invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's free
course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th
century, C.S. Lewis. C.S. Lewis, best known as the author of The
Chronicles of Narnia, also authored works on apologetics and
philosophy, including The Abolition of Man and Mere Christianity.
This free online course will study both Lewis's apologetics and
his fiction, as well as his philosophical and literary writings,
and their continuing significance today.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osvCz0aHuN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's
newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of
the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

Dear Fellow American,

I invite you to join me in Hillsdale
College's free course studying the greatest Christian apologist
of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

C.S. Lewis, best known as the author of
The Chronicles of Narnia, also authored works on apologetics and
philosophy, including The Abolition of Man and Mere Christianity.
This free online course will study both Lewis's apologetics and
his fiction, as well as his philosophical and literary writings,
and their continuing significance today.

This free online course consists of
nine lessons delivered by Hillsdale College President Larry P.
Arnn, Professor of English David Whalen, and Professor Michael
Ward-a leading expert on the works of C.S. Lewis at the
University of Oxford. I hope you enjoy the course.

Activate your course today, for free.

What students are saying

"Hillsdale College's online offerings
have deepened my education and enriched my life."

- Fred D.

"Extraordinary in their simplicity and
so fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this
avenue to knowledge."

- John C.

Time is Running Out

Don't wait-activate your free C.S Lewis
course now!

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen '09

Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth-Defending Liberty since 1844

Hillsdale
College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Keep this between the two of us...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3ici2--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ici2-1yk2b-4qqlpo0/)
---

_I’m sure you get a lot of emails, but this is so critically important. _

I’m going to let you in on a secret. It’s something I’ve picked up while traveling across the country over the past year.

See, 2021 was the year where Democrats showed America their true colors. We saw that they are uninterested in addressing the issues that really matter to hard working Americans. Instead, they only want to focus on their far-Left agenda dictated by people like AOC, Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren.

**But, things are about to change in a BIG way.**

2022 is going to be the year of the RED WAVE. The American people have seen ENOUGH from the radical Left, and they are ready to kick the Democrats out of power.

Nowhere is that more important than in the U.S. Senate. The current Senate is divided between 50 Republicans and 50 Democrats. Kamala Harris is the tie breaking vote. **[If Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ici2-1yk2c-4qqlpo1/ "Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks. ")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ici2-1yk2d-4qqlpo2/)
---

The momentum is on our side. The Red Wave is building, but we cannot take anything for granted.

**I’m a fighter, and I’m not going to stop fighting for what I believe in.** That’s what I learned at West Point and during my time serving in the Army. It’s exactly what I did as your Secretary of State. Now, I’m bringing that same fighting spirit to my mission to help Republicans retake control of the Senate.

**[That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ici2-1yk2e-4qqlpo3/ "That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?")**

When I served as President Trump’s CIA Director and Secretary of State, we showed that conservatives can actually deliver results for the American people. Now, we just need to put America First conservatives back in power, and your contribution can help me do just that.

---
| | [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ici2-1yk2f-4qqlpo4/)
---

**[We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ici2-1yk2g-4qqlpo5/ "We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED. ")**

With your help, we can change things in a BIG way and turn our country around.

Are you with me?

-Mike

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION** to **29910**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ici2-1yk2h-4qqlpo6/ "PompeoEmailFooter")
---

**A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO**

With the Freedom Fund, I am supporting candidates across America who will defend the freedoms and values that make America great. From Iowa to Texas to California, I’m supporting principled conservatives who we can count on to keep their promises and deliver results. But our efforts will only be successful if we have the financial resources necessary to counter the big bucks flowing into the Democrat campaigns.

**[If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.

](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ici2-1yk2i-4qqlpo7/ "If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.")**

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Why do they have to go after me like this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ilosrpq23ush0mqp9r1eqnn4l2u79bm6f18rj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1h60o34c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thjmlo76sj36qprddbmm5h34sr5cmqm2p1ke1i77db6e2qmadj0maq39cdkc4rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3aphkc2pm0ptmc5j3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
Target on my back

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj5rfmbaqglggo05u2j0pnmi6j7e1tsg7kt5jk5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1h60o34c3h2bs)
---

Friends,

I’m as nervous as a pig at a bacon contest about what’s going on in our country right now.

Open borders, 2nd amendment rights threatened, tax hikes that will cripple the economy... _The only thing that could happen now to put our country in more danger is an alien invasion and even THAT may be a safer bet at this point._

I’m reaching out to you because you know I always tell it how it is. And truth is, I’m in trouble. I’m in trouble because the Radical Left has put a target on my back for standing up to their double standards and cancel culture. I’m standing up to their tax hikes and complete disregard for our border security.

Here’s a secure link that only you will be able to access for a limited time. Please take advantage of this opportunity. **[CHIP IN HERE.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0mt854ap5ktmv0dkem7cgflhqps5sqqlnh56388_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1h60o34c3h2bs)**

With that being said, they’re putting every dollar they can behind attacking me and attacking your conservative values, so I need your help to fight back. Our April mid-month deadline just passed, and to be honest I’m embarrassed to tell you just how much the Democrats’ outraised us. **I desperately need your support to help us catch up as much as possible by midnight.**

Anything you can give before midnight means you’re doing everything possible to stop the radical Left from destroying our great nation by helping us hit our mid-month goal. I’m counting on you and the rest of the country is too.

Thank you and God Bless,

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zll5rb88mfmhsueb33k2jo32r6bbt1lso86lgja8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1h60o34c3h2bs)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Hillary Clinton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Peter--

Hillary Clinton colluded with Deep State jackboots to spy on Donald Trump.

**The Communist Democrats fear losing power in November and want to cover up their treason by expelling me from Congress.**

This is the fourth time hate America leftists poured millions into the effort to throw me out of Congress.

_The latest smear campaign involves spreading lies about how I am an "insurrectionist."_

Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and their Never Trump co-conspirators Adam Kinzinger and Liz Cheney know if a red wave sweeps an America First majority into power, the first order of business is dragging Crooked Hillary before Congress and forcing her to cough up answers about the scheme to spy on Donald Trump. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59657107:sshzRaHNq:m:1:2365227053:D77DB9BFF88C7D4E97F6408FC97F9F00:r) [_**CHIP IN TO HELP MTG FIGHT BACK**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59657107:sshzRaHNq:m:1:2365227053:D77DB9BFF88C7D4E97F6408FC97F9F00:r) **This is the fourth time Nancy Pelosi, George Soros, Hollywood liberals, Big Tech moguls, and woke corporate mobs tried to expel me from Congress.**

But this may be the most well-funded effort yet.

And with polls showing a red wave cresting towards November, Communist Democrats grow more desperate by the day.

That's why I need your help right away to fight back against Nancy Pelosi and her allies trying to kick me out of Congress.

**[Please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, or $50 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59657107:sshzRaHNq:m:1:2365227053:D77DB9BFF88C7D4E97F6408FC97F9F00:r).**

FIRST, this is the only way I can communicate with you.

**The Silicon Valley cartel nuked my Twitter account.**

Fake news media jackals lie about me every day and trash the America First movement and values I fight for.

My crime was standing for the people and not the politicians.

I fought for President Trump after Communist Democrats stole the presidential election.

**The elites in D.C. realized they couldn't control me, so the Democrats and Never Trump traitors tried to take me out.**

_With your help, I won that round._

But now, the Durham probe peeled back the lid on Hillary Clinton and her Deep State henchmen's treason against Donald Trump.

And when American First conservatives win the majority this November, I promise to stand on the front lines to expose the truth about the actual insurrection Hillary Clinton and the Deep State staged against Donald Trump.

**That's why Deep-pocketed big-money Democrat donors are pouring millions into an effort to expel me from Congress.**

And I need your help to fight back.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or $500 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59657107:sshzRaHNq:m:1:2365227053:D77DB9BFF88C7D4E97F6408FC97F9F00:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59657107:sshzRaHNq:m:1:2365227053:D77DB9BFF88C7D4E97F6408FC97F9F00:r) CNN and the rest of the fake news media lie about me 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

Big Tech censored.

Never Trump RINOs voted to kick me off committees.

**_But I will not back down._**

I was duly elected to Congress as a strong Republican woman who is determined to impeach Joe Biden and put an end to the socialist agenda of Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and Kamala Harris, and that's what I intend to do.

_And make no mistake_ - Joe Biden, Hillary Clinton, the fake news media, and the Deep State conspirators are terrified about me leading the fight in the next Congress to expose the coup they all plotted in plain sight against President Trump.

That's why big money Democrat donors like George Soros and Hollywood liberals are dead set on expelling me from Congress.

**I must fight back.**

I must have the resources to defend myself in the public sphere.

**[And I hope I can count on your to stand with me by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $1,000, or even $2,900 to my campaign and help me beat back this latest scheme to expel me from Congress](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59657107:sshzRaHNq:m:1:2365227053:D77DB9BFF88C7D4E97F6408FC97F9F00:r).**

Together I know you, and I can save America and stop Communism. [_**CHIP IN TO HELP MTG FIGHT BACK**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59657107:sshzRaHNq:m:1:2365227053:D77DB9BFF88C7D4E97F6408FC97F9F00:r) Sincerely,

Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59657107:sshzRaHNq:m:1:2365227053:D77DB9BFF88C7D4E97F6408FC97F9F00:r)

The Silicon Valley cartel nuked my Twitter account. Fake news media jackals lie about me every day and trash the America First movement and values I fight for. My crime was standing for the people and not the politicians. I fought for President Trump after Communist Democrats stole the presidential election. The elites in D.C. realized they couldn't control me, so the Democrats and Never Trump traitors tried to take me out. With your help, I won that round. But now, the Durham probe peeled back the lid on Hillary Clinton and her Deep State henchmen's treason against Donald Trump. And when American First conservatives win the majority this November, I promise to stand on the front lines to expose the truth about the actual insurrection Hillary Clinton and the Deep State staged against Donald Trump. That's why Deep-pocketed big-money Democrat donors are pouring millions into an effort to expel me from Congress. And I need your help to fight back. . CNN and the rest of the fake news media lie about me 24 hours a day, seven days a week. Big Tech censored. Never Trump RINOs voted to kick me off committees. But I will not back down. I was duly elected to Congress as a strong Republican woman who is determined to impeach Joe Biden and put an end to the socialist agenda of Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and Kamala Harris, and that's what I intend to do. And make no mistake - Joe Biden, Hillary Clinton, the fake news media, and the Deep State conspirators are terrified about me leading the fight in the next Congress to expose the coup they all plotted in plain sight against President Trump. That's why big money Democrat donors like George Soros and Hollywood liberals are dead set on expelling me from Congress. I must fight back. I must have the resources to defend myself in the public sphere. . Together I know you, and I can save America and stop Communism. Sincerely, Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA) Paid for by Greene for Congress. ** This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. body:
We Now Know What They Did In 2016 But What About 2020? The Durham Report has revealed devastating news about the Democratic Party and Establishment R
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3929496.3401.1.c73194dcae2f1e09838a93a48aab28b6) |
---
## We Now Know What They Did In 2016 But What About 2020?
---
The **Durham Report** has revealed devastating news about the _Democratic Party_ and _Establishment Republicans_. The **Clinton** campaign of 2016 _illegally_ spied upon **Donald J. Trump** (which we already knew prior to the Durham Report). Why did _Establishment Republicans_ like [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3929496.3402.1.c23ad1ebb1582d8a1669284189a22168) who sat on the **Intelligence Committee** refuse to do anything about this? Why did _Establishment Republicans_ like [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3929496.3403.1.048f63b8e81e6e9d7d5d269e192bdf95) do nothing about the Russian Collusion Hoax which was a byproduct of the illegal spying from the Clinton campaign? If Democrats did this in 2016 just imagine what they did 2020. Actually, we know this answer as well... **THEY STOLE THE 2020 ELECTION!** I have been and will continue to be the strongest and loudest voice when it comes to **Election Integrity** in _Oklahoma_. Without fair and legal elections, we no longer have a **FREE** country. I believe we need to do a few things to fix the current _corrupt election system_ :
* **Same Day Voting** \- It's election day not election season
* Voter ID _required_
* **Ban ALL machines** and go back to a hand count
* All _Absentee Ballots_ must be requested, then approved by the county election board and sent back by the deadline having been **notarized** Elections are **STATE ISSUES** , which means the state legislature must make the necessary changes. I want to encourage you to _call/email_ your state senators/representatives and demand **Election Integrity**. Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3929496.3404.1.46e80d3974c6198b16c6f35783380d5a), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3929496.3405.1.f4a2c8a1f3eb703169e3331ae2cf18d7), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3929496.3406.1.d1dba7e4fe3b8aa7ce977a0d840a1286), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3929496.3407.1.5ce0f680c1d91c75a5d621887e4855b7), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3929496.3408.1.0623fe2cce9ebee12154cfd94f17dc03)).

name: Vernon Jones for Congress
subject: Reminder: Candidate for Congress Vernon Jones signs U.S. Term Limits Pledge; Pledges to Serve Just Three Terms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vernon Jones for Congress JonesforGeorgia
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE February 14, 2022
PRESS CONTACT: [VERNONJONESPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM](mailto:GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
PRESS RELEASE: Candidate for Congress Vernon Jones signs U.S. Term Limits Pledge; Pledges to Serve Just Three Terms
---
Statement by U.S. Congressional Candidate & former State Rep.Vernon Jones (R)
---
| |
---
---
|
---
| Athens (02/14/2022): Today, former State Representative and Trump-endorsed candidate for Georgia's 10th Congressional District Vernon Jones announced his support for Congressional TERM LIMITS by signing the U.S. Term Limits Pledge and by personally pledging himself to serve just three terms.
"In recent years, Congress has become less of what our founding fathers intended and more so of a retirement home. Conservatism and courage has been replaced by cronyism and corruption. It's no wonder a majority of Americans support congressional term limits", Jones remarked.
"I'm not going to Washington to wine and dine, then die. I'm going to Washington to serve, fight the Left, become Nancy Pelosi's worst nightmare, then come back home. To God's country, far and away from the Swamp.", Jones continued.
"I encourage my opponents to make the same pledge, and let the good people of the 10th know where they stand", Jones added.

---
| |
---
About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Conservative Democrat, Jones officially switched parties after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and delivering a keynote address at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running to defeat the radical left, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia First and Take Georgia Back.
---
|
---

Peter, did you get my message?

In 2018, we made history when I became the first Black woman ever to be elected to hold a statewide office in New York. **And now, we have the opportunity to make history again by getting me re-elected.**

I need the support of fearless fighters like you to get through the critical months ahead, but I just pulled your supporter record, and it looks like you haven’t had the chance to give to my February mid-month fundraiser yet.
**We’re only $793 short of our goal to raise $10,000 before midnight, so please, will you take a moment right now to donate $10 or $20 to my re-election campaign? With your help, we can make history again.

We have another huge stop on the Great American Comeback Tour in Milton! Please join me and my team on March 9th at 5:30 p.m. at Olde Blinde Dog (12650 Crabapple Road, Milton, Georgia 30004).
We look forward to seeing you then to share our vision to deliver the great comeback to retake America! Spacing is limited so please RSVP to [finance@jakeevans.org](mailto:finance@jakeevans.org). We look forward to seeing you soon.

| | | Fellow Conservative,

Did you miss Marco Rubio’s email on Wednesday?

He and I are trying to make one thing very clear to you: **Chuck Schumer’s cronies are working day and night to defeat state legislators in battleground races across the country. **

_If they succeed, EVERYTHING is at risk._

**State Republicans just FELL SHORT of the major goal yesterday. This was about to set them back months, but I’ve come up with a 2 step plan for them to reach their goal.**
1.) **The deadline is now extended for 24 hours.**
2.) **The prior 3X MATCH is now increased to a 5X MATCH.**
**This plan will ONLY work, though, if every patriot reading this chips in $25 right now.** If everyone follows along with this plan, State Republicans and Trump Allies will just BARELY reach their goal!

**[So, can I count on you?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3id1p-1ykhn-4qqlpo3/ "So, can I count on you?")**

Democrats are currently launching vicious attacks against State Republicans in CRITICAL battleground states across the country, Fellow Conservative, and if they don’t have the funds to fight back, they won’t stand a chance in November.

If every single grassroots supporter steps up right now, then Democrats lose.

---

---

Please, step up today, Fellow Conservative. The only thing standing between total defeat for President Trump’s State Allies and victory in November is YOU!

Thank you,
U.S. Senator Marsha Blackburn

**We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. State Republicans currently hold:** **62 of 99 state legislative chambers** **26 of 45 lieutenant governor seats** **27 of 50 secretary of state offices** **11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials** **Thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.**

This solicitation seeks only funds that comply with the contribution limits and source prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from individuals in excess of $2,900 and contributions from corporations will not be accepted.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Imani Oakley
subject: We deserve better, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

I grew up living the same struggles as so many people in our country. I’ve struggled with housing insecurity, lack of access to healthcare, and an unjust system that doesn’t value our voices or our lives.
Early on, I realized that, if no one would stand up for people like me, then I would have to do it for myself. So I got to work.

For years, I’ve worked as a political organizer, advocating for those of us who’ve been cut out of the political system and left behind by leaders like Rep. Donald Payne Jr.

And this month, when Congress failed to extend the eviction moratorium, I took my fight to Capitol Hill, fighting alongside Cori Bush to protect families from eviction. While we stood up for housing justice, my opponent was nowhere to be found.

I’m running for Congress to do what leaders like Rep. Payne won’t — to fight for those who’ve been ignored and cut out of the process for generations. If you’re with me, please click here to personally endorse my campaign and make a contribution today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/crqWZocZkUqZxImmJfejoQ2]

My opponent takes money from corporate PACs run by polluters and pharmaceutical companies that don’t care about our community.

Rep. Payne serves those special interests, not us. We deserve better.

I know what it’s like to be left behind by those in power. That’s why I’m fighting to bring down failed leaders like Rep. Payne, take on New Jersey’s corrupt political machine, and give people like you and me a real, progressive voice in our government.

Today, I’m asking for your support, Peter. Please click here to personally endorse my campaign and make a contribution to help us build our grassroots movement. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/crqWZocZkUqZxImmJfejoQ2]

With Gratitude,
Imani

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/footer-e?refcode=augustwelcome]

Paid for by Oakley for Congress
Oakley for Congress
PO Box 1181
Montclair, NJ 07042
United States

body:
Fair Fight Action has big plans for 2022

Fair Fight |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41863848/330657295/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2U5YzQ0OS0zZDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnkCbepdCn02loURQrryCiQdd0QYI4aTl4oF4WJwyw=&emci=eafe7921-398f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ace9c449-3d8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, If you are feeling frustrated about continued efforts to undermine democracy, you are not alone. Despite the fact that Congress failed to deliver voting rights legislation last month, Fair Fight Action remains strong and focused—focused on breaking down barriers to voting across the nation and mitigating voter suppression. We are resolute in our commitment to making voting accessible for all eligible voters. **[As our democracy hangs in the balance, the work that Fair Fight Action does is more important than ever. Will you donate today and help support our efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41863849/330657296/354838442?refcode=02162022&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2U5YzQ0OS0zZDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnkCbepdCn02loURQrryCiQdd0QYI4aTl4oF4WJwyw=)** There is no time to waste. Fair Fight Action is working closely with allies and advocates to mitigate the impact of anti-voter legislative proposals by stopping, slowing down, and making legislation less harmful to voters and democracy whenever possible. We are working to expand voter protection programs around the country, and monitoring legislation in key states like:
* Georgia - In Georgia, legislation has been introduced that would completely ban drop boxes, allow for the release of ballot images to the public without a court order, and impose unnecessary, burdensome administrative processes on election officials which would further expose them to threats, harassments, and burgeoning conspiracy theories.
* New Hampshire - In New Hampshire, legislation has been introduced that would allow individual voters to act as vigilantes of election administration by suing for the removal of election officials, facilitate poll watcher intimidation of voters, and limit same day registration.
* Florida - In Florida, the Senate introduced legislation to create an Office of Election Crimes and Security, which would create a new law enforcement branch to monitor elections, increase the Governor’s authority to investigate violations of election law, and increase criminal penalties.

**The work that Fair Fight Action does is more important than ever.** [**Can you donate to help supercharge our efforts? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41863850/330657297/354838442?refcode=02162022&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2U5YzQ0OS0zZDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnkCbepdCn02loURQrryCiQdd0QYI4aTl4oF4WJwyw=) This year we will continue to lead the fight for equal and accessible voting for ALL eligible Americans. We won’t give up, because our democracy depends on it. [**Join our fight**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41863851/330657298/354838442?refcode=02162022&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2U5YzQ0OS0zZDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnkCbepdCn02loURQrryCiQdd0QYI4aTl4oF4WJwyw=) In solidarity,

Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Thank you in advance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hello —

I’m about to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our mid-quarter FEC fundraising deadline ends at midnight. Can you give me a moment to explain why this request is so important to our campaign? Thank you in advance.

Every three months, candidates for federal office are legally required to report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. It’s a way of ensuring transparency in our elections. Our public FEC report will show the amount of money we raise, but most importantly, the number of people who have contributed to help.

We are halfway through the first financial quarter of this critical election year, and I’ll just be frank with you: donations have slowed down significantly. Over the past few days, fewer people have been opening these messages, and even fewer are pitching in.

Look, I’ll be the first to admit — these fundraising emails can be a bit pesky sometimes. But the responses we get to our messages are important to this campaign’s success. Grassroots contributions of $10, $25, or even $50 add up pretty quickly, and they allow us to collect the resources we need to flip Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat.

Right now, this race is a dead heat, but the most recent head-to-head poll shows I’m the only Democrat who is leading Ron Johnson. Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control, but it's going to take a lot of work — and a whole lot of dollars — to take on the Republicans and win. That’s why I have to ask:

**Will you add a contribution of any amount to my campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin before our mid-FEC deadline expires at midnight? If each and every person reading this email can chip in just a few dollars, we can get back on track for our goals. clean_body: Hello — I’m about to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our mid-quarter FEC fundraising deadline ends at midnight. Can you give me a moment to explain why this request is so important to our campaign? Thank you in advance. Every three months, candidates for federal office are legally required to report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. It’s a way of ensuring transparency in our elections. Our public FEC report will show the amount of money we raise, but most importantly, the number of people who have contributed to help. We are halfway through the first financial quarter of this critical election year, and I’ll just be frank with you: donations have slowed down significantly. Over the past few days, fewer people have been opening these messages, and even fewer are pitching in. Look, I’ll be the first to admit — these fundraising emails can be a bit pesky sometimes. But the responses we get to our messages are important to this campaign’s success. Grassroots contributions of $10, $25, or even $50 add up pretty quickly, and they allow us to collect the resources we need to flip Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat. Right now, this race is a dead heat, but the most recent head-to-head poll shows I’m the only Democrat who is leading Ron Johnson. Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control, but it's going to take a lot of work — and a whole lot of dollars — to take on the Republicans and win. That’s why I have to ask: Will you add a contribution of any amount to my campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin before our mid-FEC deadline expires at midnight? If each and every person reading this email can chip in just a few dollars, we can get back on track for our goals. I need your help — chip in right here if you can: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Ours is a campaign powered by a lot of folks just like you who are standing up for what’s right, not the corporate PACs that are already more than well-represented in Washington. That’s why we’re not taking a dime from them, and why I’m relying on you ahead of tonight’s important deadline. Thanks for reading, and thanks for all you do. Onward! name: Peter Franchot
subject: My plan for jobs and infrastructure
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
Our working families and small businesses have been financially decimated by this pandemic. As we look ahead to our continuing recovery, it is not enough to return to the status quo – we must build back our economy even stronger than before. If I’m blessed to be Maryland’s next Governor, that’s precisely what I will do.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/h51J8i_9GkCA0r0PkQLslQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/h51J8i_9GkCA0r0PkQLslQ2]ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU AGREE: I support Peter’s plan to create 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/h51J8i_9GkCA0r0PkQLslQ2]
In my first 100 weeks, I’ll create 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future. I’ll achieve this through three major strategies:
1.
I’ll
make
strategic
investments
in
major
21st
century
infrastructure
projects
like
statewide
5G
and
high-speed
broadband,
world-class
public
transportation,
and
renewable
energy
infrastructure.
2.
I’ll
create
a
statewide
jobs
training
program
in
partnership
with
the
private
sector
and
unions
that
helps
place
job
seekers
in
these
emerging
opportunities.
3.
I’ll
dramatically
improve
the
operating
environment
for
small
businesses
by
ensuring
they
have
better
access
to
capital,
cutting
the
bureaucratic
red
tape,
and
prioritizing
the
allocation
of
state
contracts
to
small
businesses
where
possible.
Infrastructure is a major part of my vision for Maryland’s future. By making critical investments in broadband, transportation, and renewable energy, we can improve our state’s economic competitiveness while also protecting and restoring the environment. Climate change is the greatest existential threat to our way of life – which is why we must make the transition to a new, green economy that allows for sustainable growth in the decades to come.
These new infrastructure projects will also create good-paying jobs that offer health care, retirement benefits, and pathways to home ownership. Additionally, they’ll create downstream economic growth stemming from dense, transit-oriented development, a nation-leading embrace of renewable energy, and entrepreneur-friendly services like statewide 5G.
I’ll also make sure the State leverages our existing assets to the fullest extent. I’ll resource and expand the Maryland Port Administration’s Vision 2025 Plan to ensure that state-of-the-art facilities give the Port of Baltimore the competitive edge it needs to fuel the region’s economic growth.
If you want to help me shore up Maryland’s economy for the 21st century, then add your name to sign on to my plan as a Citizen Co-Sponsor. Together, we’re going to build a stronger and brighter future for Maryland’s communities. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/h51J8i_9GkCA0r0PkQLslQ2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

I’ll dramatically improve the operating environment for small businesses by ensuring they have better access to capital, cutting the bureaucratic red tape, and prioritizing the allocation of state contracts to small businesses where possible. Infrastructure is a major part of my vision for Maryland’s future. By making critical investments in broadband, transportation, and renewable energy, we can improve our state’s economic competitiveness while also protecting and restoring the environment. I’ll also make sure the State leverages our existing assets to the fullest extent. I’ll resource and expand the Maryland Port Administration’s Vision 2025 Plan to ensure that state-of-the-art facilities give the Port of Baltimore the competitive edge it needs to fuel the region’s economic growth. If you want to help me shore up Maryland’s economy for the 21st century, then add your name to sign on to my plan as a Citizen Co-Sponsor. name: Pat Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: Foxes in the henhouse.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

There are foxes in the henhouse — and they're foxes we elected here in Pennsylvania.

Far too many people in office took active part in the Jan. 6 insurrection to overturn a fair election, sow doubt in our democracy, and create chaos in our government.

For instance, Rep. Scott “the Insurrectionist” Perry. Just last month, he refused to speak with the House panel investigating the insurrection, even though he and other congressional Republicans met with Trump before the violent attack on the Capitol — and on Perry's colleagues! — to figure out how they could block the electoral count.

And just this week, we got new info on even more ways Trump, Perry, and others subverted democracy. There was a gap in Trump's phone calls on the day of the insurrection — when he spoke with House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy and Sen. Tommy Tuberville of Alabama.

We need to hold these insurrectionists who tried to overthrow the government — WHICH EMPLOYS THEM — accountable for their actions on Jan. 6.

Click here to DEMAND that these investigations stay active and effective. We deserve better from the people we elect to serve us.

SEND A MESSAGE
https://keystoneprogressaction.com/make-them-accountable/

Let's keep up the fight!

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

body:

il?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022feb16hf
Friend — California has a mask mandate, but dozens of rich
celebrities ignored it on Super Bowl Sunday.

If they’re allowed to
return to normal, everyone else should be able to as well.

But the
only way to ensure that happens is for Republicans to win across the
country in November.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/maskless-hypocrites-emai
l?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022feb16hf Will you
pitch in now to help make that happen?

Democrats are the party of
permanent mandates and lockdowns. Their celebrity donors think your
kids should wear a mask 24/7... but they’ve got no problem breaking the
rules themselves at a football game.

The hysteria and hypocrisy need
to end. And they will if Republicans take back the U.S. Senate and
House in November.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/maskless-hypocrites-emai
l?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022feb16hf I hope
you’ll chip in here to send these woke celebrities a message, and to
help ensure Republicans have what it takes to win.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/maskless-hypocrites-emai
l?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022feb16hf Senator
Roger Marshall
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/maskless-hypocrites-emai
l?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022feb16hf DONATE NOW »
 https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email-footer
?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022feb16hf Keep reading
for a personal message from Doc:

Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate
to defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith.
And that's exactly what I'm doing.

But I can't keep up the fight
without your help. We're facing an onslaught from the woke left, and
Democrats across the country are raising millions to keep their power.
I'm not about to back down, but I need you standing with me. If
you're able, I hope you'll chip in below. Taking back the Senate in
2022 depends on patriots like you standing with us.

-Senator Roger
Marshall

| | **ICYMI:** We put up a new billboard EXPOSING Ron Johnson for dismissing the need for good paying union jobs to come to Wisconsin — claiming “It’s not like we don't have enough jobs here in Wisconsin.”
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41870113/330673007/29510730?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220216_1_1&refcode2=3513e67f-468f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTEzZTY3Zi00NjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9SJVLThbNrzeIPCec8UZ3lERBLlKtNZz7ohfFLFcs9k=)

**And thanks to your support, we’ve been able to leave it up in Oshkosh,_right near his mansion_.** Our campaign is completely funded by grassroots supporters, so this is only possible because of people like you.

No elected representative should sit up in Washington collecting donor checks while not lifting a finger to create jobs in their hometown. The people of Wisconsin deserve better than Ron Johnson — and together, we are building a movement that can take him on and win this November.

[If you want us to continue to hold Ron Johnson accountable and expose him for the useless Senator that he is, please support our campaign. Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. name: Ashley & Carley Sisolak
subject: can you recognize this guy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
Hi there — do you recognize the guy in this photo? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41870754/330674529/-1561074788?refcode=email_02162022_ashleysisolak&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2ExYmY1OS00ODhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-l-liFJiOdAqkBwTL7qkEoX_8gCilkjDw2CW6w4UbY=) **That’s our dad, Gov. Steve Sisolak!** You might not know this, but Dad came to Nevada because he saw the opportunity to put down roots, build a successful business from scratch, and provide a wonderful community for us. It’s so clear to us that the qualities that have made him such a great father are also what make him a great governor. Dad’s commitment to making Nevada a place of opportunity for _**everyone**_ is why he’s worked so hard to lift up working families, increase public school funding, raise the minimum wage, and make sure every eligible Nevadan can exercise their right to vote. [**But here’s the thing, folks: Republicans are attacking Dad with everything they’ve got. This is looking like a neck-and-neck race, and if our dad is going to hold onto this seat and keep making progress for Nevada, he needs your help. ---
| | Team, Caucus season is in full swing here in Massachusetts. Turning out supporters is the first major test of our grassroots movement, and that means we need as many supporters as possible to attend and win their local caucuses to get Sonia on the ballot. The good news is: It’s easy to get involved. Anyone can run to be a delegate for Sonia at their local caucus — and it’s one of the most impactful ways to support our campaign right now, but if you can only commit to attending and supporting Sonia, that’s helpful too. [**Can I count on you to caucus for Sonia?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41871083/330676695/-1186574251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ0NThlMC00OThmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uzSjlieLJm4jfej4Ge1s3cfGfhinirmDhiUb4hBuIf0=&emci=539273d9-3c8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8ed458e0-498f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684840) This race will be won by the campaign that harnesses the most organizing power, and we know that can be us. We can make it clear that Sonia has a grassroots movement behind her fighting for real change and put this campaign in the best possible position for the primary. clean_body: This race will be won by the campaign that harnesses the most organizing power. | | | | | Team, Caucus season is in full swing here in Massachusetts. Turning out supporters is the first major test of our grassroots movement, and that means we need as many supporters as possible to attend and win their local caucuses to get Sonia on the ballot. The good news is: It’s easy to get involved. Anyone can run to be a delegate for Sonia at their local caucus — and it’s one of the most impactful ways to support our campaign right now, but if you can only commit to attending and supporting Sonia, that’s helpful too. This race will be won by the campaign that harnesses the most organizing power, and we know that can be us. We can make it clear that Sonia has a grassroots movement behind her fighting for real change and put this campaign in the best possible position for the primary. | | Do your clothes smell like your job, Peter? The first time I realized my socio-economic status was when I started working at Chi Chi’s in Timonium. Whenever I got off work, I smelled distinctly of burritos. There was nothing that as a young adult could have prepared me for the way other people were judging me and assessing my worth based on what they assumed my job to be. Even though, at the time, I was working at Chi Chi’s to put myself through a rigorous MBA program. Chi Chi’s paid me minimum wage – and if I were still working there, I wouldn’t be able to afford a one bedroom apartment anywhere in the city. I could barely afford it at that time. Housing costs are rising, yet wages are stagnant. Food industry workers were considered essential workers during the first wave of the pandemic, yet most received no hazard pay. **Regardless of where you work, you should be able to make a dignified, living wage in safe conditions.** As Governor I’ll fight for increasing the minimum wage to that of a living wage. **[If you’re with me, will you chip in $12.50 – the minimum wage in Maryland – to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41871105/330676720/902423312?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220216_FR_ChiChis_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=12.50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQ0NThlMC00OThmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELZdIhGcWYgaU9Ez3KP2lWziKwPdUHvqgCqp7O4Ngf0=)** | | | [Chip in $12.50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41871106/330676721/902423312?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220216_FR_ChiChis_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=12.50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQ0NThlMC00OThmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELZdIhGcWYgaU9Ez3KP2lWziKwPdUHvqgCqp7O4Ngf0=)

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | By Authority: Laura Neuman for Governor, Carlton G. Epps Sr., Treasurer Laura Neuman for Governor PO Box 806 Baltimore, MD 21203

name: Greater Georgia
subject: Greater Georgia Newsletter – Feb. 16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dMxkIKMPgzhuO_Ox79kCRR2yVPt3np8wQSLwvvRxBgJofMjNzvjMINbYR6_03VscdK82zPzsfR_yBGdznObUtKPzdH4_0FTpPNATq6kGeoQZRxjbHknCa33hhIJR4FXdylaNtiunuFWsPqUp9mcNUg==&c=JfIQXSkCLlDTbzsnv3zK4-lrtsekddNjI0ja94VeV93dS7s3lt-_zw==&ch=JVxRV8qL8QBIbp2dv1IoFLG0yeonYsPey5V6uUXaHZ2MY6Cc0Bs_jw==)
---
| As we enter the 2022 election cycle, it is vitally important that we have transparency and accountability in our system. As part of our mission, Greater Georgia is working hard to ensure elected officials are addressing the concerns of Georgians and doing everything they can to secure our system and restore voter confidence.
Unfortunately, this goal was undermined when the Secretary of State announced that his office [awarded](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dMxkIKMPgzhuO_Ox79kCRR2yVPt3np8wQSLwvvRxBgJofMjNzvjMIG1qDWQf8KMlaC7NO5Tef2LWZNP4_NxY9it5UAcslNr_FF1UTixCnLUpd2ma9BRDD9z7Q962fBew-VP-UVSgPOqWwP9aCSug-uRVcwjFK-NBDEORxbEBxp5Fl_opf6D8hNdPwDw8g8-_oar70IK3oJFTRhaDl7fJEvemPMvRB_9B1xLSpn6E5OvK6zLn5FAzUt02cisD2-VkPwcJAyO_7REKB4UK9i3UzMze8Y4Y4XOr&c=JfIQXSkCLlDTbzsnv3zK4-lrtsekddNjI0ja94VeV93dS7s3lt-_zw==&ch=JVxRV8qL8QBIbp2dv1IoFLG0yeonYsPey5V6uUXaHZ2MY6Cc0Bs_jw==) a $3.5-million no-bid contract for voter registration software to a vendor with a [history](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dMxkIKMPgzhuO_Ox79kCRR2yVPt3np8wQSLwvvRxBgJofMjNzvjMIG1qDWQf8KMlIOpFn3nLTyLZQ9QALac6hMuivtwLCn14vrvys6NDybpr6OXdKTMx3AZ7ZLMbb3GFN27r4s0GpyHWnnDbXqLxlAXToMu58kVoPi2b9QzEkuruUWQGGRv3YSomlZfZ8YAy&c=JfIQXSkCLlDTbzsnv3zK4-lrtsekddNjI0ja94VeV93dS7s3lt-_zw==&ch=JVxRV8qL8QBIbp2dv1IoFLG0yeonYsPey5V6uUXaHZ2MY6Cc0Bs_jw==) of opposing the very election laws they would be tasked with upholding.
While Sec. Raffensperger thinks that this closed-door deal is acceptable, Greater Georgia does not. We were on the frontlines of this revelation, exposing the lack of transparency and pushing for accountability immediately.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dMxkIKMPgzhuO_Ox79kCRR2yVPt3np8wQSLwvvRxBgJofMjNzvjMIN39Gq-JQfBiG2iKC53aTRm5MWKFF3rNA-WrmXSRLZJ4Nl_rWEd8ZYDEHy3i-PskBjyigWzYG4ArnssUzLCWPSE4p6zYrnQCGNd0SYwKdB2_3awsFdYNpGANW_61H4-Ro5F-2csegpasrvxH3JOKvweKVQ_Hz5Ti0nGnNDhgYqUI-VPMpR-3vpo=&c=JfIQXSkCLlDTbzsnv3zK4-lrtsekddNjI0ja94VeV93dS7s3lt-_zw==&ch=JVxRV8qL8QBIbp2dv1IoFLG0yeonYsPey5V6uUXaHZ2MY6Cc0Bs_jw==) to read our statement.
---
| | |
---
| Additionally, our chairwoman Kelly Loeffler recently unveiled a [new personal website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dMxkIKMPgzhuO_Ox79kCRR2yVPt3np8wQSLwvvRxBgJofMjNzvjMIN39Gq-JQfBipDe3Ae5yY83rpRZJCyTzm_kxnkt_FMtj6V5bpW2OalI79jz7sPqg51DkNvtZuISXlV1EljV3VCqslLHfi8ueAw==&c=JfIQXSkCLlDTbzsnv3zK4-lrtsekddNjI0ja94VeV93dS7s3lt-_zw==&ch=JVxRV8qL8QBIbp2dv1IoFLG0yeonYsPey5V6uUXaHZ2MY6Cc0Bs_jw==) to share her journey from the farm, to the business world, to the U.S. Senate - and to highlight her important work with Greater Georgia.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dMxkIKMPgzhuO_Ox79kCRR2yVPt3np8wQSLwvvRxBgJofMjNzvjMIN39Gq-JQfBipDe3Ae5yY83rpRZJCyTzm_kxnkt_FMtj6V5bpW2OalI79jz7sPqg51DkNvtZuISXlV1EljV3VCqslLHfi8ueAw==&c=JfIQXSkCLlDTbzsnv3zK4-lrtsekddNjI0ja94VeV93dS7s3lt-_zw==&ch=JVxRV8qL8QBIbp2dv1IoFLG0yeonYsPey5V6uUXaHZ2MY6Cc0Bs_jw==) to learn more about her story.
---
| | |
---
| Greater Georgia's work is critical to defending conservative values, and it will only be possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers.
We need your help! -- Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dMxkIKMPgzhuO_Ox79kCRR2yVPt3np8wQSLwvvRxBgJofMjNzvjMIFYle4rk5tj8tN1fxFeRcT-u0jwQGY4YENPFuZW3wEgNoVbeenIASslHTkK4d0k7ij4xElUMyttUBz40-oL89eb70mM_czQ6nDe5XAQtGNHKCV0OBUmThks=&c=JfIQXSkCLlDTbzsnv3zK4-lrtsekddNjI0ja94VeV93dS7s3lt-_zw==&ch=JVxRV8qL8QBIbp2dv1IoFLG0yeonYsPey5V6uUXaHZ2MY6Cc0Bs_jw==) or the button below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values.

| INTERNSHIP PROGRAM
Greater Georgia has officially launched an [internship program](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dMxkIKMPgzhuO_Ox79kCRR2yVPt3np8wQSLwvvRxBgJofMjNzvjMID9xtDQNmoUxWEl3LwPS-tiWVvgMlqtRxvpB33PyKu0ecqVr9GWZazK1AmpzPk07RYaxZj9EqRIrJQBQyo_LM7N4yj-H8P1pxkFeLnq7IoqIAcNjS3jyuyo=&c=JfIQXSkCLlDTbzsnv3zK4-lrtsekddNjI0ja94VeV93dS7s3lt-_zw==&ch=JVxRV8qL8QBIbp2dv1IoFLG0yeonYsPey5V6uUXaHZ2MY6Cc0Bs_jw==)! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress.
If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at [terry@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:terry@greatergeorgia.com) with questions or to submit a completed application.
The full internship application can be found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dMxkIKMPgzhuO_Ox79kCRR2yVPt3np8wQSLwvvRxBgJofMjNzvjMIGpV8MFSp6mrEVz_ZT6IuPl3-ignxaRJ4__bwGbYvhyYW2aT6NEtttwbbupZjWy1jGynLuDbbwtsy6QTxTT4emVVVsT8nk9Cg44GsMjHj_5atudh9NuO_T60hENGngwNQ1oyIQti9hqQdp6IRWOFt_CEKa_kKq3HVI79bQfbTR6p1XMxVKD3rRo=&c=JfIQXSkCLlDTbzsnv3zK4-lrtsekddNjI0ja94VeV93dS7s3lt-_zw==&ch=JVxRV8qL8QBIbp2dv1IoFLG0yeonYsPey5V6uUXaHZ2MY6Cc0Bs_jw==).

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == | As we enter the 2022 election cycle, it is vitally important that we have transparency and accountability in our system. As part of our mission, Greater Georgia is working hard to ensure elected officials are addressing the concerns of Georgians and doing everything they can to secure our system and restore voter confidence. Unfortunately, this goal was undermined when the Secretary of State announced that his office == a $3.5-million no-bid contract for voter registration software to a vendor with a == of opposing the very election laws they would be tasked with upholding. While Sec. Raffensperger thinks that this closed-door deal is acceptable, Greater Georgia does not. We were on the frontlines of this revelation, exposing the lack of transparency and pushing for accountability immediately. Click == to read our statement. | | | | Additionally, our chairwoman Kelly Loeffler recently unveiled a == to share her journey from the farm, to the business world, to the U.S. Senate - and to highlight her important work with Greater Georgia. ---
Peter,

We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof:

| "**Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats** fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, **the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign.** " _- The Hill, 2/9/2022_
---

Many of Hollywood's top celebrity activists are funneling thousands of dollars each into the campaign account of our opponent.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8f9b0771c15643679d0ccad42311a1b3&_e=WwFkckzVtusldM3gvHY3FF8YGOSKnUD5_F2-QVVuUMgqRFphBtS4S5U_W8IrN--X5rm0EZ4ZXauBj5WVVZ-d_jh7OhbAKOu2zB3V0trGOu6-Q3pyz-DLuM1U8mNeRLHbVdu5QvrAjc24dzOJJB2x8Fj2l-xWdia4Unx5Bgd7FsA9Rk2SZy9eB1oiMkS1eDy_e8VOCEGzSIl1nn5fU5QFEtFu84LNDGMquT18AQSsJ2mgvq-QvacLBvaZM26THD3FKzQ3KRhMdVvHLq7AI8bUofuoes6W2hBk4LHnnjlM7YnUR_zG2jv8lnp1uDBeS7KQ6DfYAvkrqC-SQ4xZJHlexRx3ICRde7GCbaU9aqt_a8gaL8oCHSjG8VhlJMqU2kANkaB9zdtNj0HXnsKT7RtzQTSGwuLWstYhAIqCfMDsRyc9L1AnrW_qCzPZJT3oRjIhCYMeRgnyoobSIv06YVu__HtUow4ghwOixbQS7nlMXDk%3D)
**It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race.** More deep-pocketed Hollywood celebrities are going to send max-out contributions with the intent of keeping their favorite Democrat in the Senate.

**_[Here is our ask of you today: will you chip in $7 today to help us offset Hollywood's support of our opponent?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8f9b0771c15643679d0ccad42311a1b3&_e=WwFkckzVtusldM3gvHY3FF8YGOSKnUD5_F2-QVVuUMgqRFphBtS4S5U_W8IrN--X5rm0EZ4ZXauBj5WVVZ-d_jh7OhbAKOu2zB3V0trGOu6-Q3pyz-DLuM1U8mNeRLHbVdu5QvrAjc24dzOJJB2x8Fj2l-xWdia4Unx5Bgd7FsA9Rk2SZy9eB1oiMkS1eDy_e8VOCEGzSIl1nn5fU5QFEtFu84LNDGMquT18AQSsJ2mgvq-QvacLBvaZM26THD3Fncgdq4jUYNmZQ3xspM8sd1s-rjG5rlf0Vi9sUO3z7Xvfo35y3Vxx_PJPeXhWyLLbDp2o7F2jb9CJoC5sqkrIHxldQJQPkDWnJYADpvmqg1OYT26yqeINYf311riRRHYAPLET11g32ge6wOcXsLrVWSAqsw0_98-T4eqvjTkmlZxtFEs4WFiRQnZVg3KzHXx_iBvuZZUGQ3XdROu-KEyurORTNurNxusGWNOI_bsbt0A%3D)_**

**We've set a goal of raising an additional $35,000 before midnight tonight and could use your help.**

Hi Chorus,
Taylor here. Our campaign is growing and I couldn’t be more excited. The reality is, we have about 3 months (90ish days!!!) to build and execute a winning congressional campaign — so we have no time to lose.
We have another $14,600 to raise to stay on track with our hiring plans and to be frank, we’re falling short...
Can I count on you to give $20 (or whatever you can) to help support our campaign before our deadline tonight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_staffing?refcode=02162022_Midmonth_FR_2&amount=20]

Thank you for your support,
Taylor Bollhagen
Campaign Manager
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 6th congressional district. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.

| We want to make sure you saw Dan’s email for you. He’s fighting for us everyday in Congress and needs your help to keep it that way.

Will you chip in $15 now to stand with Dan as he faces his toughest reelection ever?

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/feb22-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41872279/330681521/1546385125?amount=15&contactdata=KRZRnel67H%2B9So25mkWGZe6W1zMux%2FKSM13%2BfL0uUahNIUGIRV4%2BlSE8hQhZFpOawMhlSeuNkMywjkrW4IzdX9o%2FJVdLT47i6sc%2BzL3tadLJFAFmlPkhANp6Ot4E1eB3Bzu2C6YhfWG%2Ftu3lhDwo%2Bw%3D%3D&refcode2=5a5dfa42-4b8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220216_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTVkZmE0Mi00YjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y7e_sS76QBR_NQ8kJnojUF2ojyNrBUZOGyAWxi7GbEk=)**
* * *
**_Dan’s Original Message:_**

I ran for Congress to represent my home community and work for the people of mid-Michigan. I grew up in Flint and was inspired to get involved in public service from a young age.

Before being elected to Congress, I created the Genesee County Land Bank, which helps generate local economic development, strengthen neighborhoods and reduce crime by redeveloping thousands of buildings. I also founded the Center for Community Progress, a national non-profit organization focused on attracting jobs and investment in older, industrial communities like ours.

**Serving my community is what I’ve always strived to do — and serving as your representative in Congress continues to be the biggest honor of my life.**

**Here’s the truth:** I’ve fought hard for the people of mid-Michigan — working to bring good-paying jobs here, rebuild our infrastructure, lower the costs of prescription drugs and ensure clean drinking water for all. I want to keep making progress for my constituents.

**But we’re up against a lot this November — because of redistricting, we’re running in a competitive, Republican-leaning district that is one of only a handful of races that will determine control of Congress. This will be my toughest race yet.**

**[I am going to need all hands on deck to win. My team and I have set regular fundraising goals to make sure we have the resources we need to win in November and right now I need to raise another $7,000 by digital to stay on track. **I can’t keep fighting for Michiganders in Congress without your support. This seat will determine control of Congress, putting all the progress we’ve made at risk. I need you with me now. Please donate today:

Will you chip in $15 now to stand with Dan as he faces his toughest reelection ever? = Dan’s Original Message: I ran for Congress to represent my home community and work for the people of mid-Michigan. I grew up in Flint and was inspired to get involved in public service from a young age. Before being elected to Congress, I created the Genesee County Land Bank, which helps generate local economic development, strengthen neighborhoods and reduce crime by redeveloping thousands of buildings. I also founded the Center for Community Progress, a national non-profit organization focused on attracting jobs and investment in older, industrial communities like ours. Serving my community is what I’ve always strived to do — and serving as your representative in Congress continues to be the biggest honor of my life. Here’s the truth: I’ve fought hard for the people of mid-Michigan — working to bring good-paying jobs here, rebuild our infrastructure, lower the costs of prescription drugs and ensure clean drinking water for all. I want to keep making progress for my constituents. But we’re up against a lot this November — because of redistricting, we’re running in a competitive, Republican-leaning district that is one of only a handful of races that will determine control of Congress. This will be my toughest race yet. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly = = = = = National Republicans have added our race to their top target list and are already spending money to run misleading ads against me. President Biden won my current district (before redistricting) by just 8,000 votes, so it will only be tougher this time. I can’t keep fighting for Michiganders in Congress without your support. This seat will determine control of Congress, putting all the progress we’ve made at risk. I need you with me now. Please donate today: = Thanks for all you do, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Not Complicated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Patriot:

This isn't complicated. The American people want safe streets, affordable gas and groceries, a secure border, respect abroad, and freedom at home.
Instead, Joe Biden has delivered:

▶︎ Record crime;▶︎ Record inflation;▶︎ Chaos on the border;▶︎ The Afghanistan debacle; and▶︎ Dr. Fauci making up "the science" as he goes.

Democrats act as though liberty and the rule of law are mysteries, dreams never accomplished by mankind. When in fact, Americans enjoyed them just a year ago. President Trump may have been unorthodox. He may have been controversial. But he was effective.
Our streets were safe before Democrats embraced Black Lives Matter riots and the "Defund the Police" lunacy. Our schools taught our kids before teachers' unions locked them out for Covid and smuggled Critical Race Theory racism into their classrooms. Our border was secure, and
the wall was being constructed.
Democrats are worried about the 2022 elections, but not worried enough. They think the worst that can happen is establishment Republicans will win a few seats, which could actually give them bipartisan buy-in on their terrible policies.
We have to aim much higher, much sooner.
We have to elect strong conservatives to Congress who will do what they said they would do.
Conservatives need to rally, make noise at town halls, campaign events, and in official fundraising reports. That's the only way Democrats - and establishment Republicans - will understand how badly they have lost the country.
They need to see that Americans don't want a return to a "new normal" - we want a return to American greatness!
Please make a contribution to HFF and tell Washington that their incompetence is coming to an end this year.
The elite Left has squandered its last ounce of credibility. On Covid, on China and Big Tech, on education and jobs, on election integrity, they have bullied and condescended and cheated... and they've done it all for the world to see.
If they think the American people are just concerned, they will keep doing what they have been doing and hope to get away with it. They need to know Americans are DONE with their elitist garbage. They need to know that YOU ARE IN CHARGE of this country, not them.
In 2022, we need to show them: at the ballot box, at the townhalls, on social media, and in the fundraising hauls of trusted, fighting conservative organizations.

And in the elections for the House of Representatives, there is one that stands above the rest: the HOUSE FREEDOM FUND.
Only fighting, principled conservatives will follow through after election day and end The Swamp's tyranny once and for all.
Please join me in supporting these candidates with a generous contribution today.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help make America great again.

Sincerely,

JIM JORDAN
U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio

 

 

ELECT HOUSE CONSERVATIVES

DONATE NOW

 

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that
promote the liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM
