name: Ms. Betty
subject: Could you read this note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I've known Congresswoman Demings for a long time
| | |
---
Friend – I've known Congresswoman Demings a long time.

I first met Val when we hired her as a social worker, addressing the needs of residents in Green Cove Springs and surrounding areas. That was back 30 years ago, and I'm just so proud of everything she's done and is doing now to serve Florida.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41872541/330682788/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2131-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjU4NjFmMy00YjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oK6o3vgWH2s6k7tgt6o3RF-KpRp1ZRNmU2Bh5MV4yxw=)
Back then, everybody who worked in the office was like a big family. Our office didn't get much funding, but we made our way. We did everything we could to help our neighbors.
Believe me when I say Val has always had _heart_. Whether someone needed food or their lights had been turned off, Val put her nose to the grindstone to help. I know she made a real difference in their lives.
Now, I'm just blown away to see what Val continues to do in keeping that mission to serve others, just as she did decades ago. She's fighting for our community in Congress, and I know if she's elected to the Senate, she'll keep doing everything she can to make our lives better – whether that's protecting our voting rights or making health care more affordable.
But that progress depends on expanding our Democratic majority in the Senate, which depends on you. Val tells me she just can't raise enough money to win without support from each of you. If you have a few dollars to help her deliver better leadership to Florida, could you donate now?

Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure. actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41872542/330682789/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2131-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjU4NjFmMy00YjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oK6o3vgWH2s6k7tgt6o3RF-KpRp1ZRNmU2Bh5MV4yxw=)**
With Val's fighting spirit, I have no doubt that she will work even harder as your senator, just as she did so many years ago when she became as a social worker.

Thanks for your help,

Ms. Betty
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
We have complete faith that Abby will work her heart out and defeat Sen. Grassley ...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41872615/330683058/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk689-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGMyNDFhNy00YzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lEIAuBOjYfbZNS8qnJTxJ2vx6kSvOBHhlDF-5yoxC78=)
Hi Peter,

That's our little girl, Abby, you're looking at – and she's going to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and expand Democrats' majority in the Senate!

Back then, if you had told us our little girl would grow up to be elected to Congress and go on to challenge Sen. Chuck Grassley (who, by the way, was our senator even all those years ago!), well – we _absolutely_ would have believed you.
You see, Abby's always stuck up for what she believes in and fought for what's right. Since the age of 10, she has sat at the kitchen table with her grandfather and uncles – some of them Democrats, some of them Republicans – and talked politics. We may not have been able to give our daughter a trust fund or write a six-figure check for college, but what we did give her was her work ethic.

So as Abby grew up and saw work to be done, she signed up and _did_ the work. She won election to the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old – and then four years later became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic. All along the way, she's been fighting for working families like ours.
We have complete faith that Abby will work her heart out and defeat Sen. Grassley. But we've seen how things work in Iowa. Last time around, our Senate election was one of the most expensive in the country. The Republican establishment will pour millions into our state to attack competitive challengers like our daughter – and right now, they have more than $32 million in the bank to protect Sen. Grassley, who's facing record-low approval with Iowans.
**This is where you come in, Peter: Abby will win if she has _ _ an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her. [So will you help her raise another $10,000? Donate $5, or whatever you can right now, and every dollar will ensure Abby's campaign has what it takes to defeat top Trump ally Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41872616/330683059/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk689-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGMyNDFhNy00YzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lEIAuBOjYfbZNS8qnJTxJ2vx6kSvOBHhlDF-5yoxC78=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41872617/330683060/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk689-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGMyNDFhNy00YzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lEIAuBOjYfbZNS8qnJTxJ2vx6kSvOBHhlDF-5yoxC78=)

It means the world to our family to have you on this team. Thank you so much for supporting our daughter.

Deb and Jerry Finkenauer

subject: Dolan for Ohio Super Saturday on Feb. 26th!
body:
Spring is just around the corner and we need your help to keep Ohio Red
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KJFq1NYZnGCX4yI3LFxSrrL31uDpdaGBtflUaPyJzSSLWNz1NdrlQmmnISbDwjd_sRHiFFH6SC1EuGo2tIJOtGdd0kPAfTIVxRh8MJMLvJ4sSTiw_KRycn9VKD4-k0d6DmmjpfP7-HbNdBsMhUteCQ==&c=9PMMMVu3Dy_itrI31oIcVmKgfOHZPozaN_rfdw4DuHXRZcTqCD8BbA==&ch=oYfYk0uYaclaV-eITkYqfzHBVsvE4y10J5pIPrDbjFTprszm0Doa8w==)

| Peter, With the weather warming up we are excited to announce our first SUPER SATURDAY of 2022 on February 26th all across Ohio!
Join us at the home of Hilliard City Council President Pete Marsh for coffee and donuts as Matt kicks-off his statewide day of action!
If you don't live in Franklin County, don't worry, we have door-to-door kick-offs across the state. You can sign-up to make phone calls from your home as well.
More details and launch locations can be found on the flyer below and be sure to [RSVP here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KJFq1NYZnGCX4yI3LFxSrrL31uDpdaGBtflUaPyJzSSLWNz1NdrlQu40qY-OWncDrTFsGzs70qo-26zSzOTFa1K4rb-jactyAYIoCkCHQgKLgm3FeNW4ilno2jSWVvl437w-LdS6scdDLd6cQ0BR_A==&c=9PMMMVu3Dy_itrI31oIcVmKgfOHZPozaN_rfdw4DuHXRZcTqCD8BbA==&ch=oYfYk0uYaclaV-eITkYqfzHBVsvE4y10J5pIPrDbjFTprszm0Doa8w==) Please share with anyone else who may be interested, too!

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Bill Lee: Zealot in Chief
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

I’m worried, Peter.

Governor Lee and his Republican buddies are trying to build a theocracy in Tennessee, and they’re targeting our kids to do it. Through Lee’s deal with Hillsdale College, a private conservative college in Michigan, over 50 Hillsdale-backed charter schools will be coming to Tennessee, all running on their far-right curriculum meant to indoctrinate our kids with an ahistorical, anti-scientific ideology.

Not only is this dangerous for our schools, but Lee is using taxpayer money to force his religious beliefs on all Tennesseans with his Hillsdale charter school heist.

The only way to fight back against Lee and his religious state is by electing a Democrat to replace him. Can you help us defeat him by chipping in $25 now?
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

The Republicans’ goal is to make Tennessee a place where church and state become one and the strong public education we’ve been working toward does not exist.

We need your help in fighting back against Lee’s plan to impose a religious state — help us defeat him by chipping in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

Thank you as always,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

We rely a lot more on the grassroots contributions we receive from emails like this. Your contribution is going towards keeping our lights on and keeping our team at the DPVA operational. name: Tim Ryan

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2360%2E3611125%2EThq118 ][IMG]

Hey there—

I’ll be sitting down with my team later this week to go over our campaign
strategy for the next few months, and I want to make sure I get your
feedback first.

While my Republican opponents are in a race to the bottom to try to win
Donald Trump’s blessing, my number one priority is making sure this
campaign represents YOU.

I wish I could grab a cup of coffee with every one of you to hear about
your concerns, but I’ll have to settle for the next best thing.

My team put together a short priorities survey (seriously, two minutes
tops!). [ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220216_EN_PrioritiesSurvey_A0_na_U2_X4_M1?t=1007&akid=2360%2E3611125%2EThq118 ]Will you take a moment to let me know what issues matter the
most to you in this race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220216_EN_PrioritiesSurvey_A0_na_U2_X4_M1?t=1008&akid=2360%2E3611125%2EThq118 ]Take the Survey

The only way we’ll finally cut workers in on the deal is by expanding our
Democratic Senate majority. We need to build a winning operation with
folks all over Ohio (that means you!) to flip this seat blue.

Your voice matters to me, so I’m hoping you’ll take a minute to fill out
my survey today.

Thanks,

Tim

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: quick thing (bad news)
body:
Derek,

I've only got a few minutes of free time, so I’ll be quick:

FIRST : CNN named me the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection – in the race POLITICO says could decide Senate control.

THEN : A new super PAC promised to flood the airwaves with attack ads to smear me and turn Georgia red – and a new poll showed me neck and neck with my potential, Trump-backed opponent, Herschel Walker (R) .

NOW : We just launched our first TV ad of the reelection campaign to fight back and pull ahead – but we need another $7,822 by midnight to keep it live, and we're falling short. Unless we close our budget gap ASAP, our ad could go dark, and we could cede the airwaves to the GOP's attacks .

With our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice – at stake in this race, failing to fight back in moments like this could mean the difference between defending our Senate majority and handing control right back to Mitch McConnell. That's why I have to ask:

Please, Derek, will you rush an urgent split donation of $25 or more before midnight between CommonGood and my campaign to keep our ad on the air, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220216_CGVA_Warnock]

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220216_CGVA_Warnock&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220216_CGVA_Warnock&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220216_CGVA_Warnock&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220216_CGVA_Warnock&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220216_CGVA_Warnock&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220216_CGVA_Warnock]

Thank you for your support. I'm grateful to have you on my team.

– Sen. Raphael Warnock

(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia

Arlington, VA 22215

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41873542/330686807/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220216mm2teacher_gv_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTA5NTkzMi01MjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3C5cwQ4bMP2jAiCBUiG8PoTzYB_IaZClWU5cZyqzt9Y=)

Hi team, In our family, my siblings and I were taught that education was the key to success. That looks different for every family and every community, but we can never underestimate the power of teachers and mentors. Earlier this month on the campaign trail, I reunited with the first teacher who believed in me: my high school English teacher, Mrs. Carolyn Wittrup. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41873543/330686808/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220216mm2teacher_gv_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTA5NTkzMi01MjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3C5cwQ4bMP2jAiCBUiG8PoTzYB_IaZClWU5cZyqzt9Y=)
---
She believed in me before I even believed in myself, and gave me the education and encouragement to work hard, achieve my dreams, and give back to my community.
I’m running for Congress here in New Mexico’s 2nd district to ensure that every child — no matter their background or circumstances — has access to the same kind of education and support needed to thrive and make their mark on the world. We also have to ensure that teachers like Mrs. Wittrup have the funding and resources they need to educate and prepare the next generation of young leaders.
**I promised Mrs. Wittrup and I promise you that when we win this race and I represent NM-02 in Congress, I will be a champion for public education, higher teacher salaries, and better funding for schools.**
[**Help me do it by pitching in a grassroots contribution of $10 or more today before our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight at midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41873544/330686809/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220216mm2teacher_gv_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTA5NTkzMi01MjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3C5cwQ4bMP2jAiCBUiG8PoTzYB_IaZClWU5cZyqzt9Y=)

clean_body: | = Hi team, In our family, my siblings and I were taught that education was the key to success. That looks different for every family and every community, but we can never underestimate the power of teachers and mentors. Earlier this month on the campaign trail, I reunited with the first teacher who believed in me: my high school English teacher, Mrs. Carolyn Wittrup. | = She believed in me before I even believed in myself, and gave me the education and encouragement to work hard, achieve my dreams, and give back to my community. I’m running for Congress here in New Mexico’s 2nd district to ensure that every child — no matter their background or circumstances — has access to the same kind of education and support needed to thrive and make their mark on the world. We also have to ensure that teachers like Mrs. Wittrup have the funding and resources they need to educate and prepare the next generation of young leaders. I promised Mrs. Wittrup and I promise you that when we win this race and I represent NM-02 in Congress, I will be a champion for public education, higher teacher salaries, and better funding for schools. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials — thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Team Warner
subject: Voters need to hear about what we’ve done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
If we make these connections, we can keep the Senate in November. If not, our majority will be in peril.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41874241/330689665/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmQ0MWFiMC01MjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=beS0WG9gLp0iikcxZ3u9v1yIf5DGpNFt_cbSTIjtKvw=&emci=7ca93a59-3d8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=dfd41ab0-528f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, It’s been a little over a year since this Congress was sworn in with Democratic majorities in the House and the Senate. Our agenda was ambitious, and urgent, and we achieved a lot. But the question of whether or not we will keep our majority hinges on our ability to get these accomplishments and victories in front of voters. And that has to start NOW. [_**Chip in $5 so we have the resources to reach the voters who will decide control of Congress in November.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41874245/330689685/-446345407?refcode=mw_em_220216_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmQ0MWFiMC01MjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=beS0WG9gLp0iikcxZ3u9v1yIf5DGpNFt_cbSTIjtKvw=) We need to remind voters that we kept people safe and healthy by making a nearly $1 trillion investment in pandemic relief. Homes, lives, and livelihoods were saved because of the American Rescue Plan. We need to let them know that the impact of the bipartisan infrastructure bill is already being felt in communities across the country. Here in Virginia, the federal government has already announced plans to build new seawalls in coastal Virginia that will protect against flooding and rising sea levels. New funding for bridges, airports, and other job-creating infrastructure projects is on its way as well. If we make these connections, we can keep the Senate in November. If not, our majority will be in peril. [_**Protect the majority in the Senate. Chip in $5 now so we can reach voters in crucial states in November.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41874246/330689698/-446345407?refcode=mw_em_220216_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmQ0MWFiMC01MjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=beS0WG9gLp0iikcxZ3u9v1yIf5DGpNFt_cbSTIjtKvw=) Thanks, Team Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41874247/330689747/-446345407?refcode=mw_em_220216_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmQ0MWFiMC01MjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=beS0WG9gLp0iikcxZ3u9v1yIf5DGpNFt_cbSTIjtKvw=)**

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m in trouble.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z39qo88uk6ci9jd7oj2e8jqnqkth0m290h2jd140_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uloj7clkshh66tbhm3jr3dbi6qon3c3jmeqnapdgstgn5cj7c3in8oblehhm0ppnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchlcoq65cr2cup34phim2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1clg6cob1c9ie49fg)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z13hvh7n6ls2pfnj0ime7ickbj3tdatd5f85064o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1j62ob2cjh2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **
| | [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $500 DONATION](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqg117a5u2phnli52mchl2k3kjbuji987o26c9b8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1j62ob2cjh2bs)

God Bless you and your generosity,

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself. I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars. I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP. WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. | | | | | | Thank you for your help. Thank you for your encouragement. Thank you for having my back. God Bless you and your generosity, Senator John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter,

We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof:

| "**Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats** fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, **the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign.** " _- The Hill, 2/9/2022_
---

Many of Hollywood's top celebrity activists are funneling thousands of dollars each into the campaign account of our opponent.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e7313cc3458f4e3d9ef68dbd43894899&_e=F_YfmfarHFDfLSSS4Ijl39Jc6eQmFCThBHN2Aj6JcHqAM0U7kAbslRFU0veq6FwbS4XF5eH5MWXVnXCATvKGhgucdf7ZvdiujDM9JqKGYzha8lmFhOr0yM3D4ThlxNWFHAgGj94iJFCHMi8FEC16XbMew7tPoadwrnQoIZp5rU8kFB0VvivGBm_MLnqNSIef7KmlAZ_Rr6tZgWz3Z04agZNuXsBZww7nIArJw6mMZBXfgB1dLV85dnmH8TufJOFb4UaLXfIvNRz16SO52MmfIIwm2yNfU6zHGtWwmlm70GTygE7YwlY-fUYkMiu-1mRE4ois8zRqUkUM_1GXAJHHm17SLsQEoZ75TAVGdgpXvDg6qVhX1XtmIPOnNedgXl8ivLPzazyVXacvTl85DX1LmayeBiatDBE5nPatlkCG8GVWqaJtOrlOPvc-kA6k4_pH7PXCXDc9tHDb8MADFAwg-mO8_cqVU-WPsvJC08FwYdI%3D)
**It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race.** More deep-pocketed Hollywood celebrities are going to send max-out contributions with the intent of keeping their favorite Democrat in the Senate.

**_[Here is our ask of you today: will you chip in $7 today to help us offset Hollywood's support of our opponent?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e7313cc3458f4e3d9ef68dbd43894899&_e=F_YfmfarHFDfLSSS4Ijl39Jc6eQmFCThBHN2Aj6JcHqAM0U7kAbslRFU0veq6FwbS4XF5eH5MWXVnXCATvKGhgucdf7ZvdiujDM9JqKGYzha8lmFhOr0yM3D4ThlxNWFHAgGj94iJFCHMi8FEC16XbMew7tPoadwrnQoIZp5rU8kFB0VvivGBm_MLnqNSIef7KmlAZ_Rr6tZgWz3Z04agZNuXsBZww7nIArJw6mMZBXfgB1dLV85dnmH8TufJOFb4UaLXfIvNRz16SO52MmfIHL9V9PRtJuvab-5pQDxOucWAkAzZMJV22GMhchU-1I5q78Tj4k2PtvYjZLzU1hcxT6P2Za20x3raPzBYg3hYnYMy8q-HPJAlxMJc5FRjFYPo4jOyyPw3xmhryuyam2aj5vlFvf3wlgJ1Vy4oOs9KBN5B80yWMcN49aEOYubH22sMUjqvABeUbHghn4s2yFFk0nuohoLH3K0wJuxMHTRMZs%3D)_**

**We've set a goal of raising an additional $35,000 before midnight tonight and could use your help.**

That may sound like an arbitrary number, but it's the amount of money we need to be raising - DAILY - to run the most competitive campaign possible.

Peter, I am so proud of the hard work we have accomplished together, and I’m so excited to show y’all our newest campaign video:
---
[| | |
---|---|---](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41874986/330692691/-963090601?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjlmZTZhZC01MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cEoBmNvgANG58HMxr0DnlQMjjIrckxe5YN62MZIVckQ=&emci=34692c65-538f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7f9fe6ad-538f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=23594672)
I met a lot of people in the last year of this campaign right here in Northwest Georgia. **The more people I talked to, the more I realized that my story _is_ the story of Northwest Georgia. **I grew up an army brat, traveling the country. It was hard on me and my family, but my father’s service was so important. I got pregnant at 18 and decided to keep my son – one of the best decisions I have ever made. But that was a decision I can’t imagine someone else making for me. Things were hard and money was tight. Sometimes we had to get our next meal from the local food pantry. When I had my second child, my husband and I couldn’t afford childcare so we worked opposite shifts. We felt like strangers passing in the night. We never stopped working hard, but it took its toll. My husband struggled with alcoholism and luckily we were able to break past the stigma and get him the help he needed. There were so many points where I could’ve given up, and I almost did. But we pushed through. **And just like all of you, I’m still standing. ** I’m running for Congress because it’s time that we invested in our rural communities – so that our kids can tell new stories, better stories. Marjorie Taylor Greene isn’t from our district, she doesn’t know our story and she hasn’t lived our struggles. I started this campaign with $500 and a fire in my belly. I’m no stranger to having the odds stacked against me. And I will never stop fighting for my home. And I will never give up on you. Today I’m asking you to have a little faith that tomorrow’s story can be better than today’s. **[I hope you’ll join us in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41874987/330692692/-804235033?refcode=em0216a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjlmZTZhZC01MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cEoBmNvgANG58HMxr0DnlQMjjIrckxe5YN62MZIVckQ=) ** Sincerely,Holly McCormack.

Hey Peter!

Your support the last eight months has been unreal. It’s helped us win a mayoral election in Galesburg, IL and helped elect Shenise Turner-Sloss as Dayton City Commissioner in Ohio.

It’s pretty clear that when passionate people come together, anything is possible.

But we have our biggest race in 15 days.

Jessica Mason’s race in Texas is critical for our the democratic party and for progressive, working-class families. Just as a reminder, Jessica is running for Congress in South Dallas – where the average life expectancy is 64 years old. But just 3 miles away it’s 86.

**That’s a 22-year difference in 15,000 feet.**

Her community is hurting and they need someone to represent them who has lived the struggles of their district.

Jessica is an affordable housing advocate and helps families get better access to food and health services. She’s not just another politician, she’s a daughter of Dallas.

She’s the new deal.

We have watched her scrappy campaign turn into a grassroots revolution. Her community has come together to fiercely advocate for her – whether that’s knocking doors or hosting community events. She’s working 80 hour weeks, not just so she can win, but so she can bring real change to her neighbors.

With your help, she has raised over $200,000 with over 4,000 individual contributions, 95% of which are grassroots donations.

We’re so proud of Jessica’s accomplishments and we are honored to support her. ******[But time is running out and this is a race we can’t afford to lose. clean_body: ICYMI: Top Rhode Island Republican enters race that could flip congressional seat -Washington Examiner = | = Peter, We're not in the habit of sharing articles from conservative news publications, but the headline speaks for itself. National Republicans are convinced that they can flip RI-02 red during this year's midterms elections. We have to prove them wrong. Last week, Allan Fung, a proud Trump supporter, entered our race. If Fung is elected, his first vote in Congress would be to give control of the House to Kevin McCarthy and extreme DC Republicans who care more about doing Trump's bidding than helping working people. Seth is running for Congress to fight for working families, not Donald Trump. But he needs your help to take on Fung and the Republicans backing his campaign. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is coming up at midnight tonight, and especially with February being a shorter month, we can't afford to fall behind! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: Updates On The Campaign Trail
body:
Check out our weekly newsletter...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DEhMtJtUjtmBjgVNY0usTcL16T1BPfY4nvvvJBSR7dvpPUrocKUQ8vI3UaOAKISJFEvJovuI48_oVCGeAiubvYuEtEOkVi8ZJYbS0ky1k_bvEdjSiax6fFPTMS060ztR4wkBcGqHJiE0UYTe93pTaN4Bd626VreQQSf-u1dc_M23cpfH2bOA7A==&c=vFJKqZci0-p5fuUDtKWNkcMShLxKMGpYhG6dxKoPtsQ34R2C3MWiCQ==&ch=ZaSvj7Tro3V4G_Tk4rwT9ENEMYghFWPF_GrRxgEDTjYziMIo_Zb2gw==)
---
| Happy Wednesday friends!
Check out our updates from the Gibbons campaign trail below.
We have both internal and independent data showing us positioned to win and I could not be more humbled and grateful for all of the support. Your dedication is encouraging and makes me eager to get to work in Washington.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DEhMtJtUjtmBjgVNY0usTcL16T1BPfY4nvvvJBSR7dvpPUrocKUQ8rsg_3seNJZ5yPxTWIkkxpuDG_Bp0ubEIniKHXcI9l_kpzbCJPZLl_iuGJGPOnvujVWo7auIctsQ1ORGC-xOZ7PhDadTjB7RGvfGmOkfOQWqOlO01UtXqdXqB2fHOtwF5IYGx-s7BKqslDPtoaJbkOA=&c=vFJKqZci0-p5fuUDtKWNkcMShLxKMGpYhG6dxKoPtsQ34R2C3MWiCQ==&ch=ZaSvj7Tro3V4G_Tk4rwT9ENEMYghFWPF_GrRxgEDTjYziMIo_Zb2gw==)
---
| | |
---
| During our busy week on the road, I had the chance to meet with Moms for Liberty and discuss the importance of parents being actively involved in fighting the indoctrination and "wokeism" being pushed onto children today.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DEhMtJtUjtmBjgVNY0usTcL16T1BPfY4nvvvJBSR7dvpPUrocKUQ8rsg_3seNJZ5KUBk8fE5vGXiAiGJfJ3A7KmWDdlcE001Rj64ksf8rVBVq5E_yVhd-7ByUSk7C_sgkmttyy5t_TrM4v7BYHoFItJAb9ePkl27h2-R6nbBBdz0Fl4-y06JfODdc7xcAfugjfuCCw4QhoI=&c=vFJKqZci0-p5fuUDtKWNkcMShLxKMGpYhG6dxKoPtsQ34R2C3MWiCQ==&ch=ZaSvj7Tro3V4G_Tk4rwT9ENEMYghFWPF_GrRxgEDTjYziMIo_Zb2gw==)
---
| I'm honored to receive the endorsement of two great Ohio leaders, London City Council President Henry Comer and State Rep. Tom Young. I also want to thank our Montgomery County Captain Jayden Walsworth for his hard work.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
Check out my recent interview on Newsmax. I laid out my position on today's top Republican issues and explained why I'm the best candidate to represent conservatives - because I'm not part of the establishment.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DEhMtJtUjtmBjgVNY0usTcL16T1BPfY4nvvvJBSR7dvpPUrocKUQ8rsg_3seNJZ5hJYs1vMZTbKRegxj-8dVqvW29WMHja6d2mzeo_PRzbjINIYSGkbqiUwn33ozALx3YIsj-U2lXWK0z3g03bpBvhtsaSN-l7Hc3w9WEmGYwOd4tGZgQfbBCQP9Vhixri3p&c=vFJKqZci0-p5fuUDtKWNkcMShLxKMGpYhG6dxKoPtsQ34R2C3MWiCQ==&ch=ZaSvj7Tro3V4G_Tk4rwT9ENEMYghFWPF_GrRxgEDTjYziMIo_Zb2gw==)
---
| In the News
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DEhMtJtUjtmBjgVNY0usTcL16T1BPfY4nvvvJBSR7dvpPUrocKUQ8tVFAv3zxgmnYXT9RUL4QrHnad532JtuyIESkMNI34bJrKh0RVm7efpVwhBT-96qhA23jq1wsMdGyluDVsQAB7IVabJcLhTV8B2e9WCBrfxGMBpkdVCjeedtBCfuMhAjs9RrC5jkCLCjo-ZJgyW7kaNsNqyy7ZeiGwLpf8y9kBhhms_HiIlEHl43ZUz0o2tnkkT80CoZ_2MyXO0yRN0cKQ8TZ9Z5e3CFacMvxtTTpfCD&c=vFJKqZci0-p5fuUDtKWNkcMShLxKMGpYhG6dxKoPtsQ34R2C3MWiCQ==&ch=ZaSvj7Tro3V4G_Tk4rwT9ENEMYghFWPF_GrRxgEDTjYziMIo_Zb2gw==)

---
| Businessman Mike Gibbons is rising in early polls of Ohio's crowded Republican Senate primary, and he is seeking to introduce himself to voters as the pro-Trump candidate in the race, according to a new advertisement campaign he will launch Tuesday.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DEhMtJtUjtmBjgVNY0usTcL16T1BPfY4nvvvJBSR7dvpPUrocKUQ8rsg_3seNJZ5ZjoA_SLghQwtcRMStUWhOxlXXWXREejytxbewxE_spJ01XKsP1w5AJ26MM5yyIPjb5vQEQs2qIcSaC2R6vP000PqW-dmvP1J7eupPGABoW9chUqDBu00bu3joQEqxg5nXIxmJQSCF79nKUdvpQi4Tvh3DaTFXlSNwrBmetXhXP7JnCpkxVbW3NMtzQHH-MW-5xXJHlvcKUs=&c=vFJKqZci0-p5fuUDtKWNkcMShLxKMGpYhG6dxKoPtsQ34R2C3MWiCQ==&ch=ZaSvj7Tro3V4G_Tk4rwT9ENEMYghFWPF_GrRxgEDTjYziMIo_Zb2gw==)

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DEhMtJtUjtmBjgVNY0usTcL16T1BPfY4nvvvJBSR7dvpPUrocKUQ8rsg_3seNJZ5ZjoA_SLghQwtcRMStUWhOxlXXWXREejytxbewxE_spJ01XKsP1w5AJ26MM5yyIPjb5vQEQs2qIcSaC2R6vP000PqW-dmvP1J7eupPGABoW9chUqDBu00bu3joQEqxg5nXIxmJQSCF79nKUdvpQi4Tvh3DaTFXlSNwrBmetXhXP7JnCpkxVbW3NMtzQHH-MW-5xXJHlvcKUs=&c=vFJKqZci0-p5fuUDtKWNkcMShLxKMGpYhG6dxKoPtsQ34R2C3MWiCQ==&ch=ZaSvj7Tro3V4G_Tk4rwT9ENEMYghFWPF_GrRxgEDTjYziMIo_Zb2gw==)
---
| ...But now 2 new polls show Mike Gibbons leading the crowded race. A poll by Coefficient taken February 6-8 shows Gibbons in the lead with 20% support among likely Republican voters.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DEhMtJtUjtmBjgVNY0usTcL16T1BPfY4nvvvJBSR7dvpPUrocKUQ8rsg_3seNJZ5yONncgcLxX_8GG9DjUW_l5Y00_Vyi4uJpisPc-brCUpQt6ZHFeoG-t-aNNLYOxaoX5k87LeA2wVGeENrUBKUyDY2I7OuIJBESVoI8G0SncNvIz-cex3KI6uHmp6V4CBFvhOmA_N3-JY0kMvZunQWSdL9Kdwpbuvv&c=vFJKqZci0-p5fuUDtKWNkcMShLxKMGpYhG6dxKoPtsQ34R2C3MWiCQ==&ch=ZaSvj7Tro3V4G_Tk4rwT9ENEMYghFWPF_GrRxgEDTjYziMIo_Zb2gw==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DEhMtJtUjtmBjgVNY0usTcL16T1BPfY4nvvvJBSR7dvpPUrocKUQ8rsg_3seNJZ5yONncgcLxX_8GG9DjUW_l5Y00_Vyi4uJpisPc-brCUpQt6ZHFeoG-t-aNNLYOxaoX5k87LeA2wVGeENrUBKUyDY2I7OuIJBESVoI8G0SncNvIz-cex3KI6uHmp6V4CBFvhOmA_N3-JY0kMvZunQWSdL9Kdwpbuvv&c=vFJKqZci0-p5fuUDtKWNkcMShLxKMGpYhG6dxKoPtsQ34R2C3MWiCQ==&ch=ZaSvj7Tro3V4G_Tk4rwT9ENEMYghFWPF_GrRxgEDTjYziMIo_Zb2gw==)
---
| A pair of new statewide Ohio Republican US Senate primary surveys finds businessman Mike Gibbons overtaking former state Treasurer Josh Mandel to claim first place in the battle to succeed retiring Sen. Rob Portman (R).
---
| | |
---
| We've come a long way and have strategic plans in place to keep our momentum moving in a positive direction, not just through the May primary but also through the November general election. We cannot let the Democrats keep control of Congress, and I have faith Ohioans will come through in this urgent fight.

We encourage you to get involved in this historical election. [Sign up here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DEhMtJtUjtmBjgVNY0usTcL16T1BPfY4nvvvJBSR7dvpPUrocKUQ8opPPEIbFRDgCNpKFduA90COpFlc72MeBTSL68wF428q9pJgBQVS7oZ7P7PvNnp-FuFo16LrSnJJ_IANi1ubS7mZNkBs5SNBom0Cvjk6dR4tsqDdxegY2uI=&c=vFJKqZci0-p5fuUDtKWNkcMShLxKMGpYhG6dxKoPtsQ34R2C3MWiCQ==&ch=ZaSvj7Tro3V4G_Tk4rwT9ENEMYghFWPF_GrRxgEDTjYziMIo_Zb2gw==) or email us at info@gibbonsforohio.com with any questions.

Gratefully,

Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate

clean_body: Check out our weekly newsletter... | | | | | | == | Happy Wednesday friends! Check out our updates from the Gibbons campaign trail below. We have both internal and independent data showing us positioned to win and I could not be more humbled and grateful for all of the support. Your dedication is encouraging and makes me eager to get to work in Washington. | == | | | | During our busy week on the road, I had the chance to meet with Moms for Liberty and discuss the importance of parents being actively involved in fighting the indoctrination and "wokeism" being pushed onto children today. | == | I'm honored to receive the endorsement of two great Ohio leaders, London City Council President Henry Comer and State Rep. Tom Young. I also want to thank our Montgomery County Captain Jayden Walsworth for his hard work. | | | | Check out my recent interview on Newsmax. I laid out my position on today's top Republican issues and explained why I'm the best candidate to represent conservatives - because I'm not part of the establishment. | == | In the News | == | == | Businessman Mike Gibbons is rising in early polls of Ohio's crowded Republican Senate primary, and he is seeking to introduce himself to voters as the pro-Trump candidate in the race, according to a new advertisement campaign he will launch Tuesday. | == | == | ...But now 2 new polls show Mike Gibbons leading the crowded race. A poll by Coefficient taken February 6-8 shows Gibbons in the lead with 20% support among likely Republican voters. | == | == | A pair of new statewide Ohio Republican US Senate primary surveys finds businessman Mike Gibbons overtaking former state Treasurer Josh Mandel to claim first place in the battle to succeed retiring Sen. Rob Portman (R). | | | | We've come a long way and have strategic plans in place to keep our momentum moving in a positive direction, not just through the May primary but also through the November general election. We cannot let the Democrats keep control of Congress, and I have faith Ohioans will come through in this urgent fight. We encourage you to get involved in this historical election. == or email us at info@gibbonsforohio.com with any questions. Peter -

February is a short month, and because of that, I'm a little concerned about our ability to meet our monthly fundraising goal. Thanks to your generous support, we’ve been able to consistently meet our goals, but it’s a fight right up to the end of the month.

We only have 28 days to raise the same amount of money, _or more_ , that we would have to raise in a typical 30 or 31-day month. _Right now, we are falling a bit behind._ [**If you've been waiting for the right opportunity to donate to my campaign, this is it.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=c330e225e85a4b949b46f9507aef8d1d&_e=ccKbz9BbD5KKktgPtGlmNBIO0iBZJbnns_zqprdCC9Y3cnLXAAcK86dFkj4XKSl1J9sIeTnDh-28dCXVxH8bRsos3eX4V8wFuP057UtU5MBZfGer_0yoP2llz7enaNgjF6vShKWF7zHVqsXwXoKhb8sZgc4ldmLLY8If044qkPLegwRElqKewjtrxq4B0V9UalEdRVWBw3rlTf1rd6kL7cERs1KPsNhYFWgZazSPR3_EuevYCRUDg6RAA6lPHf_lZtP0D1jJeRULCDrB0DepQQzIXeD4kE1sOnMsdhc_gKCQwUEx3SJvmSpxMxdd2_GwZxzKBwcGDLU75Qs8S3L037YZWbjmquns96fwrxBhopKiO_49lISkXTrGqH73LoNvsQYTxnEDC3A7g3b5ddKX0qVavG6uSPn_0X5dZJgQnKC1IOtJ5-2eJO7d6eZVhjZn)

[** ****DONATE $15 TODAY**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=c330e225e85a4b949b46f9507aef8d1d&_e=ccKbz9BbD5KKktgPtGlmNBIO0iBZJbnns_zqprdCC9Y3cnLXAAcK86dFkj4XKSl1J9sIeTnDh-28dCXVxH8bRsos3eX4V8wFuP057UtU5MBZfGer_0yoP2llz7enaNgjF6vShKWF7zHVqsXwXoKhb8sZgc4ldmLLY8If044qkPLegwRElqKewjtrxq4B0V9UalEdRVWBw3rlTf1rd6kL7cERs1KPsNhYFWgZazSPR3-eoVHYW1KtP4q3NxDNOSSYZDtYNFRm4qu1bsEGLty8PjB40RS5jTdAO_viH4VMIuPRa8ktQ7JxI0s24J7VLOOY3UAS8sK37LigP015TV9GGNqyZL4u1Iq4EsCMUXadDEX3wDOaLxxtUl8UvMp1ExaP_L-INpbg-6Fk9xBL9fv3qB-zVzrW1-uEINHDvOyj9K6jq53ilB9bNQFOmIwcwx5f)
This is alarming to me because if we cannot meet this goal, our campaign will have to pause some of our efforts. We would lose all the momentum we've built over the past few months.

Our country cannot afford to send a single RINO to the House. **It's vital that strong and true conservatives are elected in November to block the dangerous progressive agenda of the Biden Administration.**

To keep a RINO out of the Capitol, we cannot slow down our campaign. We cannot afford to lose any time. That's why I'm sounding the alarm now, while we still have time to close our fundraising gap.

[**Can you make a $15 contribution to my campaign for Congress today?**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=c330e225e85a4b949b46f9507aef8d1d&_e=ccKbz9BbD5KKktgPtGlmNBIO0iBZJbnns_zqprdCC9Y3cnLXAAcK86dFkj4XKSl1J9sIeTnDh-28dCXVxH8bRsos3eX4V8wFuP057UtU5MBZfGer_0yoP2llz7enaNgjF6vShKWF7zHVqsXwXoKhb8sZgc4ldmLLY8If044qkPLegwRElqKewjtrxq4B0V9UalEdRVWBw3rlTf1rd6kL7cERs1KPsNhYFWgZazSPR38KVRarkKD3ouUixgPGUy8W7W2lh42EpZEL3NjLs0WNcoQiNJIEazb_EziQOCKEJUoeGH56GzRaFmhneGwhmrw7C4PRlnry6EQKLdFX1hcLIT62wyi53TGyH-e7Gtf9-CxjAcBxLp8mwTYOX7UjqpDKaxUBKA4_8ssc9tEeJZWy1dO7aG9Luh9NEqY5FCmdodqFvGd_eM5TJJpRYmW64U9-)

[** ****DONATE $15 TODAY**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=c330e225e85a4b949b46f9507aef8d1d&_e=ccKbz9BbD5KKktgPtGlmNBIO0iBZJbnns_zqprdCC9Y3cnLXAAcK86dFkj4XKSl1J9sIeTnDh-28dCXVxH8bRsos3eX4V8wFuP057UtU5MBZfGer__fYLFs9a-)
This could be the most consequential election of our lives, and just $15 today can make a major difference in my fight to restore the conservative House majority.

[**So please, Peter, chip in today and help me meet my goals!**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=c330e225e85a4b949b46f9507aef8d1d&_e=ccKbz9BbD5KKktgPtGlmNBIO0iBZJbnns_zqprdCC9Y3cnLXAAcK86dFkj4XKSl1J9sIeTnDh-28dCXVxH8bRsos3eX4V8wFuP057UtU5MBZfGer_0yoP2llz7enaNgjF6vShKWF7zHVqsXwXoKhb8sZgc4ldmLLY8If044qkPLegwRElqKewjtrxq4B0V9UalEdRVWBw3rlTf1rd6kL7cERs1KPsNhYFWgZazSPR3-to3WugUqXya_OvGxUetSoW4FNamZ-sjcjOTA0cWILyrssj7JY8mNhJ9LZJwNuE789ex0nGypGCXd4M1uTA8jq4WYTt_lv4Kxjyhax2NEtRBHwhkIfgAGetFIDnU_ZeErUY-ooixJUO-bfQBzuz8ZTK1mZllEoetxhR33xDwi7hfMA2arsv8AOQKcl6_Qzw0f5ujEciGqqv367fBmPGox8)

**Amanda Makki**
Republican for Florida's 13th Congressional District

clean_body: We would lose all the momentum we've built over the past few months. | Peter - February is a short month, and because of that, I'm a little concerned about our ability to meet our monthly fundraising goal. Thanks to your generous support, we’ve been able to consistently meet our goals, but it’s a fight right up to the end of the month. We only have 28 days to raise the same amount of money, or more , that we would have to raise in a typical 30 or 31-day month. Right now, we are falling a bit behind. This is alarming to me because if we cannot meet this goal, our campaign will have to pause some of our efforts. We would lose all the momentum we've built over the past few months. Our country cannot afford to send a single RINO to the House. It's vital that strong and true conservatives are elected in November to block the dangerous progressive agenda of the Biden Administration. To keep a RINO out of the Capitol, we cannot slow down our campaign. We cannot afford to lose any time. That's why I'm sounding the alarm now, while we still have time to close our fundraising gap. - - This could be the most consequential election of our lives, and just $15 today can make a major difference in my fight to restore the conservative House majority. body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. | I want to remind you of why Mark’s race is so important:
* He brings practical and level-headed experience from his time as Mayor of Kansas City.
* He is committed to rising above partisanship to get the job done.
* Mark is the right person for the job because he understands that _there is no Democratic or Republican way to pave a street, protect the environment, or support our schools._

[If you donate today, the money goes directly to funding Mark’s grassroots campaign, building out his team, organizing volunteers, and fighting for a new vision for Kansas! Can you donate $10 to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41876397/330699440/947907228?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220215_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk4YjZlYy01YThmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nkvmaASEnTQDzFYbCzW7mnwKZWJgaU475yJdyOFf2iA=) | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41876401/330699444/947907228?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220215_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk4YjZlYy01YThmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nkvmaASEnTQDzFYbCzW7mnwKZWJgaU475yJdyOFf2iA=)

name: Jazz Lewis for Congress
subject: Gun violence is a public health & racial justice issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
This Monday marked four years since the mass shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. This horrific tragedy left 17 people dead, 17 physically wounded, and countless others with mental scars they will bear the rest of their life. It also sparked a survivor and youth-led movement for gun safety reform that continues today.
Jazz has worked hard in the Maryland House of Delegates to combat gun violence, but he understands that gun violence is a public health crisis we must address on a national level. Gun violence is also a racial justice issue -- Black Americans are twice as likely as white Americans to die from gun violence and 14 times more likely than white Americans to be wounded.
But we’re missing your response to our important one-question poll. Please, let Jazz know if you agree: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GOYCed1gqUa1nGqXdt0EwQ2?contactdata=%2FckSmpDCEWi3DpWSodgaYzLL1jlbWnYUsjE3iHmku1kJvvJ%2FhCWZoFBIro9gm95XAOFl61BOFuk8nC5bwrHR5X0XHV8KVxNtaibg%2BTTGlQwuJTwsI0c7xWkVcUpSp%2BfbbQN17rXXoQHd%2B%2Fvrm1JLHXN230cptl0S2HX7omA0H4c%3D&refcode2=bump_link]
ONE-QUESTION POLL
Congress must pass comprehensive federal gun safety reform and invest in violence intervention strategies to combat the public health crisis of gun violence.
YES » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GOYCed1gqUa1nGqXdt0EwQ2?contactdata=%2FckSmpDCEWi3DpWSodgaYzLL1jlbWnYUsjE3iHmku1kJvvJ%2FhCWZoFBIro9gm95XAOFl61BOFuk8nC5bwrHR5X0XHV8KVxNtaibg%2BTTGlQwuJTwsI0c7xWkVcUpSp%2BfbbQN17rXXoQHd%2B%2Fvrm1JLHXN230cptl0S2HX7omA0H4c%3D&refcode2=bump_btnYES] NO » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GOYCed1gqUa1nGqXdt0EwQ2?contactdata=%2FckSmpDCEWi3DpWSodgaYzLL1jlbWnYUsjE3iHmku1kJvvJ%2FhCWZoFBIro9gm95XAOFl61BOFuk8nC5bwrHR5X0XHV8KVxNtaibg%2BTTGlQwuJTwsI0c7xWkVcUpSp%2BfbbQN17rXXoQHd%2B%2Fvrm1JLHXN230cptl0S2HX7omA0H4c%3D&refcode2=bump_btnNO]
Jazz’s original message is below.
Thanks,
Team Jazz
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jazz Lewis <info@jazzlewis.com>
Date: Fri, Feb 4, 2022 at 9:53 AM
Subject: Gun violence is tearing our families apart
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
Gun violence is tearing our families apart. My prayers go out to the family of the young man who lost his life Tuesday in Greenbelt.
The Washington Post [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/TheWashingtonPost.png]Teenager slain in Greenbelt, police say
Boy was fatally wounded in apparent double shooting Tuesday night
It’s past time for action. Congress must invest in violence intervention strategies and pass comprehensive gun safety reform. We’ve done it in the Maryland General Assembly. But we need legislation on a bigger scale to tackle gun violence as a public health issue and protect our communities.
Please, let me know if you agree: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GOYCed1gqUa1nGqXdt0EwQ2?contactdata=%2FckSmpDCEWi3DpWSodgaYzLL1jlbWnYUsjE3iHmku1kJvvJ%2FhCWZoFBIro9gm95XAOFl61BOFuk8nC5bwrHR5X0XHV8KVxNtaibg%2BTTGlQwuJTwsI0c7xWkVcUpSp%2BfbbQN17rXXoQHd%2B%2Fvrm1JLHXN230cptl0S2HX7omA0H4c%3D&refcode2=body_link1]
ONE-QUESTION POLL
Congress must pass comprehensive federal gun safety reform and invest in violence intervention strategies to combat the public health crisis of gun violence.
YES » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GOYCed1gqUa1nGqXdt0EwQ2?contactdata=%2FckSmpDCEWi3DpWSodgaYzLL1jlbWnYUsjE3iHmku1kJvvJ%2FhCWZoFBIro9gm95XAOFl61BOFuk8nC5bwrHR5X0XHV8KVxNtaibg%2BTTGlQwuJTwsI0c7xWkVcUpSp%2BfbbQN17rXXoQHd%2B%2Fvrm1JLHXN230cptl0S2HX7omA0H4c%3D&refcode2=body_btnYES] NO » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GOYCed1gqUa1nGqXdt0EwQ2?contactdata=%2FckSmpDCEWi3DpWSodgaYzLL1jlbWnYUsjE3iHmku1kJvvJ%2FhCWZoFBIro9gm95XAOFl61BOFuk8nC5bwrHR5X0XHV8KVxNtaibg%2BTTGlQwuJTwsI0c7xWkVcUpSp%2BfbbQN17rXXoQHd%2B%2Fvrm1JLHXN230cptl0S2HX7omA0H4c%3D&refcode2=body_btnNO]
We need bold, progressive leaders in Congress who aren’t afraid to stand up to the corporate gun lobby and make change happen now.
Change can’t wait,
Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

name: Carter Johnson
subject: Follow Up
body:
Hello,

I am the field director for Jack Ballard's congressional campaign, and I was reaching out because you left your email on our website and I was curious if you were interested in volunteering with our campaign.

I am attaching the Google Form that we're sending out to potential volunteers, and I would greatly appreciate it if you would consider volunteering. Also, don't hesitate to call me at my cell (listed below) if you have any questions or concerns!

**Carter Johnson**

**(405) 220-2214**
**

subject: what will your TRUTH SOCIAL username be, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Republicans ([electrepublicans

Hello everyone,
My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades.
Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!)
As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events.
**No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate.** Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him.
Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. **But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today.**
**Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests.** [**Please, can Mike count on you to make a donation right now to his campaign and help him defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect the Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41877152/330702955/-42398318?refcode=em20220216mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmQ0MTFkNi01YzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_faQZZXiHPLaqQfhsKfmHw52b8x2_WbvIGfpXZL-5VU=)

I’ve seen Michael completely at ease when speaking with international leaders and just as easily as the farmers he worked for some 45 years ago. He is the most engaging, level-headed, smart, and practical person I’ve ever known. He is a remarkable man with an unbelievable ability to get things done.
But at this stage of the campaign, Mike’s candidacy will be measured and scrutinized by how much campaign funds he can raise. Please help Iowa get a Senator the state needs.
Thank you for everything you can do,
Jordan Franken

clean_body: = Hello everyone, My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades. Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!) As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events. No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate. Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him. Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today. Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’ve seen Michael completely at ease when speaking with international leaders and just as easily as the farmers he worked for some 45 years ago. He is the most engaging, level-headed, smart, and practical person I’ve ever known. He is a remarkable man with an unbelievable ability to get things done. But at this stage of the campaign, Mike’s candidacy will be measured and scrutinized by how much campaign funds he can raise. Please help Iowa get a Senator the state needs. Thank you for everything you can do, Jordan Franken Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

One of the reasons I’m running for the U.S. Senate is because Georgia needs a Senator who will champion the Second Amendment, and the rest of our Constitutional rights. **I’ll stand in that gap.[Will you stand with me? name: Team Never Again
subject: Destroying, Hiding,... Flushing?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
We all know that throughout his time in office, Donald Trump made it his life's mission to flush the ideals of democracy down the toilet. But team, did you know that he actually DID clog White House toilets with official documents? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41877264/330703515/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZjg1NTc2LTVlOGYtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oLihfwjLry0vgQwoAm0Dqp1aS6NBqfbR9Xn_ATm3aIE=&emci=1f31f13b-3e8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32f85576-5e8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) We all know that throughout his time in office, Donald Trump made it his life's mission to flush the ideals of democracy down the toilet. **But team, did you know that he actually DID clog White House toilets with official documents?**

We didn't either, but last week, a former White House correspondent came forward and delivered the crappy news. Apparently, White House staffers would periodically find wadded-up pieces of official documents clogging the toilets of the Presidential residence. **This is serious team, not only seriously nasty, but seriously illegal.**

According to the Presidential Records Act of 1978, there are very specific guidelines to how official records should be preserved during and after the presidency. Because of this and other accounts of Trump mishandling, hiding, and destroying government documents, the National Archives has asked the Department of Justice to open an investigation on Donald Trump, and serious criminal charges could ensue.

While the Justice Department focuses on Donald Trump, we're focusing on another stain on our democracy: the Treason Caucus. **We are getting ready to wipe them away this November and keep them from further backing up our government, but to do that, we need your help.**

**[Today, will you chip in a small donation of $5 or $10 to help us meet our mid-month goal of $10,000? Your donation will help us conduct extensive voter outreach and help support our grassroots-based accountability movement.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41877265/330703516/-730306332?refcode=em22_220216_MM1F_fndd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220216_MM1F_fndd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZjg1NTc2LTVlOGYtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oLihfwjLry0vgQwoAm0Dqp1aS6NBqfbR9Xn_ATm3aIE=)**

Thank you for keeping our fundraising on a roll,

Team Never Again

clean_body: We all know that throughout his time in office, Donald Trump made it his life's mission to flush the ideals of democracy down the toilet. But team, did you know that he actually DID clog White House toilets with official documents? We all know that throughout his time in office, Donald Trump made it his life's mission to flush the ideals of democracy down the toilet. But team, did you know that he actually DID clog White House toilets with official documents? We didn't either, but last week, a former White House correspondent came forward and delivered the crappy news. Apparently, White House staffers would periodically find wadded-up pieces of official documents clogging the toilets of the Presidential residence. This is serious team, not only seriously nasty, but seriously illegal. According to the Presidential Records Act of 1978, there are very specific guidelines to how official records should be preserved during and after the presidency. Because of this and other accounts of Trump mishandling, hiding, and destroying government documents, the National Archives has asked the Department of Justice to open an investigation on Donald Trump, and serious criminal charges could ensue. While the Justice Department focuses on Donald Trump, we're focusing on another stain on our democracy: the Treason Caucus. We are getting ready to wipe them away this November and keep them from further backing up our government, but to do that, we need your help. = Thank you for keeping our fundraising on a roll, Team Never Again Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. body:
| | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=2309118bc1&e=c2296cffff)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| **You're Invited:
Town Hall to discuss Military and Veterans Issues! All are welcome to join! **
---
|
Hi Friend,

Veterans issues are paramount to Amanda Makki. That's why we're inviting you to join Amanda as she listens and discusses issues facing Pinellas County Veterans. She wants to hear from you on topics like VA healthcare, benefits and suggestions on how your Congress person can better serve you and your family on these issues.

[A new poll](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=2ae0743460&e=c2296cffff) shows the majority of veterans support less US military engagement abroad. Amanda wants to hear your thoughts on the current situation with Russia and Ukraine. How do you feel about the care at Bay Pines? What can be done better?

**Keep scrolling to send Amanda your questions that she could read and address during the Town Hall! **

Amanda is passionate about our active duty military, our veterans, and their families. Mark your calendar to join her for this important conversation.

Wednesday, March 2nd
6:30-8:00 p.m.
Bunker Event Space next to Conservative Grounds Coffee, Largo
Refreshments will be served!

[RSVP Now](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=0e62bc387c&e=c2296cffff) and see you soon!

Team Makki

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Outdated and downright discriminatory
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41877622/330704851/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmZlMjg1Mi02MDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LdZPXQNZYAfMyIyhniNr_qDPY2IdYg6UJrCR5ts1OsQ=&emci=bd182793-508f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=72fe2852-608f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9818364)
---

| | I want to take a moment to update you on a problem that has my attention, one we must address as quickly and efficiently as possible. **Our health care system is short on life-saving blood donations in part, due to outdated – and downright discriminatory – rules about who can give blood.** The backstory is pretty much exactly what you'd expect. As the AIDS epidemic gripped America a generation ago, rules were put in place restricting blood donations from the LGBTQ+ community. Today, those rules are not only outdated — they're downright discriminatory, and are having a dangerous impact on our nation's health care system. They exclude potential blood donors for no good reason whatsoever when there is an urgent need for these donations. **Because here's the bottom line: if someone passes a required screening, why shouldn't they be able to give blood to save lives?** Exactly. They _should_ be able to. And that's what I want to fix. **I'm working on this at the federal level, pushing the Biden administration and FDA to scrap this outdated rule. I'll continue fighting tooth and nail to do away with this discriminatory rule against LGBTQ+ Americans once and for all.** Stay tuned. The more awareness we can bring to this issue, the better. I'll be exploring every possible path forward to fix this problem. _Ron_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | I want to take a moment to update you on a problem that has my attention, one we must address as quickly and efficiently as possible. Our health care system is short on life-saving blood donations in part, due to outdated – and downright discriminatory – rules about who can give blood. The backstory is pretty much exactly what you'd expect. As the AIDS epidemic gripped America a generation ago, rules were put in place restricting blood donations from the LGBTQ+ community. Today, those rules are not only outdated — they're downright discriminatory, and are having a dangerous impact on our nation's health care system. They exclude potential blood donors for no good reason whatsoever when there is an urgent need for these donations. Because here's the bottom line: if someone passes a required screening, why shouldn't they be able to give blood to save lives? Exactly. They should be able to. And that's what I want to fix. I'm working on this at the federal level, pushing the Biden administration and FDA to scrap this outdated rule. I'll continue fighting tooth and nail to do away with this discriminatory rule against LGBTQ+ Americans once and for all. Stay tuned. The more awareness we can bring to this issue, the better. I'll be exploring every possible path forward to fix this problem. name: Greg Casar
subject: The negative ads are here: Help us fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Peter,
It’s sad but it’s true. My opponent is relentlessly attacking me and my work on affordable housing and our community’s fight to end homelessness. No matter what negative attacks they bring, we’re not backing down from our commitment to justice and decent housing for all .
Peter, my Democratic opponent is spending tens of thousands of dollars attacking me with right-wing talking points on TV and in mailboxes. Can you pitch in $25 right now to help us share our POSITIVE, progressive vision for working families in Texas? With early voting already underway, your support helps us defend against these Republican-style attacks. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.16_email]
HELP US FIGHT BACK >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.16_email]
I’m so proud of our campaign, Peter . Together we’re reaching new voters every day and sharing our positive vision for working families. I’m proud to stand by my record of fighting for working families and the most vulnerable people. See for yourself.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.16_email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.16_email]
If I’m elected to Congress, I’ll deliver on even more affordable housing for Texas families. I’ll work to put a roof over the heads of unhoused Texans and fight to protect tenants from eviction–something I’m proud to have fought for on the Austin City Council.
Texas families deserve leadership that will fight and deliver on progressive policies, not negative and misleading ads with right-wing talking points. Can you pitch in $25 right now to help us fight back against negative ads and turn out voters in this final stretch? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.16_email]
Thank you for being on this team,
-Greg
P.S. If you’re willing to volunteer, we’re hosting a virtual phone bank THIS Thursday to Get Out The Vote— click here to RSVP [https://www.mobilize.us/gregcasarforcongress/event/441217/] !
DONATE: ELECTION DAY IS 13 DAYS AWAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.16_email]

| Peter, The fight for cannabis legalization is moving forward in Maryland! Democrats in the Maryland House of Delegates are working to put a question on the ballot in 2022 that would legalize cannabis statewide if passed. John proudly stands with the legislative leaders spearheading this effort. It's past time for legalization, expungement, and a thriving cannabis industry with robust participation of businesses owned by people of color and women. _**[But we want to know what you think — do you agree that we need to legalize cannabis here in Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41878511/330710522/-1445782109?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODdjNGYwNC02MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERG1tPeh-yn-2mXLAd9BVyao19xPNHgibq91SCSmKz4=&emci=f6a35b04-c58e-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f87c4f04-638f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_

| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41878512/330710523/-1445782109?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODdjNGYwNC02MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERG1tPeh-yn-2mXLAd9BVyao19xPNHgibq91SCSmKz4=&emci=f6a35b04-c58e-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f87c4f04-638f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
---
Cannabis prohibition has a dark history, where Black and brown people have disproportionately been targeted by restrictive legislation. According to a report published by the Maryland General Assembly, while approximately 30% of Marylanders are Black, Black people were targeted in 54% of cannabis arrests in 2019. We must be cognizant of this history and the continuing racial disparities in our state and let these factors motivate us to legalize cannabis and expunge the records of non-violent offenders. Additionally, we must ensure that people of color who are trying to make a living in the cannabis industry are supported by guaranteed loans so their businesses have the opportunity to flourish. _**[It’s time to legalize cannabis while also taking these restorative steps to address racial injustice. Will you please voice your support for legalizing cannabis by signing our petition today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41878513/330710524/-1445782109?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODdjNGYwNC02MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERG1tPeh-yn-2mXLAd9BVyao19xPNHgibq91SCSmKz4=&emci=f6a35b04-c58e-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f87c4f04-638f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_ | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41878514/330710526/-1445782109?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODdjNGYwNC02MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERG1tPeh-yn-2mXLAd9BVyao19xPNHgibq91SCSmKz4=&emci=f6a35b04-c58e-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f87c4f04-638f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)

body:
This’ll take a few minutes. But, I hope you can take the time to read it.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
My race is too tight to fall short of any fundraising goal.

|
---

| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41878680/330711221/1129282168?refcode=20220216_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzQwMjc2Yy02MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nlb7TPeNxlpRh9pirbOuFqvUc0yFr1s6oro2m4lUqag=) | [**_I want to explain why your first donation will help me flip this seat for Democrats in this critical Election Year. But if you’re short on time, could you chip in your first $10 before midnight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41878682/330711223/1129282168?refcode=20220216_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzQwMjc2Yy02MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nlb7TPeNxlpRh9pirbOuFqvUc0yFr1s6oro2m4lUqag=)
---|---

My campaign has come a long way since I first launched.

\-- Nebraska’s biggest paper called this race “too close to call”
\-- I’ve earned endorsements from Senator Bob Kerrey and Nebraskans across my district
\-- House Democrats added my district to their Watch List to flip in November

I’m incredibly humbled by this support.

[**But to keep this momentum going, I need to hit my Midnight Goal of $1,100.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41878684/330711225/1129282168?refcode=20220216_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzQwMjc2Yy02MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nlb7TPeNxlpRh9pirbOuFqvUc0yFr1s6oro2m4lUqag=)

[**_I don’t have special interest friends I can rely on like my Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, does. I rely on grassroots supporters, like you, to fund my campaign because I believe in the power of everyday people. That’s why it’s so important I keep up our fundraising momentum. I wish I didn’t have to ask hard working Americans for money, but I need to if I’m going to stay competitive with my Republican opponent’s deep pockets. Can I count on you to chip in $10 before midnight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41878686/330711227/1129282168?refcode=20220216_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzQwMjc2Yy02MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nlb7TPeNxlpRh9pirbOuFqvUc0yFr1s6oro2m4lUqag=)

Everything is riding on this moment.

I need to hit this goal to make sure I can run TV ads, reach Nebraskans in every corner of my district, and keep up with my opponent’s special-interest millions.

[**_That’s why I’m asking for just $10 from you before midnight. With your support, I can keep up my fundraising momentum, make history, and flip this seat for Democrats. This is a critical Election Year and I’m going to need your help every step of the way. Will you step up before midnight and chip in $10? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41878688/330711229/1129282168?refcode=20220216_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzQwMjc2Yy02MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nlb7TPeNxlpRh9pirbOuFqvUc0yFr1s6oro2m4lUqag=)
