Fellow Conservative,

Have you ever believed in something so strongly, that you’re willing to give up everything?

**_My family did and I am thankful every day for their sacrifice._**

I was born in Havana, Cuba, and escaped Castro's Communist Revolution with my family in 1960. I grew up watching a communist dictator destroy my native country. Our family friends who remained were forced to ration food and were oppressed every single day. But Fellow Conservative, I’ve always believed that my life is blessed – and I am grateful every day that my parents risked everything to make sure that we grew up in America where we could be free! They took a chance and together, we made it to the United States.

My parents came here with nothing but through hard work they were able to provide the example and the foundation for me to live the American Dream.

**I am living proof that the American dream is real!**

[**My name is Leora Levy and I’m running for the United States Senate.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=18c10e167874422991ccc9ea830c1a6e&_e=b7M0kjyAv9oymssVktA_Ox4HbxigOf0D11LoeOVOw5qqZ0zs1JbgX3TSPTiIe35nuhkysiZkx8ll2qXJk5T2iSrKont2AGxbUt2r1Z-4FnowFSFBrubp1y9V5Grr5nh9GUfT3o_lgU8MFPQvpnt-yRlzeprEATnOO4AWf4N-omDlZErTcNnLAAeVgcVb00NR-u748oeNF-eUCvhjP6JCr2wXlPBfddxgJcl7drUxC7X_uWy4NqVxhF5Yh67CqJQrFVoTps8qzRYG2DsplxA3L_Hza5hFttAtwk6aXNNIIe5Z9iJC4s2ZD3-v5mSlwtta0O-xDUORtAMSoSO5047Uzr-tmmNk92hQD9AlCDcVJlq-bHAU-sgnqPjR5eB879bN3qmnIN52zgv8QEKeST_mT3KuQTbj_iA9bB8edCQnqPkoq8m6tvvvAddn03AHJrS7Gw1ZustvkY33DNnQqJVQ9g%3D%3D) I am running to lead the fight for freedom and to take on the far-left who want to make our country look more like Communist Cuba than the United States.

[**Will you join my team with a contribution to my campaign of $10, $25, $50, or $75 so we can win the fight for freedom together?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=18c10e167874422991ccc9ea830c1a6e&_e=b7M0kjyAv9oymssVktA_Ox4HbxigOf0D11LoeOVOw5qqZ0zs1JbgX3TSPTiIe35nuhkysiZkx8ll2qXJk5T2iSrKont2AGxbUt2r1Z-4FnowFSFBrubp1y9V5Grr5nh9GUfT3o_lgU8MFPQvpnt-yRlzeprEATnOO4AWf4N-omDlZErTcNnLAAeVgcVb00NR-u748oeNF-eUCvhjP6JCr2wXlPBfddxgJcl7drUxC7X_uWy4NqVxhF5Yh67CqJQrt0yIi0aIG0SqV-89anTJ7sQjuSlqomUaI0siXuFA3Zi076uW9djaSE034IoxKIbawM3es6QioYK8eVr-MSkbw5hI_c1IJRQE-rmnJOUBzJ1e4V4CYpqn8AmZNIQ8O-fE04BiZGaryA2HczNjcGm60tqGX1Veai-DJKCGyXfGNdf0IqZxwc1oau-THlBDPFbylF9AXJ4etbyFoMxfi3aQew%3D%3D)

[ _**DONATE**_ >> ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=18c10e167874422991ccc9ea830c1a6e&_e=b7M0kjyAv9oymssVktA_Ox4HbxigOf0D11LoeOVOw5qqZ0zs1JbgX3TSPTiIe35nuhkysiZkx8ll2qXJk5T2iSrKont2AGxbUt2r1Z-4FnowFSFBrubp1y9V5Grr5nh9GUfT3o_lgU8MFPQvpnt-yRlzeprEATnOO4AWf4N-omDlZErTcNnLAAeVgcVb00NR-u748oeNF-eUCvhjP6JCr2wXlPBfddxgJcl7drUxC7X_uWy4NqVxhF5Yh67CqJQrmTfLMAJIZZzCZE1OMKUvjOQmsc9pJgJIIvODaiLZT4WEj_oLdNil5nINbBaAa2Y-AIVvlXNSjCc2vDWvHd5_Mmbwqb0qa3XbFC7iOY-gXth8XxyklTjkBAmYAV-GzaEvDGE5u4lotrbDUKjk1Ue3DGGK7bZBXEZzjwKIxnSbFUXhM8crPhELNIMkF0b4-pmRryAVlh4O2Jbk3VYtRenyJQ%3D%3D)

For too long, Democrats in Congress have sought to undermine our freedoms and destroy the very fabric of America. I am committed to leading the fight for American Freedom promised to us by our Constitution - because I know first-hand what it’s like when you lose it.

Think about this: in the first year of Joe Biden’s presidency, we have experienced record-setting inflation and fuel prices, and encountered utter disregard for our country's founding principles, faced a humiliating and deadly retreat from Afghanistan, leaving Americans behind and losing 13 brave American soldiers... _and this is just the beginning._

There’s no doubt that radical Democrats will continue to implement their left-wing agenda - _the same agenda my family once escaped from in Cuba._ [**This is why we need your help to win back the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s assault on our values.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=18c10e167874422991ccc9ea830c1a6e&_e=b7M0kjyAv9oymssVktA_Ox4HbxigOf0D11LoeOVOw5qqZ0zs1JbgX3TSPTiIe35nuhkysiZkx8ll2qXJk5T2iSrKont2AGxbUt2r1Z-4FnowFSFBrubp1y9V5Grr5nh9GUfT3o_lgU8MFPQvpnt-yRlzeprEATnOO4AWf4N-omDlZErTcNnLAAeVgcVb00NR-u748oeNF-eUCvhjP6JCr2wXlPBfddxgJcl7drUxC7X_uWy4NqVxhF5Yh67CqJQrrVHjP80zYqxkxEmfXzKGH5iWBlrhdi0e8tKU4NVrFVKWMZld_tECkjf1bSOvaxNJfW3IDxcv8cqbNXF3Ymo3Au5yTzrlfnKs93UPdO7ShUnM_zoqC2VIJ1krQG5O2EU9Qit2_CZV00vWGi-JBO-l3WlyFQWceSNP_UeZHq6IZdGFexw9_zpOvToDW9AtnX64aTEVrc9GP5ct6YcQHJsxrg%3D%3D)

[ _**DONATE**_ >> ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=18c10e167874422991ccc9ea830c1a6e&_e=b7M0kjyAv9oymssVktA_Ox4HbxigOf0D11LoeOVOw5qqZ0zs1JbgX3TSPTiIe35nuhkysiZkx8ll2qXJk5T2iSrKont2AGxbUt2r1Z-4FnowFSFBrubp1y9V5Grr5nh9GUfT3o_lgU8MFPQvpnt-yRlzeprEATnOO4AWf4N-omDlZErTcNnLAAeVgcVb00NR-u748oeNF-eUCvhjP6JCr2wXlPBfddxgJcl7drUxC7X_uWy4NqVxhF5Yh67CqJQrSH6XZYSMEt1igHitMHIUEhcdwt8sYvIMVLR3FAl4yuQ7ch_UeeHooORsahuJkeNFOci7mLhTaPM75I33mJfB7yFhFFSlkOXnlrWMdR8DzUzInxflL5uwHup9RLspIi-ATvlixVFXxfdI8L_ZOzPDASabxhpxJgrndRS9RXOaxivhdzgbfxpuCDLami1feC3EIwReVVrp3kulKXuRC6uB3g%3D%3D)

To live our shared American values, we need strong leadership that is willing to stand firm against the advance of far-left socialist, Marxist policies in our country. What we don’t need is another squishy moderate who will abandon or betray us when it comes down to the important votes.

Know this, Fellow Conservative - Joe Biden may not be on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to **Beat Back Biden** is to beat Dick Blumenthal and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done. We must restore a Republican majority in the Senate!

[**I hope I can count on you to join me taking our country back.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=18c10e167874422991ccc9ea830c1a6e&_e=b7M0kjyAv9oymssVktA_Ox4HbxigOf0D11LoeOVOw5qqZ0zs1JbgX3TSPTiIe35nuhkysiZkx8ll2qXJk5T2iSrKont2AGxbUt2r1Z-4FnowFSFBrubp1y9V5Grr5nh9GUfT3o_lgU8MFPQvpnt-yRlzeprEATnOO4AWf4N-omDlZErTcNnLAAeVgcVb00NR-u748oeNF-eUCvhjP6JCr2wXlPBfddxgJcl7drUxC7X_uWy4NqVxhF5Yh67CqJQrujp7t5a94EkXMWtivK3JcMYgkrahxasQ3fYQ1ozOVDQUPH1Zrme08pnYnX-7p_b-qq68qKVBq1UQgPRzRSxdlYNXzF6c6s9ZFDJycqG3N1Gl1YbFEvNp46M3eelkfMFiJEVMJzZtSdAGzcZkLhyGKUx_aDlq51oUSAfgSd9c3FsRGw-qeQnSk1cpgMKLJngxqXZmprCw15LIuhASD6Xs2A%3D%3D)

For America and for freedom,
Leora Levy

| | **About Leora**
_I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done._

name: Nina Turner for Us
subject: The first and most crucial step a politician can take to fight for progressive policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
If you take money from the insurance lobby, you aren’t going to fight for Medicare for All.
#

Hello Somebody!
We’ve said it before and we’ll say it again: **Show us your donors and we’ll show you who and what you’ll fight for in Washington.**
That’s why the first and most crucial step a politician can take to fight for progressive policies is to turn down donations from the corporations working against those policies in Congress.
* If you take money from the insurance lobby, you aren’t going to fight for Medicare for All.

* If you take money from the pharmaceutical lobby, you aren’t going to fight for lower drug prices.

* If you take money from Big Oil and the fossil fuel industry, you are not going to fight for environmental justice.

* If you take money from student loan providers, you aren’t going to fight for free college and canceling student debt.

* And if you take money from big corporations that are bringing in record profits while paying their workers less than a living wage, you damn sure aren’t going to fight to increase the minimum wage.

We’re doing things differently on our campaign. We’re not taking money from corporate lobbyists or corrupt Super PACs, because Nina is in this fight for working people, not the millionaires and billionaires rigging the system against the rest of us.
**We’re incredibly proud of that fact, but it does mean that from time to time we have to ask directly:**

It would go a long way toward ensuring we have the resources to win this race and send Nina Turner to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41878868/330712375/1088907945?refcode2=08ab39cd-638f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220216-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGFiMzljZC02MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2jp1UP0HlkwyDoZh1kwhBBkwKtYpZzSqSaRaxqSNBo=)**

A single $27 contribution may not seem like the kind of money that can stand up to the millions that big corporations and special interests have to throw around. But when you chip in $27 and someone else reading this does too, that’s how we fight back and win.
**We build this movement brick by brick.** One volunteer, one donation, and one vote at a time. Every single one of them matters. Nobody is taken for granted.

subject: I’ll tell you what your support allows us to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
In a race as tight as this, every vote — and every dollar — is going to count. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41879013/330713584/-1977772135?refcode=20220216_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU5ZjU2OS02NDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxhlJCj0sESLpvjSIGbGn0yEXI97XsPV7WwwQmIVJNA=)
---
Friend,

I’m not sure if you saw, but a **recent poll from USA Today and Suffolk University demonstrates just how close this race is**. The director of the Suffolk University Political Research Center called it a huge “red flag” that Governor DeSantis doesn’t even crack 50% against our campaign.

**_[Can you make a contribution of any amount right now to help us keep up this momentum and defeat Governor DeSantis in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41879014/330713585/-1977772135?refcode=20220216_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU5ZjU2OS02NDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxhlJCj0sESLpvjSIGbGn0yEXI97XsPV7WwwQmIVJNA=)_**

In a race as tight as this, every vote — and every dollar — is going to count. But asking for money is never easy, and every time someone pitches in it means the world to me. So it’s important to me that you know exactly what your contribution allows our campaign to do.

**Every time you make a donation, it means we’re able to knock on more doors, make more phone calls, and reach more voters with our message about building a Florida for all.**

Each contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up to help us mobilize voters all over the state — so that on Election Day, we can show Governor DeSantis that Floridians have had _enough_ of his antics.

And believe me, your support is going to be critical in helping us go up against the **far-right billionaires funding DeSantis’ campaign**. He’s spent years courting ideological donors who don’t even have ties to the state of Florida — and he’s going to be calling in favor after favor to help him win in November.

**We’re going to need your support to stay one step ahead of them and continue building the momentum needed to win. So if you can, please pitch in right now — together, we can defeat Ron DeSantis and get to work on building a Florida for _all_ Floridians.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: In a race as tight as this, every vote — and every dollar — is going to count. | | | | = Friend, I’m not sure if you saw, but a recent poll from USA Today and Suffolk University demonstrates just how close this race is. The director of the Suffolk University Political Research Center called it a huge “red flag” that Governor DeSantis doesn’t even crack 50% against our campaign. = In a race as tight as this, every vote — and every dollar — is going to count. But asking for money is never easy, and every time someone pitches in it means the world to me. So it’s important to me that you know exactly what your contribution allows our campaign to do. Every time you make a donation, it means we’re able to knock on more doors, make more phone calls, and reach more voters with our message about building a Florida for all. Each contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up to help us mobilize voters all over the state — so that on Election Day, we can show Governor DeSantis that Floridians have had enough of his antics. And believe me, your support is going to be critical in helping us go up against the far-right billionaires funding DeSantis’ campaign. He’s spent years courting ideological donors who don’t even have ties to the state of Florida — and he’s going to be calling in favor after favor to help him win in November. We’re going to need your support to stay one step ahead of them and continue building the momentum needed to win. So if you can, please pitch in right now — together, we can defeat Ron DeSantis and get to work on building a Florida for all Floridians. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

subject: Fauci or Rogan?

Is Joe Rogan really the problem?

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=89a443c2b3b7492ea737f04a5a6fa336&_e=gjprBkOfsGdIKtzpcZzSdo8fP20vV327ZsR0KvYZcFOpKXbUjMHh38pQti367D4YM9xTj9zsrfd6zdBXdozUD2JNB7S4OIC_SKuBf04kHpNyHFE5U8p5vW--QOt4rzIgm7pNwaKtAjl8u4pvYrILgXSdBkdqmJFKXLf6UyjR3M0fj-uAVSohMeEQnV7Fm1jL_p3vuNZWkx67Ez60qQKDYCqy0ERaSMlpnb6nZOTEV5SAfAfYMNXCAChYmuu93quKPHf0LucuOhEy3ogEG-QCT25yOdbk_OGNfmMwOvcl8vWMKJpydig8gm_Qt7vDGcav9EBMKDWnvU8xmWumN9zSiR7kxfmBY1WfUSrRuW08PGRTBjwlbtmuQ-kXfi5vJaVuswee16vzntxCgnhA1W5EhkoKcRA5lnRCUtzFW5THcXPf5eH5dXIlqT2EUDGTn6IDqUQNDklx58votyJgBlY4Ju7nATDZkjreUk9AMKORA7_lvXrYX_Aw8Rm5QOMTgzVDwDN-AYxgfPxwQGG1oY1reQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

We’ve been living with COVID for nearly two years now, but some Americans are regrettably still holed up in their basements, nearly as afraid to go out into public as Joe Biden was during his presidential campaign.

Of course, many hypocritical Democrats like Stacey Abrams and Gavin Newsom flaunt the rules, signaling that local mask mandates don’t apply to them (**yet, our children still are being required to wear them in school.**)

The livelihoods of thousands of truckers and health care workers hang in the balance because of these unwarranted vaccine mandates. **BUT it seems that the only thing the Left is focused on doing is canceling Joe Rogan for asking the wrong questions.**

That’s right...inflation is the highest it’s been in 40+ years, the supply chain is a mess, hospitals and other businesses are in desperate need of workers, and **gas prices are up 48%** since President Trump left office.

But Joe Rogan is the problem?? **Give me a break...!**

clean_body: I’ll be honest with you, the road ahead won’t be easy. | = | Hi Peter, it’s Anna, Valerie’s Campaign Manager. I’ll be honest with you, the road ahead won’t be easy. We know North Carolina is going to be a major battleground state in 2022, and Republicans will be flooding the state with dark money to discredit Valerie and other Democrats. That is why we need your help. = | = Peter, this seat is an integral part of Democrats' plan to defend the House majority. However, there’s a lot of uncertainty in this race, so we need to be prepared for anything that comes our way. We still don't have official district lines drawn, and we don't know how the courts will rule on the maps released last night and today — but Valerie is in this race! Your contribution, no matter the amount , helps ensure our campaign has the resources to persevere through whatever comes our way. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for stepping up. | Listen – I’ll be honest with you: there’s a lot of things no one tells you before you run for Congress.
* Your feet are going to hurt like hell.
* Your hands are going to swell up from shaking so many hands.
* You’ll make more phone calls in 6 months than you have in your entire life.
* You’ll need to ask people for money – _a lot._
* _[**But you will love every second of it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41879377/330715190/-2096412469?refcode=20220216_em_fr_b1_beforerunning_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTVjNTE4NS02NjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZiCfsiuIskMHsm5PWlGNTLEPwpnvhLckDORaJbUQE8=) Every conversation at every doorstep will fill you with energy for the next one, and you’ll feel more connected with your community than ever before._

I’ve learned so much from the people of PA-18 since launching my campaign.
My favorite moments in this campaign have come from connecting with the community and hearing their stories. _They keep me going._
They also keep my campaign running by fueling my grassroots movement. Unlike other candidates, I don’t take corporate PAC donations, and I’m not bought by special interests.
They deserve a leader in Congress who won’t be bought, who will listen to the issues that matter most to them, and who fight for the change that they’ve waited far too long for.
[**_I’m determined to be that leader, but the only way I’ll win this race is through grassroots support from people like you. name: Aramis Ayala
subject: We need to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Aramis Ayala for Congress
body:
This important bill is languishing in the Senate, but I promise to always vote for and advance voting rights measures.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41879549/330715893/-1888922884?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.12.21_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.16_b1_jl_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzgwNzQzMS02NzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glo4-5U9CMTxzHgD_xDSz4jcuyWJKZ9a58M-YrhOt3Y=)
---
Peter,

I had the immense honor of getting to know Congressman John Lewis. A giant of the Civil Rights Movement, our Black communities and our country at large is better for his tireless, lifelong fight for equal rights. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41879550/330715894/-1888922884?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.16_b1_JL_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.16_b1_jl_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzgwNzQzMS02NzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glo4-5U9CMTxzHgD_xDSz4jcuyWJKZ9a58M-YrhOt3Y=) One of his major battles, as I’m sure you know, was to gain access to the ballot box in a Jim Crow South that made it nearly impossible for African Americans to vote.

Now, Congress has an opportunity to add to his legacy by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. This bill would strengthen the 1965 VRA, a law that codified many of the measures that Lewis almost died fighting for.

This important bill is languishing in the Senate, but I promise to always vote for and advance voting rights measures.

**[Peter, please donate $5 so I can honor John Lewis’s legacy and keep fighting in Washington for equal rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41879551/330715895/-1888922884?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.16_b1_JL_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.16_b1_jl_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzgwNzQzMS02NzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glo4-5U9CMTxzHgD_xDSz4jcuyWJKZ9a58M-YrhOt3Y=)** | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41879552/330715897/-1888922884?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.16_b1_JL_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.16_b1_jl_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzgwNzQzMS02NzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glo4-5U9CMTxzHgD_xDSz4jcuyWJKZ9a58M-YrhOt3Y=)

We must always honor those who came before us -- in Black History Month and the rest of the year. The civil rights causes that Rep. Lewis championed are not over, and we must take care to make sure his struggles and the struggles of so many African Americans to participate in our democracy were not in vain.

Aramis Ayala is an award-winning advocate for justice reform and human rights. As Florida’s first Black State Attorney, she has devoted more than two decades to public service and building safer, healthier communities. Aramis’s unflinching commitment to justice earned national headlines when she went head-to-head against former governor Rick Scott to oppose the death penalty. She has successfully established innovative pre-trial diversion programs, published a historic Brady list of questionable police, advanced public transparency, and accountability of law enforcement, halted pre-trial deportations, and expanded support for survivors of domestic violence and human trafficking. Her work has won accolades from the Florida ACLU’s Campaign for Criminal Justice Reform, and the Southern Poverty Law Center. An educator, cancer survivor, and mother of two, Aramis is running for Congress to deliver a bold, forward-focused vision that restores public trust and guarantees an equitable future for all of us.

clean_body: This important bill is languishing in the Senate, but I promise to always vote for and advance voting rights measures. | = Peter, I had the immense honor of getting to know Congressman John Lewis. A giant of the Civil Rights Movement, our Black communities and our country at large is better for his tireless, lifelong fight for equal rights. = One of his major battles, as I’m sure you know, was to gain access to the ballot box in a Jim Crow South that made it nearly impossible for African Americans to vote. Now, Congress has an opportunity to add to his legacy by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. This bill would strengthen the 1965 VRA, a law that codified many of the measures that Lewis almost died fighting for. This important bill is languishing in the Senate, but I promise to always vote for and advance voting rights measures. = | = = = = = = We must always honor those who came before us -- in Black History Month and the rest of the year. The civil rights causes that Rep. Lewis championed are not over, and we must take care to make sure his struggles and the struggles of so many African Americans to participate in our democracy were not in vain. = Thank you, Aramis Ayala | | Paid for by Aramis Ayala for Congress. Her work has won accolades from the Florida ACLU’s Campaign for Criminal Justice Reform, and the Southern Poverty Law Center. name: Kevin Schilling, Team Kilmer
subject: Did you catch the overalls, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Making sure you saw this message from Derek, Peter.

Derek is a fighter for the people in Congress. He works tirelessly to secure the investments hard-working Americans deserve. But Derek needs help from this grassroots team to reach our grassroots fundraising goal before tonight's mid-month deadline.

[**We 're only $572 short of our goal, and anything you can give will help Derek focus on fighting for us in Congress. Will you chip in before our mid-month deadline at midnight tonight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/praXgdnrdfek-F1yi-OLuICaFj1jAePsq2QQdWSy6hw=/RyMhfbEm93fdfV6xpPoYbER-t9AV9100GKOT6zZ2D2U=?refcode=em22_220216_MM2_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220216_MM2_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email
)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Derek Kilmer
Date: Tue, Feb 15, 2022
Subject: Serving this community

Team, I always knew that I wanted to make a difference in my community, but back when this photo was taken, I didn't know exactly what that would look like.

I was born and raised on the Olympic Peninsula, the proud son of two public school teachers. Growing up, I saw firsthand how economic struggles impacted our community and the families in it. I saw how resilient people could be even in the toughest of times, and I learned that the only way forward is by moving forward together.

I've made it my mission in Congress to find ways to bring more economic opportunities to more people in more places. While these last few years have presented a lot of challenges, we've made progress providing economic relief for working families and Main Street employers, rebuilding and modernizing our infrastructure, and defending Social Security.

Peter, I know there's plenty more to do. I am still fighting to make our economy - and our Congress - work better for the folks I represent. And today, I need your help.

[**Our grassroots supporters are critical to keeping me in this fight. We 're facing a $5,000 mid-month deadline tomorrow at midnight, and my team tells me we're only $1,310 short of our goal. Will you chip in whatever you can before the deadline to keep me fighting for progress in Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/praXgdnrdfek-F1yi-OLuICaFj1jAePsq2QQdWSy6hw=/RyMhfbEm93fdfV6xpPoYbER-t9AV9100GKOT6zZ2D2U=?refcode=em22_220216_MM2_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220216_MM2_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email)

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/praXgdnrdfek-F1yi-OLuICaFj1jAePsq2QQdWSy6hw=/RyMhfbEm93fdfV6xpPoYbER-t9AV9100GKOT6zZ2D2U=?refcode=em22_220216_MM2_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220216_MM2_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email)

But Derek needs help from this grassroots team to reach our grassroots fundraising goal before tonight's mid-month deadline. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Derek Kilmer Date: Tue, Feb 15, 2022 Subject: Serving this community Team, I always knew that I wanted to make a difference in my community, but back when this photo was taken, I didn't know exactly what that would look like. I was born and raised on the Olympic Peninsula, the proud son of two public school teachers. Growing up, I saw firsthand how economic struggles impacted our community and the families in it. I saw how resilient people could be even in the toughest of times, and I learned that the only way forward is by moving forward together. I've made it my mission in Congress to find ways to bring more economic opportunities to more people in more places. While these last few years have presented a lot of challenges, we've made progress providing economic relief for working families and Main Street employers, rebuilding and modernizing our infrastructure, and defending Social Security. Peter, I know there's plenty more to do. I am still fighting to make our economy - and our Congress - work better for the folks I represent. And today, I need your help. It's an honor to serve you, Derek Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Aadland campaign declares debate victory
body:
---
| | | | | | Volume 29 | February 16, 2022
---
|
---
| Aadland campaign declares debate victory
---
| | |
---|---
|
From the Aadland for Congress campaign:

Republican candidate Erik Aadland dominated the competition in the first debate for Colorado Congressional District 7. Erik showed his experience and thoughtfulness in attacking the problems facing Coloradans--and all Americans.

The forum, hosted by the Foothills Republican Club tested five contenders Tuesday night on various issues, ranging from national security and the situation in Ukraine, to the price of gas here at home in Colorado. Tough questions were presented by Dick Wadhams, former chair of the Colorado Republican Party and political consultant.

Erik shined in addressing every issue in the broad variety of topics but hit a home run when it came to national security and foreign policy.

"As a combat veteran, I have seen the horrors of war ... We need to be very judicious in the use of force," said Erik. "Our military has been strained over two decades of fighting a counter insurgency war.... I would advise we exhaust every economic mean and every diplomatic mean to keep Russia in check, because guess who will take advantage of a war with Russia--China will. It's a very dangerous situation and as your Congressman I will make sure we get the military to a position of strength to address stability in the world--It has been undermined by the disaster in Afghanistan where I served."

On the topic of the economy, Erik said out of control spending must be stopped so that crushing inflation does not continue to strangle Coloradans and all Americans. He out that returning to energy independence and becoming a global supplier as a way of stimulating the economy and contributing to our safety in the world.

While acknowledging that skyrocketing crime must be handled at a state and local level, Erik pledged his support for the men and women in blue.

"We must have a strong message of support for law enforcement, ensuring their resources and their power to do their jobs," Erik said. "We also need to talk about our Attorneys General who are failing to prosecute, and the liberal policies that allow criminals to get booked, put in prison and then get out again. We need to be tough on crime--it's foundational to a functioning society. Our freedoms are dependent on our ability to feel safe and secure, and as a member of Congress I will do everything I can to empower law enforcement and support their ability to do their job with integrity and respect and dignity."

While the other candidates also gave their thoughts, Erik demonstrated a complete understanding of the impact of bad policy on Coloradans and was able to offer solutions to local to global issues.

"I intend to be representative that represents all the people of Congressional District 7 no matter what their affiliation--Republican, Democrat, and Unaffiliated."
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This week we continued the celebration of small business with our Brewery Tour of CD7.

And, Erik dominated at the first Candidate Forum.

Check our schedule below, and come out to see Erik, talk one-on-one about issues that are important to you.

---

---

There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff

Turkey Creek Rd. in Evergreen | | == | | | Fremont County Republican Meeting | Tuesday Feb 22nd 6:00PM: Erik will address the Fremont Republicans at their Headquarters in Canon City. Please join us and hear Erik address the issues concerning rural Colorado. Admission is Free Fremont Republican HQ is at 603 Main St. in Canon City | | | == | | | | Happy Hour at 6 and 40 Brewery in Lakewood Wednesday Feb 23rd 5:00PM: Join Erik for Happy Hour conversation and fine craft beer in Lakewood. Bring your questions and comments for one-on-one conversation with the frontrunner in Colorado's District 7 Congressional race 6 and 40 Brewery is at 883 Parfet St. Unit J in Lakewood | | == | | | Great Frontier Brewing Company in Lakewood Wednesday Feb 23rd 7:00PM Erik will be at Great Frontier for conversation with you about the issues you face. Bring your questions and comments for one-on-one conversation with CD7's campaign frontrunner Great Frontier Brewing Co. is at 2010 S. I’ll be on the [front lines of our protests](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlkzDVz-IUuFiAvYTVo2U-kjMZw1cEJcrBjL1n0B_57PYkby57l-MV0HSW1Om_Bq9X2LPWrxNzVr6L-sn6neY4abV4eYPRlEvSuiwRkG1np-a9Wv0P3p7_xTHBMXXxOgiaD7Io54RTvIX97onFNrAi3n6dAXIwCx8HTPh54pY0IccOpRlZGP8UkRI1yF3sVyyf_LgtC1h0DfPRX7HoiFTjrgujWMmhhl-WDKtLG5tMKy9u3JHgo0YEku3X4xsM6Ok15oL0VbAf_vkwKzgDud2u3WFLp22b7TVkZ-at4_jYvZGoucedXCe6X0WBCYwC5nH6pCabVqk-hH1tgL9o0pRisj2EESUigk_5iOw0aCvz-utmsTrJCrUzRpuUKJRzivSVuiQlnuLVdGFOs04s6BVRo/3jm/n9580kpcQoy0in8fo53AvQ/h2/fFA_QE2UVh2LYDB7Dg9_35TXNln6WV0OkkYNfCGF9pQ) for racial justice demanding accountability. I will do whatever it takes to win progress for my community - inside or outside of Congress. **Democratic strategists think there is some special speech their candidates can give to convince voters to forgive them for not getting anything done. They are wrong.** We want leaders who **fight** for the policies we desperately need. [**Team, we are tired of waiting. It’s time for a new generation of leadership. * We demand that Democrats renew the expanded Child Tax Credit.
* We demand that Democrats protect our voting rights.
* We demand that Democrats pass common sense gun control.
* We demand that Democrats protect our reproductive rights.
* We demand that Democrats fund our communities, our schools, our workers.

We demand that Democrats do better. **And if our leaders can’t come together, and act, it is time to elect a new generation of Democrats who are ready to do what needs to be done. No more waiting.** In solidarity, Kina Collins

clean_body: Americans support the policy, they are tired of waiting. | | | Dear Team, I co-authored the Council on Women & Girls act and got it passed with a Republican Governor.I know how to get things done, but I also know that when politicians stop listening, we the people will take our fight to the streets. I am ready to stand in solidarity at any walkout. I’ll be on the for racial justice demanding accountability. I will do whatever it takes to win progress for my community - inside or outside of Congress. Democratic strategists think there is some special speech their candidates can give to convince voters to forgive them for not getting anything done. They are wrong. We want leaders who fight for the policies we desperately need. We demand that Democrats renew the expanded Child Tax Credit. We demand that Democrats protect our voting rights. We demand that Democrats pass common sense gun control. We demand that Democrats protect our reproductive rights. We demand that Democrats fund our communities, our schools, our workers. We demand that Democrats do better. And if our leaders can’t come together, and act, it is time to elect a new generation of Democrats who are ready to do what needs to be done. No more waiting.** In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

subject: Tomorrow: Join me & Candace for an evening in Baltimore!
body:

| | Peter, The radical Left is trying to brainwash America’s youth into hating our country. **_Our public school system is trying to radicalize our children with critical race theory, sex education and pro-LGBT propaganda_**.

Like many Virginians, I recognize that we need to fix our woke school system [**IMMEDIATELY**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=b176291069&e=af4b86f5c6)!

The Left has taken **_God_** out of the school system and replaced Him with woke ideologies. I cannot stand for this. Support my campaign so I can be elected to Congress and work to fix the **_indoctrination machines_** that are public schools.

Far-Left radicals like Rep. Luria and AOC will do anything they can to push American children to change their gender, develop race hatred and turn against Capitalism. [**_They want to manipulate our children into lazy, faithless SJWs but we have to say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH_**!](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=de6dde42b3&e=af4b86f5c6)

[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=8010d68f26&e=af4b86f5c6)

If you are a Virginian who wants to remove the Left’s dangerous rhetoric from our schools, donate to my campaign. Freedom-loving Americans nationwide need to band together and we can win this fight!

A donation of $10, $20 or $50 can have a tremendous impact on my campaign so I can get Democrat Elaine Luria out of office! [**_Virginia deserves more_**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=36340d374f&e=af4b86f5c6). Our state needs Republicans that put Americans first and keep communism, critical race theory and other dangerous viewpoints **_AWAY_** from our youth!

Thank you for your generosity.

**Jarome Bell
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=fc272ddbeb&e=af4b86f5c6)

Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd.
Republican Candidate for Congress**

P.S.: [It is time to fight back against our woke school systems! We cannot let the Left continue brainwashing American children into radical Antifa supporters. Support my campaign so your voice can be represented in Congress and I can lead a fight to fix our education system. Your support is much appreciated](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=1915cfbe6b&e=af4b86f5c6).

clean_body: | = | | POLLING UPDATE: Haley is virtually TIED with her opponent! = | | | = This polling confirms what we already knew – this race is going to be close. This election will be decided by what we do in these next few months and which team turns out the most voters – but Haley sure as heck won’t be outworked. Remember, she’s running in a district that she’s already won – twice. Haley’s campaign strategy is centered around going everywhere and talking to everyone. That’s why we’ve been out on the road all week as part of our 15 Towns Listening Tour. We’re doing everything we can to introduce Haley to new voters and connect with current constituents. But being on the road so much leaves less time for fundraising, so we’re relying on more folks to contribute to emails like this one. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks, team! – Jeremy Jeremy Levinson Campaign Manager, Team Haley | | = | If you'd like to support Haley Stevens for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Please join me at the upcoming President's Day Congressional Dinner on Monday, Feb. 21st so that we can unite in our cause to reclaim our state and country from the tyranny of the radical Left. Tickets for the dinner can be purchased ==. | == | == | == | == | == | | | == | I look forward to celebrating how we live in the greatest nation on earth at the Presidents Day Congressional Dinner with you. Our state and country are worth saving and I look forward to discussing how we are going to accomplish that together, in person then! I look forward to meeting you and getting acquainted on how we will restore the rightful ruling of government together, and rejecting the tyrannical behavior of the radical Left and establishment RINOs. body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lT0yebBRUxe249bkzXbJ7yo8XG_4nZU_hcse9STEhDgPS5F8GHO_g8sRLLtreWh1P46IcQVHTRzRALQ7DB3bdBIK_sg-wt60bgGukbtAJbId8T8f2sF08PV4_ivZ8imXzpTWC0wfINNIywG2dg9As2pNYxusab_y9UoluGUrIDhbAuEjZvYRw==&c=ICNUNai1H9d1WzI01upJNwNUGNJn4cTUbUVPPJsgPQzgH31aeTKfuQ==&ch=YCPCPx9WKTxNFhx9XcBzFMjljpdldBC7d3FGMCGwWS88OLuLfaht4g==)

|

| |

| Dear Peter ,
---
| We have a quick favor to ask.
Many of you have wanted to see more TV and radio interviews of Kathy...and now we have a chance to make it happen!
We're asking that you reach out to Wendy Bell, who has a nationally syndicated radio show and a brand new show coming to Newsmax TV called Wendy Bell Common Sense.
All you need to do is click one of the links below to send her a message. With enough requests, we can get Kathy on the air to spread her message nationwide!
---
| | | [SEND A MESSAGE HERE - GET KATHY ON TV](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lT0yebBRUxe249bkzXbJ7yo8XG_4nZU_hcse9STEhDgPS5F8GHO_g8sRLLtreWh558_Xoqqg7r9EzwN--n0k-FAR2nHEo597ig0kToEi_DwR02_Qnp69MlN063bFz5y_rcRS5nGLCdBmrVP7qHSKhvrEM4nbV3f&c=ICNUNai1H9d1WzI01upJNwNUGNJn4cTUbUVPPJsgPQzgH31aeTKfuQ==&ch=YCPCPx9WKTxNFhx9XcBzFMjljpdldBC7d3FGMCGwWS88OLuLfaht4g==)
---
| | | [SEND A MESSAGE HERE - GET KATHY ON THE RADIO](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lT0yebBRUxe249bkzXbJ7yo8XG_4nZU_hcse9STEhDgPS5F8GHO_g8sRLLtreWhdKN7r4aZjko_XdziPNQGxZItALwyNfNnoXEuCrS4DYcEk0qfubpK1J1FjcCF4qmGQ-6Qz7u-VVV8180ewWMETrlkX92Zt6Xe&c=ICNUNai1H9d1WzI01upJNwNUGNJn4cTUbUVPPJsgPQzgH31aeTKfuQ==&ch=YCPCPx9WKTxNFhx9XcBzFMjljpdldBC7d3FGMCGwWS88OLuLfaht4g==)
---
| We don't have the luxury of spending MILLIONS of dollars on TV ads - but we do have the strongest grassroots supporters in PA who can create change without the help of out-of-state millionaires.
But you can make a difference by requesting to hear Kathy on Wendy Bell's shows! [Click here to send Wendy a message!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lT0yebBRUxe249bkzXbJ7yo8XG_4nZU_hcse9STEhDgPS5F8GHO_g8sRLLtreWh558_Xoqqg7r9EzwN--n0k-FAR2nHEo597ig0kToEi_DwR02_Qnp69MlN063bFz5y_rcRS5nGLCdBmrVP7qHSKhvrEM4nbV3f&c=ICNUNai1H9d1WzI01upJNwNUGNJn4cTUbUVPPJsgPQzgH31aeTKfuQ==&ch=YCPCPx9WKTxNFhx9XcBzFMjljpdldBC7d3FGMCGwWS88OLuLfaht4g==)
Thanks for your continued support,
Team Kathy

name: Team Benson
subject: Demand petition circulators be honest
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

Michigan’s petition process is an important democratic tool for Michiganders to leverage their voice and change laws at the grassroots level.
But not when it's hijacked by misinformation artists peddling lies and deceiving petition signers.

Right now, there are paid petition circulators lying to Michigan voters by providing false statements about their petitions. Why is this such a big deal?

If an initiative collects signatures from just 8% of Michigan’s voters, the Legislature can adopt it into law – without the Governor’s signature or a vote of the people. In other words: the Legislature and a tiny sliver of voters could enact policies without statewide voter approval.

For example, a reporter was approached by a petition circulator for an initiative that would establish tax breaks for individuals and corporations that donated to non-public education. The circulator's pitch? “We are gathering signatures to help special needs kids.”

Another petition circulator was recorded soliciting signatures for a petition that would curtail the protection powers of state and local health officials. The circulator’s pitch? “Stop the spread of COVID-19.”

Lying - whether it’s about special needs children or COVID-19 - shouldn’t be a part of our petition process. But unfortunately, we live in a political environment where extremists are directly incentivizing these actions.

Below is a petition without any lies: Sign your name if you support Jocelyn’s effort to ensure we have an honest petition process.

Sign here>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1Y2N2FnJh06nGyEUIox1lw2

Team Benson

To unsubscribe, please click here: unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/505871a0-9a8e-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/dc779266-6b8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzc3OTI2Ni02YjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62tMOoUCSRh-RRf34Il2rwAXkKN_DHUuY-_wsu_UQhM=&id=112210963

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Be a delegate to the Republican State Convention
body:
Please show your support for Geoff Diehl for Governor.
| | | |
---
Be a delegate to the Republican State Convention!
Click below to watch Geoff's video message to Republican activists.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012-cEv0ujPnAfb-ViQ-uio1zbZINk8m0BNysbkdc52k4KSMziR9tinAjA56K40SqaTbiy_lQGxM0tjZMc022Q2jeFCuWM_UG1fSgXpaNt9QNureuFd_AYQmdsm5_oPVjmHITqwtqHyPoyBa1W9reifg==&c=ADMtpsNjlE8Lz5MyFCIJO_0AZiQq-wOlTMIljuVPQY_l7Db-lBFDuA==&ch=0jqSZoLV0B3VRUeV6p3GXWI2T911Sxe0bl7XeuF0aKXBKZESoOXSpw==)
---
| Hi everyone, it's Geoff Diehl.
Every four years, activists in our party get together to nominate statewide candidates for office. They're the heart and soul of our party, and they get to decide who will be on the ballot for the State Primary in September, and who will be our party's nominee for each Constitutional Office, including Governor.
This year's Republican Convention will be held on May 21 in Springfield. As a candidate for Governor, I'm asking you to get involved and volunteer to be a delegate at the Convention. It promises to be an exciting event for everyone.
Becoming a delegate is easy. This month, town and ward committees across our state are holding caucuses to elect delegates to represent their community. All you need to do is show up and ask to be elected. If chosen to serve, you'll be contacted by Republican party officials next month with details about how to sign up.
When you're there, I am hoping that you will cast your vote for me to be your next Governor. I am proud to represent our party and its ideals, and I am working hard to represent you.
If you'd like to find out more about me and my campaign for Governor, and for more information about how to serve as a convention delegate, please visit [www.GeoffDiehl.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012-cEv0ujPnAfb-ViQ-uio1zbZINk8m0BNysbkdc52k4KSMziR9tinPFlui2ReVwbeEPLFvrVxVrGV2DEtfgBuegNV_8qkAD4upE8JwHrVz5j5I6JwckDqNSHGtlF1jhSdiHR-ahNh59fthpGZPpUaw==&c=ADMtpsNjlE8Lz5MyFCIJO_0AZiQq-wOlTMIljuVPQY_l7Db-lBFDuA==&ch=0jqSZoLV0B3VRUeV6p3GXWI2T911Sxe0bl7XeuF0aKXBKZESoOXSpw==).
Thank you.
---
|
---
|
---

clean_body: Please show your support for Geoff Diehl for Governor. | | | | Be a delegate to the Republican State Convention! Click below to watch Geoff's video message to Republican activists. | == | Hi everyone, it's Geoff Diehl. Every four years, activists in our party get together to nominate statewide candidates for office. They're the heart and soul of our party, and they get to decide who will be on the ballot for the State Primary in September, and who will be our party's nominee for each Constitutional Office, including Governor. This year's Republican Convention will be held on May 21 in Springfield. As a candidate for Governor, I'm asking you to get involved and volunteer to be a delegate at the Convention. It promises to be an exciting event for everyone. Becoming a delegate is easy. This month, town and ward committees across our state are holding caucuses to elect delegates to represent their community. All you need to do is show up and ask to be elected. If chosen to serve, you'll be contacted by Republican party officials next month with details about how to sign up. When you're there, I am hoping that you will cast your vote for me to be your next Governor. I am proud to represent our party and its ideals, and I am working hard to represent you. If you'd like to find out more about me and my campaign for Governor, and for more information about how to serve as a convention delegate, please visit ==. Thank you. | | | | | Show your support for Geoff's campaign for Governor! | | | == | | | | | Paid for privately by Diehl for Massachusetts PO box 60362 Worcester, MA 01606 | Our Company | Contact Us | FAQs | Privacy Policy | | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | PO Box 60362, Worcester, MA 01606 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com in collaboration with |

| | | Dear Peter,

A little bit of snow isn't going to stop us! They are only predicting 2" - we Chicagoans can handle that.

So come on out to Millhurst Charhouse in Oakbrook Terrace tomorrow, and support Conforti for Congress!

Let's all work together and take our country back!

I look forward to seeing you!!

Be sure to enter the event through the black awning on the south side of the office building.

Niki Conforti

name: Leora Levy
subject: I escaped Communist Cuba, this is my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leora Levy for U
body:
Have you ever believed in something so strongly, that you’re willing to give up everything? | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=cd8fc1c2cd8445c5ab57ebc4ce867420&_t=_xfUSrXkQzSL67dFEKhCb8te0KhjpBWLIWo62BI25XH6EOr2Q2iDSs9We-0KLuguirSNDGxH6YAmsX1Xk0RYdpHBBqf3OYWq4vG0MbXwyVTLnFSJiLQXy86IGipuZYaQEpgq11Cgk-1mz1VGAiABos3xmOXyVP5cfXoepGRBTxk%3D).

[
](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cd8fc1c2cd8445c5ab57ebc4ce867420&_e=swBEppH-KwCjD0KRe4Chyndsvy9RRg8SDPKhE-Kb1XqyCrO02EEbexzI93I9TWZjl9k9nwlRJoaN1NXT4hxwRcN-TyZ_aDZ70QDDKMCELrq7Hf6vJarorY4623vpQ35NqXN7ZxQrEt-j3L_Sko_yxJf5hNwCApZYgcURMINwRtYmgcKc5fubohqPCjjP5UcQxKgfglUMHQEn1Geo3LtN4-uAAPV5MoAVrhRlffJmQoteayOJOY9WkIkwI8mO7ZRPY-nQoX0FaMSR4Z52mB_p9HNhL7nW6-dTkT7JiPhNt0t6xvRASY7U6XdoXgRAwhKI2k1dAXto_mUBo98-0vvGMyeT9KXMJIOvrIlPxUMhdZYdxLj4ktD0Ra1l_3bi1qE34eY69YtQfEgy9Vc_KQ3LlGYNpoVrmNQhp1ghVTq_aIgW7vcqAlB30cxhxS7g_CFB557lpmOD4lWLP4Jz6OcOpA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Have you ever believed in something so strongly, that you’re willing to give up everything?

**_My family did and I am thankful every day for their sacrifice._**

I was born in Havana, Cuba, and escaped Castro's Communist Revolution with my family in 1960. I grew up watching a communist dictator destroy my native country. Our family friends who remained were forced to ration food and were oppressed every single day. But Fellow Conservative, I’ve always believed that my life is blessed – and I am grateful every day that my parents risked everything to make sure that we grew up in America where we could be free! They took a chance and together, we made it to the United States.

My parents came here with nothing but through hard work they were able to provide the example and the foundation for me to live the American Dream.

**I am living proof that the American dream is real!**

clean_body: While Biden’s approval hits 40%, inflation hits a 40-year high. Peter, Our team sent a memo yesterday about why Biden’s approval numbers keep dropping to new lows every week. While Biden’s approval hits 40%, inflation is at a 40-year high. Mike is focused on three simple things: 1. Keeping our communities safe. 2. Holding China accountable. 3. Restoring fiscal sanity. Fully solving these issues won’t be possible until we have a common-sense Republican majority in Congress. Thanks, Patrick McNulty \-- Forwarded Message Below -- Peter, The Biden Administration isn’t feeling any love from the American people right now. Look no further than last week’s Presidential approval ratings which dropped to a new low of 40%. These numbers prove what Mike’s been saying all along: Americans need competent, common-sense leadership right now. While Democrats fund “safe smoking kits,” Mike is tackling the real issues facing our country: Defending law enforcement and fighting soft-on-crime Democrat policies. Protecting Team USA in Beijing and holding Communist China accountable. Combating radical spending and inflation –– which just hit a 40-year high. Thanks to your support, Mike is making important progress on these fronts –– but we can’t stop here. ** We need to take Congress back from Nancy Pelosi to restore America’s safety and stability. Thank you for your support, Gallagher Digital Team | | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin. | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

subject: Aadland campaign declares debate victory
body:
(corrected event dates)
---
| | | | | | Volume 29 | February 16, 2022
---
|
---
| Aadland campaign declares debate victory
---
| | |
---|---
|
From the Aadland for Congress campaign:

Republican candidate Erik Aadland dominated the competition in the first debate for Colorado Congressional District 7. Erik showed his experience and thoughtfulness in attacking the problems facing Coloradans--and all Americans.

The forum, hosted by the Foothills Republican Club tested five contenders Tuesday night on various issues, ranging from national security and the situation in Ukraine, to the price of gas here at home in Colorado. Tough questions were presented by Dick Wadhams, former chair of the Colorado Republican Party and political consultant.

Erik shined in addressing every issue in the broad variety of topics but hit a home run when it came to national security and foreign policy.

"As a combat veteran, I have seen the horrors of war ... We need to be very judicious in the use of force," said Erik. "Our military has been strained over two decades of fighting a counter insurgency war.... I would advise we exhaust every economic mean and every diplomatic mean to keep Russia in check, because guess who will take advantage of a war with Russia--China will. It's a very dangerous situation and as your Congressman I will make sure we get the military to a position of strength to address stability in the world--It has been undermined by the disaster in Afghanistan where I served."

On the topic of the economy, Erik said out of control spending must be stopped so that crushing inflation does not continue to strangle Coloradans and all Americans. He out that returning to energy independence and becoming a global supplier as a way of stimulating the economy and contributing to our safety in the world.

While acknowledging that skyrocketing crime must be handled at a state and local level, Erik pledged his support for the men and women in blue.

"We must have a strong message of support for law enforcement, ensuring their resources and their power to do their jobs," Erik said. "We also need to talk about our Attorneys General who are failing to prosecute, and the liberal policies that allow criminals to get booked, put in prison and then get out again. We need to be tough on crime--it's foundational to a functioning society. Our freedoms are dependent on our ability to feel safe and secure, and as a member of Congress I will do everything I can to empower law enforcement and support their ability to do their job with integrity and respect and dignity."

While the other candidates also gave their thoughts, Erik demonstrated a complete understanding of the impact of bad policy on Coloradans and was able to offer solutions to local to global issues.

"I intend to be representative that represents all the people of Congressional District 7 no matter what their affiliation--Republican, Democrat, and Unaffiliated."

clean_body: (corrected event dates) | | | | | | Volume 29 | February 16, 2022 | | Aadland campaign declares debate victory | | | ---|--- | From the Aadland for Congress campaign: Republican candidate Erik Aadland dominated the competition in the first debate for Colorado Congressional District 7. Erik showed his experience and thoughtfulness in attacking the problems facing Coloradans--and all Americans. The forum, hosted by the Foothills Republican Club tested five contenders Tuesday night on various issues, ranging from national security and the situation in Ukraine, to the price of gas here at home in Colorado. Tough questions were presented by Dick Wadhams, former chair of the Colorado Republican Party and political consultant. Erik shined in addressing every issue in the broad variety of topics but hit a home run when it came to national security and foreign policy. "As a combat veteran, I have seen the horrors of war ... We need to be very judicious in the use of force," said Erik. "Our military has been strained over two decades of fighting a counter insurgency war.... I would advise we exhaust every economic mean and every diplomatic mean to keep Russia in check, because guess who will take advantage of a war with Russia--China will. It's a very dangerous situation and as your Congressman I will make sure we get the military to a position of strength to address stability in the world--It has been undermined by the disaster in Afghanistan where I served." On the topic of the economy, Erik said out of control spending must be stopped so that crushing inflation does not continue to strangle Coloradans and all Americans. He out that returning to energy independence and becoming a global supplier as a way of stimulating the economy and contributing to our safety in the world. While acknowledging that skyrocketing crime must be handled at a state and local level, Erik pledged his support for the men and women in blue. "We must have a strong message of support for law enforcement, ensuring their resources and their power to do their jobs," Erik said. "We also need to talk about our Attorneys General who are failing to prosecute, and the liberal policies that allow criminals to get booked, put in prison and then get out again. We need to be tough on crime--it's foundational to a functioning society. Our freedoms are dependent on our ability to feel safe and secure, and as a member of Congress I will do everything I can to empower law enforcement and support their ability to do their job with integrity and respect and dignity." While the other candidates also gave their thoughts, Erik demonstrated a complete understanding of the impact of bad policy on Coloradans and was able to offer solutions to local to global issues. "I intend to be representative that represents all the people of Congressional District 7 no matter what their affiliation--Republican, Democrat, and Unaffiliated." | | | | Campaign Update | | ---|--- | This week we continued the celebration of small business with our Brewery Tour of CD7. And, Erik dominated at the first Candidate Forum. Check our schedule below, and come out to see Erik, talk one-on-one about issues that are important to you. | | | Every bit can help | Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today. Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff | | | == | Upcoming Events | | Plan to join us and meet Erik at one of the below events. | Brewery Parties and Debates! We continue our series of Micro Brewery Meet & Greet parties throughout Jefferson County. Plus, the Candidate Debates have begun. At each event you can purchase fine craft beers while taking advantage of the opportunity to talk one-on-one with Erik Aadland. Ask questions, discuss the campaign or just talk about beer! | | | | Aspen Lodge Bar & Grill in Westminster Wednesday Feb 16th 4:30PM to 6:00PM. Meet Erik Aadland, your candidate for Congress CD7, in person, talk one-on-one and enjoy fine craft beer! Aspen Lodge is at 8125 W. 94th Ave in Westminster | | == | | | Hoffbrau Bar & Grill in Westminster Wednesday Feb 16th at 6:30PM to 8:00PM: Come meet Erik Aadland, your candidate for Congress CD7 and hear what he will be doing on the campaign trail and what he will bring to Washington DC. Erik will talk with you One-On-One from 6:30 to 8:00pm Feb 16 Hoffbrau is at 9110 Wadsworth Blvd in Westminster | | == | | | Jeffco Liberty Coalition CD7 Congressional Debate in Evergreen Thursday Feb 17th 7:00PM: Join the Jeffco Liberty Coalition for a Congressional Candidate Debate, held in The Barn at Memorial Park in Evergreen The Coalition is composed of the South Jeffco Tea Party, The North Jeffco Tea Party and the 285 Tea Party. Come hear your CD7 Candidates for Congress Admission is free, Please RSVP at the link below to guarantee a seat The Barn is at 26624 N. Turkey Creek Rd. in Evergreen | | == | | | Fremont County Republican Meeting | Tuesday Feb 22nd 6:00PM: Erik will address the Fremont Republicans at their Headquarters in Canon City. Please join us and hear Erik address the issues concerning rural Colorado. Admission is Free Fremont Republican HQ is at 603 Main St. in Canon City | | | == | | | | Happy Hour at 6 and 40 Brewery in Lakewood Wednesday Feb 23rd 5:00PM: Join Erik for Happy Hour conversation and fine craft beer in Lakewood. Bring your questions and comments for one-on-one conversation with the frontrunner in Colorado's District 7 Congressional race 6 and 40 Brewery is at 883 Parfet St. Unit J in Lakewood | | == | | | Great Frontier Brewing Company in Lakewood Wednesday Feb 23rd 7:00PM Erik will be at Great Frontier for conversation with you about the issues you face. Hello, team — at the bottom of this email, I’m going to ask you to contribute to my campaign, but before I do, I think you deserve an explanation for why your contribution matters today. Keep reading to hear more, or [chip in any amount now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881347/330723429/-1229619614?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220216midmonth2_ae_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODFmMWE2Mi02ZThmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ix2XOYeep-aNm5GtUYvEgNEiApH3HSD4Vu57BQgX7w=). In the last two weeks, community members in Chalfont, Lansdale, Doylestown, Fallsington, Holland, Newtown, and Bensalem, have invited me to their homes to learn more about my campaign. Over and over, they share concerns about the political dysfunction happening in Washington while families here in Bucks and Montco have to choose between paying the bills and putting food on the table. My own family faced that choice while growing up, and things have not improved with Brian Fitzpatrick in office. **We need leadership that’s not afraid to roll up their sleeves and deliver real results.** I'm running for Congress to represent working families because I know firsthand what it’s like to feel left behind by a system that puts profits over people. I believe we can move our community forward by investing in good-paying jobs, affordable healthcare, education, infrastructure, and more. But I cannot do it without you. **[I’m personally asking you to contribute toward our February fundraising goal before midnight. In the last two weeks, community members in Chalfont, Lansdale, Doylestown, Fallsington, Holland, Newtown, and Bensalem, have invited me to their homes to learn more about my campaign. Over and over, they share concerns about the political dysfunction happening in Washington while families here in Bucks and Montco have to choose between paying the bills and putting food on the table. My own family faced that choice while growing up, and things have not improved with Brian Fitzpatrick in office. We need leadership that’s not afraid to roll up their sleeves and deliver real results. I'm running for Congress to represent working families because I know firsthand what it’s like to feel left behind by a system that puts profits over people. I believe we can move our community forward by investing in good-paying jobs, affordable healthcare, education, infrastructure, and more. But I cannot do it without you. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** = | = = | = = ** It’s because of supporters like you that we will defeat Fitzpatrick, flip PA-01 blue, and make a difference here in Bucks and Montgomery Counties. Thanks for stepping up. — Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Army. name: Bill (personal)
subject: I want to know what matters to you, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pascrell for Congress, Inc
body:
| | | Team, We're just two months into 2022, and already we've seen some of our highest highs and our lowest lows. Congress has passed landmark reform for infrastructure, labor, and the economy. But the COVID-19 pandemic, climate crisis, and Republican attacks on democracy rage on. As your representative, I'll never stop fighting for our communities in Northern New Jersey. But in order to deliver real, working results for our communities, I need to know what matters most to the people. That's why I'm reaching out with a quick favor to ask, folks: **will you take a few seconds to reply to this email with your top three policy concerns?** My team and I will do our best to respond to as many of your messages as we can. Thank you, friend. Your continued support means the world to me. \- Bill
---

The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hunter=20Estes?=
subject: Under the Dome - Update on the MS Legislative Session
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132308?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

I hope all is well!

A tremendous amount has happened under the dome of our Capitol building in the past week. The House and Senate had deadlines to move bills from their own respective chambers. So now they will begin considering legislation from each other.

A number of good and bad bills were allowed to die in the course of this process. Here’s an update on this week’s Good, Bad, and Interesting.

Hope you enjoy!

**The Good:**
**\- SB 2113** **from Sen. Michael McLendon pushes back against the presence of critical race theory in our classrooms and reaffirms that no school will teach that an individual is inherently superior, or inferior based on sex, religion, ethnicity, religion, or national origin.** This bill is an important step in standing for truth and defending foundational American principles. It passed the Senate overwhelmingly and will now be considered by the House.

**\- HB 1510** **from Rep. Brent Powell seeks to strengthen the integrity of our elections by pushing back on the investment of external dollars seeking to impact our elections, ensuring that non-citizens are not voting, and more. **Unfortunately, the House allowed for the removal of a section of this bill that would have strengthened the state’s ability to audit our elections and ensure that they have been conducted properly without improper influence.
---
| **The Bad:**
**\- SB 2794** **would have given every legislator a pay raise of $1,500 per month during the session.** This would have given legislators over $6,000 in the first year of the session and an extra $4,500 every year after. Only four Senators voted against this proposal. Thankfully, it ultimately died on the calendar after a motion to reconsider was placed on the legislation.

Personally, I’m of the opinion that our legislators should be making greater efforts to fight for the return of taxpayer money to the pockets of Mississippians rather than to their own.

**\- SB 2731 would change our state’s welfare reporting model.** A few years ago, we switched to a new model that revealed the state was making a higher rate of improper payments. In short, welfare dollars are going to folks who don’t need to be receiving them. The proposed solution to this is to switch back to the old model of reporting and sweep these numbers under the rug.

However, this fails to actually solve the problem. We need solutions that ensure state programs are helping those who need to be helped, not allowing fraud to continue to persist while turning a blind eye. The House will be considering this legislation soon.

**The Interesting:**
**\- The House and Senate have released dueling income tax elimination plans.** Let’s be honest - only the House plan aims to truly eliminate the income tax in our state. Check out our video on the two proposals and why income tax elimination needs to be more than just a fairy tale [**HERE.**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c562291408&e=5703353baa)

Let me know what you think about these bills and others moving through the legislature. As always, if you have any questions or thoughts, feel free to reach out!

---
| |
---

All the Best,

Hunter Estes
Senior Director, Policy & Communications

_Ps. Be sure to follow our Facebook and Twitter pages for detailed updates about the legislative session. Check out our [**Legislative Tracker,**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=550bd04d27&e=5703353baa) too._
---
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=327fafe6d0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=327fafe6d0).

name: Greg Landsman
subject: I need your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress
body:
---
| | Wow!! Dozens of our region’s most respected leaders have endorsed my run for Congress so far -- including Former Governor Ted Strickland, Mayor Aftab Pureval, and Vice Mayor Jan-Michele Lemon Kearney.

**[But I just checked my list --_and I’m still missing your endorsement._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881458/330724225/-1142949743?source=20220216_em_pet_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDQxZTE5Ny02ZjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TktvXp0i5-IGY_WE-3TQXxOfH7FX5XuG7Xqynh7IPYI=&emci=e94b0568-588f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=c441e197-6f8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=10283101)**

**_[We are building a big coalition to support the campaign in this competitive race and it’s starting with thousands of labor union members lending me their support. I need to gather a HISTORIC number of endorsements -- 500 more signers before midnight -- to gather an UNBEATABLE foundation of support. I cannot overstate the impact every single endorsement like yours makes. Will you take 10 seconds to sign your name and officially record your endorsement? It would mean so much to me. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881459/330724227/-1142949743?source=20220216_em_pet_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDQxZTE5Ny02ZjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TktvXp0i5-IGY_WE-3TQXxOfH7FX5XuG7Xqynh7IPYI=&emci=e94b0568-588f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=c441e197-6f8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=10283101)_** \-- Original Message -- **_[Will you sign your name to officially endorse me for Congress? I need 500 endorsements to help me prove we have what it takes to FLIP this seat for Democrats. If I don’t gather the necessary support in time, Republican Congressman Steve Chabot will use it to show support for his re-election. We can’t let that happen. That’s why your endorsement would mean so much to me in this critical moment. >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881460/330724228/-1142949743?source=20220216_em_pet_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDQxZTE5Ny02ZjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TktvXp0i5-IGY_WE-3TQXxOfH7FX5XuG7Xqynh7IPYI=&emci=e94b0568-588f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=c441e197-6f8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=10283101)_** | I just launched my race for Congress -- and what I need more than anything right now is your personal endorsement.

**[Will you sign on to officially endorse me before midnight? It would mean so much to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881461/330724230/-1142949743?source=20220216_em_pet_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDQxZTE5Ny02ZjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TktvXp0i5-IGY_WE-3TQXxOfH7FX5XuG7Xqynh7IPYI=&emci=e94b0568-588f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=c441e197-6f8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=10283101)**

| | | Friend, One of the great strengths of the state of New Hampshire comes from our motto... **Our**** _“Live Free or Die”_****mindset is one of many reasons why we’ve become the envy of the rest of the country!** **We want low taxes and more FREEDOM** \- and as State Senate President, that’s what I’ve worked to deliver. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friend, One of the great strengths of the state of New Hampshire comes from our motto... Our “Live Free or Die”mindset is one of many reasons why we’ve become the envy of the rest of the country! We want low taxes and more FREEDOM \- and as State Senate President, that’s what I’ve worked to deliver. | | | | | | Unfortunately, our current federal delegation in D.C. has been happy to let our “Live Free or Die” motto play second fiddle to the progressive Democrat agenda. Instead of low taxes and more freedom, we’re being given far-left priorities that threaten the American Dream! I’m not sitting on the sidelines any longer... Instead, I’m standing up for the 603, and running to unseat Maggie Hassan in the Senate so that “Live Free or Die” continues to ring true here in the great state of New Hampshire! If you want to help me fight for an agenda of LESS taxes and MORE freedom, let me know right now! | | | | | | | Thank you for the continued support, Chuck Morse PS - If we don’t speak out, the priorities of Washington are soon going to be the norm in New Hampshire and every state in America! _ | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse | | | Friends of Chuck Morse | | PO Box 106 North Salem, NH 03073 | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

name: Team Lira
subject: Hello from El Paso!
body:
Peter , it’s Day 3 of early voting here in TX-23 and John has already been super busy.

John took this picture while on the way to meeting voters yesterday in El Paso — no matter how big TX-23 is, John is still criss-crossing the district to make sure he has a chance to connect with people all over the district. He knows the value of meeting people where they are and is taking the time to do just that.

Team, this is the type of representation that we need in Texas — representation that is people-focused and people-powered.
John is listening to our stories, and he is ready to take our voices and issues all the way to Congress.

We are counting on your support to make that happen — can you chip in now to send John to Washington? It’s past time that Texans had a representative who works for us, instead of for corporations and special interests!

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220216?refcode=em20220216]

John has proven time and again that he is ready to put in the work to make sure the people of TX-23 have a voice in Congress who will fight for meaningful change and put the interests of the people above the interests of corporations. Now we just have to get him there.

Let’s get to work,
Team Lira

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
