subject: Poll: Do you support Biden to secure the border?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
A recent CBS News poll found that just 36% of those polled were satisfied with President Biden’s handling of the dire immigration problem. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=56d535f9d88449e19454843fb5aac5e0&_e=Ahw2PFGGuwVL51S54NjvX_kYP6UV97ixIIccq_598BZ49p0Ow_9Uj8NkE0r2RlCjM92BgZujmQIsCUWmLjc6lbr-V3EcMVtjxE5SIyb15Fpcdw4PYqpMwSZrHlWNMYgVHV9bXVuh27W0dStaSz6meIEcXPMuYsVHuCHtkdAqjcMo2Qq0ks4-BBhA-_nQO35J5_ROc9cAg4t4NdnKFTz7UuHZ3m9ZSY7x_wn7qACIF--nu8l15goACyRyRroTIyBVgyxVqEvyIiX-qxhDUf8GVvrna-5YpziYzDRu5vcedVWRZdJxSm7awcl6L8PyQXoOy3X-wWmHhoHl0PNVogiWcuJY47K9Brwq_bNUWv_NvTu7Oj6mQ1btFeyOO39b0BUeZFn99gd1fKxcTh3T_ymm23ruIxO72-YKt_MhX6UwRbnRo5-VQ-2LB6AhjQZJvi-1o-X6AtTgN7r3O0-8W_0BG3DjOvA-wNfd9BSxJfcMGM3gwrpwmg1VOpPWeOyOH8yAPAvdEnRqxETH5kLoaNPxNj58OH27tx2hAypsmkk2ItzvonMk6t8JHUaKYQeq_iXME-nSIuV2jENkEXarxmmC2JA-SlDmlxFGVyY5CU3yGbJoSxz9b6g53z_VWcft3hLzK3pn4Fe8VlqDT29ksmmAsWjlQfAy7AEqnMDJZqtk3OaoZ8WNHBIbXY_Vjx_GlEXs_BOLGiJvQb4CTory45gQnA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

My name is Monica De La Cruz and I’m a single mother running for the U.S House in Texas’ 15th Congressional District – one of a handful of Texas-based house Districts to border Mexico.

I’m a Hispanic Republican because I’m an adult who has formulated her own thoughts on the issues impacting our country the most. For a long time – particularly in my district which hasn’t sent a Republican to Congress since 1903 – Democrats relied on our (Hispanic) votes to win durable majorities in the House and the Senate.

**But the 2020 election showed that Dems can no longer count on brown folks to send them to Washington.**

A recent CBS News poll found that just 36% of those polled were satisfied with President Biden’s handling of the dire immigration problem. As an American citizen living in a border community, **I’d like to know what 36% of the American population approves of Joe Biden’s handling of illegal immigration**.

**[We’re looking for 6,558 conservatives to take our Immigration flash poll today to help us gather a more accurate picture of just how much of America supports Biden on immigration](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=56d535f9d88449e19454843fb5aac5e0&_e=Ahw2PFGGuwVL51S54NjvX_kYP6UV97ixIIccq_598BZ49p0Ow_9Uj8NkE0r2RlCjM92BgZujmQIsCUWmLjc6lbr-V3EcMVtjxE5SIyb15Fpcdw4PYqpMwSZrHlWNMYgVHV9bXVuh27W0dStaSz6meIEcXPMuYsVHuCHtkdAqjcMo2Qq0ks4-BBhA-_nQO35J5_ROc9cAg4t4NdnKFTz7UuHZ3m9ZSY7x_wn7qACIF--nu8l15goACyRyRroTIyBVgyxVqEvyIiX-qxhDUf8GVvrna-5YpziYzDRu5vcedVWRZdJxSm7awcl6L8PyQXoOy3X-wWmHhoHl0PNVogiWcuJY47K9Brwq_bNUWv_NvTu7Oj6mQ1btFeyOO39b0BUeZFn99gd1fKxcTh3T_ymm23ruIxO72-YKt_MhX6UwRbnRo5-VQ-2LB6AhjQZJvi-1o-X6AtTgN7r3O0-8W_0BG3DjOvA-wNfd9BSxJfcMGM0YtVyqcgmA5Vo1J1LhYEmVigrDviRFPoUG_ikWJ0ui6VLsASQZ-yl39VvWZhSC6Zuruob985zc5b2ehsH7MP6JVb5ZpQx2keSi7aw6NfrJBhYRpRXtFvOHmK9TKva-4RRi6qWwSVI-_T7kZWpJI4k0kCDH3rkvKyE1KrAYDqGHWbqErQ-jJelKIo240WF3WThjVEdggJ42tlRLuuSx-BKz1J4yIdSh3rp1xS9a8qbrQg%3D%3D)**.

[**Do you think Biden has fixed the border crisis?
Take our poll today-> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=56d535f9d88449e19454843fb5aac5e0&_e=Ahw2PFGGuwVL51S54NjvX_kYP6UV97ixIIccq_598BZ49p0Ow_9Uj8NkE0r2RlCjM92BgZujmQIsCUWmLjc6lbr-V3EcMVtjxE5SIyb15Fpcdw4PYqpMwSZrHlWNMYgVHV9bXVuh27W0dStaSz6meIEcXPMuYsVHuCHtkdAqjcMo2Qq0ks4-BBhA-_nQO35J5_ROc9cAg4t4NdnKFTz7UuHZ3m9ZSY7x_wn7qACIF--nu8l15goACyRyRroTIyBVgyxVqEvyIiX-qxhDUf8GVvrna-5YpziYzDRu5vcedVWRZdJxSm7awcl6L8PyQXoOy3X-wWmHhoHl0PNVogiWcuJY47K9Brwq_bNUWv_NvTu7Oj6mQ1btFeyOO39b0BUeZFn99gd1fKxcTh3T_ymm23ruIxO72-YKt_MhX6UwRbnRo5-VQ-2LB6AhjQZJvi-1o-X6AtTgN7r3O0-8W_0BG3DjOvA-wNfd9BSxJfcMGM1A00Bai7pi3-C10UKn9HE2aoG2PY1qe_9odcswZ9PklbkqVrgoxEqcWkXdJFLXuP1wFSQnqhRNfIF3xQDXUIkMdVsxmp0pA99Uk7wYZvmjIOegX5LoERDIEYJfCWwxap3CoK6GCsxYflj6Ik83WIrKAfxGuHtElexSB88zUMsnpETquhfFuXVvnq0XypcSi_i2T7tcO9etTH4w5qAF7SV2kWmD3Sasv-OQAT1v2y-rXA%3D%3D)
A recent editorial in the**_Wall Street Journal_** summed up the situation pretty succinctly in my opinion, writing: “**When is Joe Biden going to realize that Donald Trump didn’t lose the election in 2020 because of his stance on illegal immigration?** ”

Let me know where YOU STAND.

Thank you,
Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress - TX-15

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Abortion is under attack in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881604/330724684/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWZkZTU0NS03MDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3GIFXOQ2a-6JYuP7gk2ANCSGyaeQ22QWTZ9OlX66qA=&emci=f4bee79c-658f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=19fde545-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)
---

I am livid friend,
**Yesterday, Republican state senators voted to approve an unconstitutional ban on abortion after 15 weeks -- with no exceptions for cases of rape or incest. Not only that, _doctors who violate this ban could end up in state prison for a year and lose their medical license._**
**8 out of 10 Arizonans support the legal right to abortion** — _so why are state lawmakers so focused on banning the essential healthcare that their constituents want?_
While I am angry, I am not surprised. Republicans have been attempting to roll back the right to abortion care for decades, regardless of the harm it brings to people who need this essential care.
**That's why I'm proud to stand with local pro-choice leaders and organizations like Planned Parenthood Advocates of Arizona, in the fight to keep reproductive health care, safe and legal.**
No one should have their most personal medical decisions controlled by politicians, neighbors, complete strangers, or anyone else. Abortion is healthcare, and healthcare is a human right.
I am unapologetically pro-choice, and as the only woman in this Congressional race, I want to be clear: **Abortion should remain safe and legal. As your representative in Congress, I will fight to ensure that it does.**
[**That is why I am asking you today in earnest, to please join me in the fight to defend reproductive rights by chipping in today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881605/330724685/416963966?refcode=X_021622_AbortionLaw&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWZkZTU0NS03MDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3GIFXOQ2a-6JYuP7gk2ANCSGyaeQ22QWTZ9OlX66qA=)

clean_body: I am livid friend, Yesterday, Republican state senators voted to approve an unconstitutional ban on abortion after 15 weeks -- with no exceptions for cases of rape or incest. Not only that, doctors who violate this ban could end up in state prison for a year and lose their medical license. 8 out of 10 Arizonans support the legal right to abortion — so why are state lawmakers so focused on banning the essential healthcare that their constituents want? While I am angry, I am not surprised. Republicans have been attempting to roll back the right to abortion care for decades, regardless of the harm it brings to people who need this essential care. That's why I'm proud to stand with local pro-choice leaders and organizations like Planned Parenthood Advocates of Arizona, in the fight to keep reproductive health care, safe and legal. No one should have their most personal medical decisions controlled by politicians, neighbors, complete strangers, or anyone else. Abortion is healthcare, and healthcare is a human right. I am unapologetically pro-choice, and as the only woman in this Congressional race, I want to be clear: Abortion should remain safe and legal. As your representative in Congress, I will fight to ensure that it does. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Together we will beat back this appalling attack on our rights, Kirsten Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please._

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m calling for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission in North Carolina. Will you join me, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Our democracy is on the line. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881625/330724788/823540626?refcode=ea.14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGRjOTJhNS03MDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXmnUi_FTCKWJcjPhyzN5jgsV32tApTvYFBcP8ygPLM=&emci=6b7d4daf-6f8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
You deserve to know that your vote counts the same as any other, Peter. That’s how our democracy is supposed to work — one person, one vote, where all of us have an equal say in our government. **But partisan gerrymandering tactics ensure that some votes count more than others.** Peter, _redistricting should not be used for partisan advantage._ Last week, the North Carolina Supreme Court ruled that the congressional and legislative maps drawn by Republican legislative leaders in Raleigh are an unconstitutional gerrymander. A healthy democracy requires free and fair elections. That’s why I want North Carolina to establish a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission to ensure that future legislative maps accurately reflect the political reality of our state and fairly represent all our people. **[Our democracy is on the line. Sign my petition today to stand with me and call for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881626/330724789/1055395322?refcode=ea.14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGRjOTJhNS03MDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXmnUi_FTCKWJcjPhyzN5jgsV32tApTvYFBcP8ygPLM=&emci=6b7d4daf-6f8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881627/330724790/1055395322?refcode=ea.14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGRjOTJhNS03MDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXmnUi_FTCKWJcjPhyzN5jgsV32tApTvYFBcP8ygPLM=&emci=6b7d4daf-6f8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
---
Here in North Carolina, the Republicans gerrymandered our district maps in 2010 and 2020 so blatantly that the maps got _thrown out_. **It’s egregious partisanship on display for all to see, and we have to put an end to it.**
**[Will you join me in the fight? Sign my petition today to call for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission for North Carolina>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41881628/330724791/1055395322?refcode=ea.14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGRjOTJhNS03MDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXmnUi_FTCKWJcjPhyzN5jgsV32tApTvYFBcP8ygPLM=&emci=6b7d4daf-6f8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=14dc92a5-708f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)**
Thanks for standing with me,
Roy

Peter, We’ve seen this playbook before: an America First, pro-Trump candidate gains momentum, the Fake News Media crawls out of their ivory towers to attack them. Peter, that’s exactly what is happening in Ohio. Polls show that our movement is strong and we are winning. Because of that, in the past week, the New York Times, the Huffington Post and other “mainstream” media outlets have come after me. Why? Because they know I am an America First Conservative who will defend Donald J. Trump at all costs. Peter, I don’t shy away from these stories. I wear them as a badge of honor. clean_body: It’s clear we’re only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. | Peter, We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof: | "Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign. " - The Hill, 2/9/2022 Many of Hollywood's top celebrity activists are funneling thousands of dollars each into the campaign account of our opponent. It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. More deep-pocketed Hollywood celebrities are going to send max-out contributions with the intent of keeping their favorite Democrat in the Senate. We've set a goal of raising an additional $35,000 before midnight tonight and could use your help. That may sound like an arbitrary number, but it's the amount of money we need to be raising - DAILY - to run the most competitive campaign possible. While our opponent supports Hollywood's values, I'm fighting for Georgia and our conservative values. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. John's drive to serve his country and community didn’t end when he got home**ー** _he grew his family’s small business, an automotive supply chain company_ , and _now is raising his three sons in Michigan_.

Peter, I'm asking you to send me the best.

To get America back on track, we need proven leaders who are ready to serve and get the job done for the American people.

John has already served our country honorably, and as a businessman, he’ll ensure the work gets done.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41882438/330728183/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdiZjRjOC03MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDJ-UsEl9XwhvH95kCgY_gEZvwBkduirXOnfXqNHDpA=)
Friends — This is your last chance to help us in our goal of hitting 1,000 individual donations before our mid-month goal expires at midnight tonight. [_**We’re so close, and if you chip in $10 right now, your donation may just be the one that puts us over the top.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41882439/330728184/999668826?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220216_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdiZjRjOC03MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDJ-UsEl9XwhvH95kCgY_gEZvwBkduirXOnfXqNHDpA=) We’ve been planning ahead for the upcoming midterm elections, and we’re preparing for some tough battles in states like Arizona, Georgia, and Nevada. Thankfully, supporters like you helped us build an unstoppable grassroots movement in 2020 to take back the majority, so we know we can rely on grassroots donors to help defend Democratic candidates against the onslaught of Republican attacks. Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies only need to flip one seat to reclaim Senate control — and self-interested Republicans are already going to great lengths to tear our candidates down. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Add your name — support my bill suspending the federal gas tax.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I’m sure you’ve noticed that gas prices are the highest we’ve seen in years.
#

Friends —
I’m sure you’ve noticed that gas prices are the highest we’ve seen in years.
These rising costs have put a strain on families as they drive to work, to the grocery store, or to get their kids to school each day.
Tackling this issue and supporting families struggling to make ends meet is one of my top priorities. That’s why I’ve been urging the president to take action that will lower prices at the pump for months.
And last week I introduced legislation of my own that will suspend the federal gas tax, lowering the cost of gasoline and helping pass those savings on to families — not oil and gas companies.
This is a critical piece of legislation, and if you support this bill I’m asking you to make your voice heard:
[**Can you please sign my petition saying you support my legislation that will suspend the federal gas tax and save families money at the pump?**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/gas_tax_petition_em?source=em220216-1-15&t=1&akid=2132%2E6688874%2E_3UN-A)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/gas_tax_petition_em?source=em220216-1-15&t=2&akid=2132%2E6688874%2E_3UN-A)**
As we recover from the pandemic, lowering costs for Arizonans — including at the gas pump — continues to be one of my top priorities in the Senate.
Thanks for helping me get it done.
Mark Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/gas_tax_petition_em?source=em220216-1-15&t=3&akid=2132%2E6688874%2E_3UN-A)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2132%2E6688874%2E_3UN-A).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

| | We did it. Back in 2020, I asked our grassroots supporters three times – in May, August, and September – to sign petitions calling on Congress to save the US Postal Service. **And thousands upon thousands of folks signed those petitions – joining over a million supporters across the country.** The issue? A 2006 law that required the USPS to pay today for the retirements of workers who will retire 75 years from now. _Those future retirees are not even born yet!_ That law was making it very difficult for the Postal Service to meet its service demands here and now. Here is the exciting news: **This past week, on a huge bipartisan vote, Congress listened and passed a Postal Service reform bill to guarantee its fiscal solvency for decades to come.** We will now require six days of home delivery every week, and an online dashboard that will show those delivery metrics on a weekly basis. Sure, this is nerdy stuff, but I hope you share my enthusiasm. Most of all, I am just really proud that all those who signed petitions, wrote letters, made phone calls, and spoke up at town halls all across the country have finally been heard. We did it. _You_ did it! _Rick_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | We did it. Back in 2020, I asked our grassroots supporters three times – in May, August, and September – to sign petitions calling on Congress to save the US Postal Service. And thousands upon thousands of folks signed those petitions – joining over a million supporters across the country. The issue? A 2006 law that required the USPS to pay today for the retirements of workers who will retire 75 years from now. Those future retirees are not even born yet! That law was making it very difficult for the Postal Service to meet its service demands here and now. Here is the exciting news: This past week, on a huge bipartisan vote, Congress listened and passed a Postal Service reform bill to guarantee its fiscal solvency for decades to come. We will now require six days of home delivery every week, and an online dashboard that will show those delivery metrics on a weekly basis. Sure, this is nerdy stuff, but I hope you share my enthusiasm. Most of all, I am just really proud that all those who signed petitions, wrote letters, made phone calls, and spoke up at town halls all across the country have finally been heard. We did it. You did it! name: Casey Wardynski (personal)
subject: U.S. Space Force Academy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s time to create a unique institution of higher learning right here in Huntsville. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2ba2ca72353a9ff1/db069a9e9bab300ac3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, **If elected to represent you in Congress, I will do everything in my power to promote Huntsville as a leader in aerospace technology. And to take the next step in that direction, I’m calling for the Space Force to open a Space Force Academy in Huntsville.**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2ba2ca72353a9ff1/99f0645f95f2a6b3c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
The other branches of the service already have academies devoted to training young people in the identity, purpose, and culture of their service branch. Likewise, the Space Force needs their own academy to train its future officers. _And, as a leader in the aerospace and defense industries, Huntsville is an ideal educational environment._ I’m 100% committed to giving our men and women in the military everything they need to succeed and supporting North Alabama in the process. **[If you share my vision for a strong national defense, please chip in a generous contribution of](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2ba2ca72353a9ff1/0a335f04fcf2e7a7c3d6b838967d376c/36963)[ $5,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2ba2ca72353a9ff1/aac16c4c962fb67bc3d6b838967d376c/36963)[ $10,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2ba2ca72353a9ff1/af351037a34ae27ec3d6b838967d376c/36963)[ $25,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2ba2ca72353a9ff1/2e7de12db9a94cdbc3d6b838967d376c/36963)[ $50 ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2ba2ca72353a9ff1/1aa9a3d31b71df46c3d6b838967d376c/36963)[or more today >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2ba2ca72353a9ff1/881378f398217823c3d6b838967d376c/36963)** Thank you for your continued support, Casey Wardynski

name: Team Holly
subject: Georgians Against Election Tampering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, l ast week I spent time volunteering at the Community Resource Center of Chattooga. Their food bank fills a need we have struggled with in GA-14 for many years, and being there to help showed me once again why I'm running for Congress.
While sorting and handing out food, I had the opportunity to talk with the founder who began the program 8 years ago. She felt compelled to start the food bank because she knew people in her life would go hungry without it. When she isn't at the food bank, she spends most of her time fostering teenagers and workshopping resumes with the young women leaving the foster system.
People like this are what hold our community together. Her struggles and triumphs remind me why this race is so important.
This work is especially touching for me, because my family has had to rely on food banks before. I know that our community's struggles go beyond party lines. We need to get back to the basics of helping one another and that starts with better representation. We need legislators who understand the problems and can fight for solutions.
It doesn't matter what side of the aisle you are on, we can find common ground in fighting for our community. That’s why our Rural Revival Plan is so special. I am fighting for resources that will help all of GA-14. The issues we face are not too hard to fix. We need a representative who is working for the people, not against them.
With your donation, we can make a difference today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0211b]
We can do this,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0211b] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]

name: Emily, MartinForTN.com
subject: Some not great news…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41873089/330684984/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220216closegap1_em4tnweb_op_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWEzNGQyNC00ZjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eA0n6FjDfyN_MJR0X-Fi5KKU_Zhyib-82xKeKgVqjE=)
---
I have to share some not great news today, Peter.
Earlier this month, campaign filings for the Tennessee governor race were released — and, unsurprisingly, Bill Lee leveraged his corporate donors and personal wealth to outspend our campaign by a _massive_ margin.
It just confirms what we knew all along: **While our campaign to elect Dr. Martin depends on grassroots donations from regularTennesseans, Gov. Lee is relying on special interests and dark money to stay competitive.**
We know that Tennesseans are fed up with Lee’s corporate cronyism, and we know that we’ve got the people on our side — but Lee doesn’t care about serving Tennessee’s families, only about staying in power. And that means we have to work _even harder_ to keep up the pace.
[**We’ve set a $25,000 goal for this month to help us close the gap — can you make a donation of any amount today to fuel our grassroots movement by and for ALL Tennesseans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41873090/330684985/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220216closegap1_em4tnweb_op_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWEzNGQyNC00ZjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eA0n6FjDfyN_MJR0X-Fi5KKU_Zhyib-82xKeKgVqjE=)

clean_body: | | = I have to share some not great news today, Peter. Earlier this month, campaign filings for the Tennessee governor race were released — and, unsurprisingly, Bill Lee leveraged his corporate donors and personal wealth to outspend our campaign by a massive margin. It just confirms what we knew all along: While our campaign to elect Dr. Martin depends on grassroots donations from regularTennesseans, Gov. Lee is relying on special interests and dark money to stay competitive. We know that Tennesseans are fed up with Lee’s corporate cronyism, and we know that we’ve got the people on our side — but Lee doesn’t care about serving Tennessee’s families, only about staying in power. | | I know that there are ONLY TWO polls that matter in the end- the Primary Election in August and the General Election in November, but I have to admit, I CAN’T STOP SMILING every time I look at that poll. Not only are we leading in a conservative poll but we are, 7 points ahead of second place and lead the incumbent by more than 10 points. I have said many times that VOTER OUTREACH EQUALS VOTER ENGAGEMENT and I intend to continue on that course. To do that, I have to keep asking for your help and THIS POLL SHOWS IT IS WORKING! We are on our way, but this is not a sprint - It's a marathon. I am in it for the long haul. There's still work to do and we need to keep gaining momentum. I'll keep doing what I'm doing and I ask you to keep:
* Sharing of our messages on social media.
* Forwarding these emails to all of your friends and family.
* Directing questions about our campaign to me so I can answer them directly and honestly.
* Most of all PLEASE KEEP UP YOUR SUPPORT

With all of these done, we will be well on our way to victory in November and a brighter, healthier future.
Thank you so much for your continued support! The last poll they conducted October/November of 2021 had us firmly | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Polling in FIRST! | | | | The Trafalgar Group is one of the more conservative pollsters out there. The last poll they conducted October/November of 2021 had us firmly in 2nd place, ahead of the incumbent. As good as that was, their newest poll has us in FIRST PLACE! I cannot adequately express how good this news is, but I'm going to try. Good news generates excitement, and that excitement drives the campaign. Since this poll was released, we are already seeing some of that excitement across social media! | | | | | My name and campaign is gathering steam and recognition. I am positive that this has been due to my persistent voter outreach efforts, which many of you have generously helped to fund. This, combined with efforts on social media spreading the message that I AM THE CANDIDATE WHO WILL #FLIPWA03 from an unengaged incumbent, has definitely made a difference. | | | | | | | I know that there are ONLY TWO polls that matter in the end- the Primary Election in August and the General Election in November, but I have to admit, I CAN’T STOP SMILING every time I look at that poll. Not only are we leading in a conservative poll but we are, 7 points ahead of second place and lead the incumbent by more than 10 points. I have said many times that VOTER OUTREACH EQUALS VOTER ENGAGEMENT and I intend to continue on that course. To do that, I have to keep asking for your help and THIS POLL SHOWS IT IS WORKING! We are on our way, but this is not a sprint - It's a marathon. I am in it for the long haul. There's still work to do and we need to keep gaining momentum. I'll keep doing what I'm doing and I ask you to keep: Sharing of our messages on social media. Forwarding these emails to all of your friends and family. Directing questions about our campaign to me so I can answer them directly and honestly. Most of all PLEASE KEEP UP YOUR SUPPORT With all of these done, we will be well on our way to victory in November and a brighter, healthier future. Thank you so much for your continued support! name: Cheryl Stephens, NanWhaley.com
subject: Making history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
If we’re going to win, we can’t fall short now

Team,
Sunday night was a big night for Ohio: **The Cincinnati Bengals went to our first Super Bowl since 1988.**
While we may have fallen short of a win, this November, we have the chance for a different kind of victory – by kicking the corrupt Mike DeWine machine out of Columbus and electing a governor with a record of putting Ohioans above deep-pocketed special interests.
Here’s where that starts – by meeting our February mid-month goal of $15,000. This is our first mid-month goal since we announced that our campaign has raised more than any other Democratic gubernatorial challenger at this point in Ohio history.
**[We’re working hard to keep up that momentum – because we need to show Mike DeWine and his friends that Ohioans are ready for a change. Can you chip in $5 to help us meet this goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41883514/330732801/-679543169?refcode=nw_em_220216_1_t1_a&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjJjMDdkZi03OThmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBMdS0xDNdRKObssKnGlCPi2DScw1bRQaHdVJToOBQQ=)**
The reality is that Nan hit the nail on the head yesterday. While heading to the Super Bowl was exciting, no game will solve the problems we’re facing – from corruption in Columbus to the opioid crisis to the ongoing pandemic that has claimed too many lives. It’ll take new leadership in the governor’s office to tackle that and so much more.
Nan is the right person to bring that new leadership. I’ve seen how she worked with community leaders and experts to transform Dayton – and I’m confident she can do the same for all of Ohio.
**[Team, help us shatter our mid-month fundraising goal and prove to Mike DeWine that we have the momentum to win. Please, rush $5 right now to help build a better Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41883515/330732802/-679543169?refcode=nw_em_220216_1_t1_a&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjJjMDdkZi03OThmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBMdS0xDNdRKObssKnGlCPi2DScw1bRQaHdVJToOBQQ=)**
Thank you,
Cheryl Stephens

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41883516/330732803/-679543169?refcode=nw_em_220216_1_t1_a&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjJjMDdkZi03OThmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBMdS0xDNdRKObssKnGlCPi2DScw1bRQaHdVJToOBQQ=)****

I’m behind my goal of 5,000 donors for the month of February and I cannot afford to fall short. | | | ---|---|--- | | Red States - like Utah - are being targeted by the Democrats. They know their razon-thin Senate majority is vulnerable and they are doing whatever it takes to win. No one is safe - including me. That’s why it’s imperative I hit each and every one of my fundraising goals - to show strength. For America, Mike Lee | Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails? Let me explain why even just a couple dollars makes a BIG difference.

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Genocide Olympics
body:
Ever since China was awarded the 2022 Winter Olympics, we knew it was going to be bad. But this bad?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2za9hqn15sce3k6en8jeld7o75qhli0f4h1c3vuv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1im0or4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj0e6rras77m4p3ddr2m9j3aplkscob8d77mprr8db4scr39ob5e9h3eplhelo6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5lm1g74c3664qb6oj7m2qmash5u)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot: Ever since China was awarded the 2022 Winter Olympics, we knew it was going to be bad. But _this bad? _
The opening ceremony was a Hollywood-produced commercial for Beijing’s communist dictatorship. You know, the tyrants who just:
▶︎ Unleashed a lethal pandemic on the world;
▶︎ Kidnapped a Chinese tennis star for speaking out; and,
▶︎ Is conducting ethnic cleansing against their Uighur minority.
This would be bad enough to have sit through. But America’s woke, corporate Left is adding insult to injury:
▶︎ NBC embarrassed itself by parroting Chinese propaganda about the Uighur genocide.
▶︎ Nancy Pelosi urged brave athletes not to speak out against China’s human rights atrocities.
▶︎ The head of the International Olympic Committee urged silence, too, because speaking up could – _gasp_ – end the Olympics.
▶︎ And of course, the entire event is being financed by U.S. corporations.

Olympic advertisers and partners are trying to keep a lower profile this year, but the truth is the truth: the Genocide Olympics have U.S. corporate sponsorship.
**[Help Americans wake up to the dangers of Woke Capital by supporting CPI today!](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6ggd49k9drc6mbnopmkra8mrk4oq2j3rh628kk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1im0or4c5h2bs)**
Sadly, it gets worse.
A new report just found that Big Tech’s alliance with China is deeper than we ever realized. Silicon Valley isn’t just outsourcing jobs, they’re helping Beijing develop new military and public surveillance technologies.
This is the fruit of the Left’s anti-Americanism: U.S. corporations helping China murder its own citizens and threaten the United States, and being given cover for it by American television networks and reporters. This isn’t the free market – it’s the capture of the market by a foreign adversary and the global corporations in its pocket.
**[CPI is leading the fight against Big Tech corruption, but we need your support.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8j3rr806upq1b6pr3nsvnqb6pfu7svo4on1ei68_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1im0or4c5h2bs)**
CPI’s **Digital Defense Initiative** has been leading the conservative charge against Big Tech. We’re working with leaders in the House, Senate, and around the country to shine a light on their monopolies, politics, and corruption.
Big Tech is a threat to American freedom. They are censoring our speech, silencing our leaders, twisting the news, rigging our elections, and spying on us 24/7 – kind of like their pals in Beijing.
Conservatives must be prepared to take them on and if necessary, break them up. The Left has chosen their side – we have to do the same, or liberty will have no champions.
**[Please help Americans defeat Big Tech tyranny by supporting CPI's Digital Defense Initiative today.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrknhf6dahc30at2feqpc7d7g4hl6tbjgpi16j30_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1im0or4c5h2bs)**
At CPI we will fight for your freedom, and everyone else’s, as long as it takes. When we chant **U-S-A!, U-S-A!** , it’s not just for our athletes. It’s for our country and the ideals on which it was founded.
Together, conservatives will restore them to Washington and defend them everywhere in the world. For Freedom,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|
---
---
**CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE**
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 Fax
[CPI.org](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqu98egnpsb09hropd6tfc0pj918ah4a9dr4pv80_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1im0or4c5h2bs)
---
[**SUPPORT CPI**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsikbg5gljrhp2hik7ogu0c3p12bktfghiqv0m6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1im0or4c5h2bs)

body:
Will you sign Michelle's card now to THANK her for working to defend our democracy and our Majorities? >>
| | **_CNN REPORT:_
Michelle Obama launches campaign to register ONE MILLION new voters ahead of 2022 elections**
|
We're OVERJOYED!!

**Michelle Obama has launched an INCREDIBLE effort to register ONE MILLION NEW VOTERS before the 2022 elections.**

Please understand: This is EXACTLY the kind of organizing and outreach our Democrats will need to **HOLD** the House and **SAVE** the Senate from the GOP's grasp.

That's why we're JUMPING into action and calling on 25,000 of our strongest Democrats to let Michelle know just how grateful we are for the incredible work she's doing.

name: Mia McLeod
subject: SC Republicans want to criminalize abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
My colleagues want to play God... | | | I’ve never been afraid to point out hypocrisy and take on the tough fights, friend. So when I learned my Republican colleagues are trying to criminalize abortions and pass a trigger ban, I knew I had to speak out. **Right now, South Carolina Republicans are trying to pass a restrictive anti-abortion bill that would ban ALL abortions immediately if _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned or dismantled at the federal level.** This bill calls for the criminal prosecution of any person who obtains an abortion and the medical professionals who provide abortion care. They could be charged with murder and could even face the death penalty. Let me be unequivocally clear: **Reproductive healthcare decisions should be between patients and their doctors, not politicians.** I’m so frustrated by the hypocrisies and double standards. That’s why I introduced landmark legislation like the Viagra bill and _Pro-birth Accountability Act._ **I’ve spent my career fighting to protect the right to choose and the right to reproductive care for all pregnant people. And as your Governor, you can bet I’ll continue to support reproductive freedom and stand up against any restrictive anti-abortion bills.** Thank you for standing with me, — Mia | | [DONATE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6pJAb5hrkufJ9bVGTSyzWWwh1wpbr_XgVg5PmtOKTEKxdm1M8UHAzqWUwL7aOI2w9TRIO7PFgkFandXSBLoKQ4DM8yHfcwsIL23wOHjthKabLwAmYAsESMz4e8FOj1UnQVagAT_AazZB-Ror7E8akKSzF_nKx9Ow828W2Lfdm6fB4dTkBnBK1HwoR-W9oO74TgFy3xJE7oSpy9n9TIy79H7iiQKKtYjivZi7S_reUoVXCBVF-TVkSLnkcR3o278ZrvQWRgyFYRlsEVperuBBB6ZljHqq3hZp4M92dOuvsFAUQJdRzsYeCfmc4HJc0xzry3t172aTr-FZ1VLIAX2M610Nw4mGEEmsw98HVSnqwxrgRHwkD6iIrDNaDwg9pdcqvU1JfTBegAfL4dcIM57KMCQ/3jm/NoizxNYBSUe0hbfpxXfLQQ/h0/zTW5w0bgMwp9T5_YrWr6ojhJT06rWH-x3fgL2r1mO_E)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Call to Action PART 2: Feb. 14th – 18th
body:
| |
---
Today’s call to action email is part 2 – [we sent part 1 yesterday](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.).

And again, the new tool we are using, AlignAct, allows you to email, sign petitions, tweet, post on Facebook, etc. with just a few clicks and a minute or two of your time. Using this tool, you can complete multiple action items every day because it literally only takes a couple of minutes!

**In this week’s call-to-action part 2:**
* Senators: Sign Mike Lee's Mandate Letter!
* Companies: Let Your Employees Breathe!
* Other AlignAct campaigns & action items
* Reminder: NV Election Integrity meetings start this week

|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
Sen. Mike Lee has written a “Dear Colleague” letter, outlining his intention to hold up the Continuing Resolution (CR) until the Senate allows a roll call vote on an amendment to the CR that would defund enforcement of the vaccine mandates. As of this writing, five other Senators had signed on. We want all Senators to sign on, but we are first focusing on the Republicans.

[**Use our AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**to contact ALL of the Senate Republicans to tell them to sign on to Sen. Lee’s letter and do everything they can to kill the vaccine mandates!**

Remember, when you use our AlignAct campaign, you can contact every single Senate Republican with just a couple of clicks – it will literally take you one to two minutes to do!
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
Are you sick of walking into major chains and seeing employees masked up because these chains require their employees to wear a mask all day? It doesn’t seem to matter if there are government mask mandates either. Politicians, celebrities, and customers are living life without masks, but these employees are still forced to cover their faces and their smiles, and impede their breathing. It’s time to stop forced masking of employees!

[**Use our AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-jv7xRQQ)**to quickly contact the CEO’s of multiple major chains to tell them to let their employees breathe! You can contact everyone on our list with just a couple of clicks!**
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
|
---
**Previous AlignAct Campaigns & Action Items**

The great thing about using AlignAct to run our calls-to-action through is that they can remain up as long as necessary, and you can do them over and over again. Remember, they only take one to two minutes of your time, so you can take action on multiple campaigns every week!

[**Biden must cease all mask & vax mandates!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)

[**Republicans Must Pledge to Defund Covid Mandates!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
(This is a campaign to get the Republicans to sign on to Rep. Chip Roy’s letter – different from Mike Lee’s letter.)

[**The Senate Must Reject Biden's Radical Nominees!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0OTU4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/yjoQflkrY3lL3cCkLGW1fQ)

[**Audit Anthony Fauci**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-Tg7Khu9h0zxJQ)
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0OTU4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/8aD443-xYKA70rzS76Fk8w)
If you live in Nevada (or know people who do), this is a reminder that our Election Integrity tour started this week, on February 15th! Please use the links below to RSPV as soon as possible, and share with friends!
[RSVP](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0OTU4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/kEU4XU5Z4TN3sSyjp8dYHw)
|
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwNDctODM5OGI3OTQ5OWI1NDc0ZGE5MmVjNWQwMTAwNzcwNDEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_bWlkPTQ0OTU4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/UwGXpKGJjckF4Dd7hq_SGg)
|

name: Dean Heller
subject: It takes more than an expensive car to win a race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
More often than not, it’s the driver with the hardest working pit crew that crosses the checkered flag first. | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Adults Need to Have This Conversation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Time to get serious |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=946826fc43&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
As a father, I know what its like when children argue. One child might accuse the other of something. A typical response would be “Uh-uh, you started it!”

**This is about where we are at with the Democrats. They are trying to pre-empt and undo the work that we are doing for Election Integrity by framing it as us stealing the election – the exact same thing they are trying to cover up!**

_Let the gaslighting begin._

They are doing everything in their power to discredit and attack us because they are scared.

Just look at this headline –
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d1b0a432ae&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6444160da3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| How can they possibly write about Republicans “Starting the Steal” when Democrats are still covering up the last one?

It’s simple. The M.O of Democrats is to gaslight America. Masks. No Masks. No Vaccines. Vaccines. Elections perfect. Elections stolen.

**If they keep shouting non-sensical non-sequiturs at the clouds over and over again, eventually they will convince some people.**

_And the sad truth of it, folks, is that it works!_

**Americans are being blinded by the Democrats and we can’t let them win this time. We have to be louder, stronger, and more persuasive!**

_The Week_ reports as the main concern:

_What is the concern?_

_Acolytes of Donald Trump, galvanized by his false claims of voter fraud, are laying the groundwork for overturning future elections by commandeering state and county election systems. A major reason Trump failed in his efforts to overturn the 2020 election is that state and local election officials, many of them Republicans, certified the results over Trump's objections and threats. In response, Trump allies such as far-right nativist Steve Bannon have launched a campaign to replace principled officials with Trump allies, from the lowest county volunteer up to states' top election officials. Next time, the battered guardrails that held firm in 2020 might be gone, said Wendy Weiser of the Brennan Center for Justice. "This is a giant crisis," she said. "We've never seen anything like that before."_

**They claim that having election integrity patriots in office is a threat. When last cycle they had blatantly partisan, cheating, elected officials who blatantly stole the election for Biden.**

**_You can’t make this stuff up, folks._**

They put on blast anyone who remotely disagrees with them because it scares them and they are lashing out – like kids, they don’t know what else to do.

**Let’s be the adults in the room. We know what is best for America. We know the founding principles. Let’s lay down the law. Let’s send a clear message. Let’s make sure the whiny Democrats don’t get their way. Because when they do – we may never have safe elections ever again.**

[But to get our message out, to fight against the Democrats – that takes money.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7eb2fe9acb&e=44b8c466b0)

[Can you please help out with a generous donation today? I need your help to fight!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=37adbdd8af&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=310a7ff664&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0efef8b315&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=09eb6bbbbe&e=44b8c466b0)

name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Will you volunteer to help make Beto the next Governor of Texas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
No matter where you live, we need your help.
#
Team Beto is working tirelessly to reach our goal of contacting 3 million Texas voters before March 1st.
With mail-in ballots already being rejected at alarming rates under Greg Abbott’s stringent voter restrictions, our work has never been more important.
But our deadline is just 12 days away, and truth be told, the only way we’re going to reach our goal is if we can add at least 1,000 new volunteer sign-ups today.
[**S****ign up today to make calls to Texans and build support for Beto!**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53154?t=1&akid=176504%2E444211%2ExqBVfV) You'll have the opportunity to meet other supporters and make calls together after a brief training. Our phone banks are hosted virtually, so you can join us from anywhere.
**[Make calls for Beto »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53154?t=2&akid=176504%2E444211%2ExqBVfV)**
Winning in Texas won’t be easy, especially with the extreme voter suppression happening right in front of our eyes. But we know that we’re capable of generating once-in-a-lifetime voter turnout if we put in the work.
That’s why it’s critical we use every tool we have to reach eligible voters with Beto’s vision and help folks all across Texas participate in this election.
Thank you for being part of this,
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas
**[Donate now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53155?refcode=ema20220216-176504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=176504%2E444211%2ExqBVfV)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220216-176504-footer&t=4&refcode2=176504_444211_xqBVfV&akid=176504%2E444211%2ExqBVfV)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=5&akid=176504%2E444211%2ExqBVfV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=176504%2E444211%2ExqBVfV)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

Peter,
Did you see the shocking interview that Liberal Lisa Murkowski held on CNN? In case you missed it:

Lisa Murkowski endorses DEMOCRAT Joe Manchin

Can you believe that?!

When I was helping to lead hundreds of Alaskans in a Freedom Convoy in Alaska, Murkowski was on T.V. boasting about endorsing her Democrat insider friend in D.C.!

This so-called “Republican” would rather continue to push a FAR-LEFT agenda, than support FREEDOM.

That is why I am running for the United States Senate against Liberal Lisa Murkowski. I am fighting to Revive Our Economy, Reclaim Our Rights, and Restore Election Security!

While Murkowski is going to bat for her political elite friends like "Joe Mansion," I'm fighting for "Joe Alaska"!

I am fighting to Revive Our Economy, Reclaim Our Rights, and Restore Election Security! While Murkowski is going to bat for her political elite friends like "Joe Mansion," I'm fighting for "Joe Alaska"! But I cannot do it alone, Peter. If we want to oust a swampy D.C. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: My Super Bowl Game Plan
body:
My Super Bowl Stories & School House Jam reminder! | | | **Campaign Updates**
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/98fb33816cd7/my-super-bowl-game-plan?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=9b313c5597&e=339f142c50)
---
| |
# My Super Bowl Game Plan
The NFL sent two police officers down to arrest me at the Super Bowl Tailgate. They demanded that I give them my ‘Stop Gun Violence’ sign, or they would take me to jail. They reasoned that my sign was political, and if someone had a Donald Trump sign, they’d have to take that away as well. I told them, “No, get away from me!” The league allows players to wear decals on the back of their helmets with slogans including "End Racism," "Stop Hate," and "Black Lives Matter." Even in the end zone, there’s a big ‘End Racism’ stencil. Why can’t I have my sign?”

I could see in the distance more officers approaching as the one police officer radioed for backup. I told her, no, you’re not taking my sign.

She said, “Look, I like your shirt, but you can’t have the sign, or you’ll be escorted out. You can wear your shirt, but you can’t have the sign.”
One of my campaign's biggest goals is to Stop Gun Violence, so we made these QR-Tees saying just that. With a QR code on the back, people anywhere can learn about my goals as the next Congressman for IL-01.

I sat there and thought about going to jail. I thought about Congressman Lewis and making good trouble. All these thoughts went through my mind as the officers approached. I was seconds away from fighting them, but I decided to fight differently. I’m running for Congress in the 1st District of Illinois.

I decided to give them the cardboard so I could get back to having as many discussions as possible with people at the tailgate and game. Immediately after this incident, I was furiously walking, and I met DJ Envy from The Breakfast Club. I told him about my campaign and the importance of being elected right now.

I met many people during my time in LA, including the owners of several banks. I asked them all to scan my QR-Tee, and I spent ten minutes explaining the root causes of gun violence to the founder of LuluLemon.

What’s crazy is that I had this whole game plan of how I would interact with people at the game, but My Super Bowl plan was altered before the game even started; here I was being thrown out before kickoff. I saw at halftime Eminem took a knee in his performance, but they tried to kick me out.

A friend told me, “That’s the NFL,” when I explained what happened to me.
Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole

---
|
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=418d3767a3&e=339f142c50)
---

I will be performing a short set before our DJ takes over, so you know it's going to be a good time. Every contribution level gets a free drink ticket! I hope to see you at the Promontory this Friday!!

Peter,

Every Angeleno is being forced to take part in a dangerous social experiment right now. This is no innocent experiment, and **it's threatening the safety of around 10 million Californians.**

**When Los Angeles District Attorney George Gascon took office in 2020, he set L.A. on a treacherous path.**

First, he eliminated cash bail. _Now, violent offenders, child abusers, and repeat criminals are free to walk right out of jail._

Next, he decided that the L.A. District Attorneys' office would no longer prosecute 13 specific crimes. _You can now trespass, make criminal threats, or drive with a suspended license without risk of punishment._

Then, he eliminated special circumstance sentencing enhancements. He took away the ability of prosecutors to charge youths as adults,_regardless of the crime._ ** _And will no longer allow the death penalty in any case, ever._**

**And the result? Violent crime has increased by 50% during his first year in office!**

[** HELP US RECALL GEORGE GASCON ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5b7ce0af552543cebd3c61586b524b9d&_e=WHVgkHeSpdbrcN3P4P_B8-nZtpQNlmOvhAUcxEKrEAmhnO9EvooOVUrY5mO0A8Ti_WM4tnbmireqhZcrQ2bChJiatYIEh03BKk4hFbThGQrxIKzxMr7oTp8d_pUNdjr4fW7PavJC5mae6cif21TsRONgn9JWXttuYKtuGENAGMtwtaensZV_BfnXl3HbETWYLBP2pDjmAFS1_uY_-TFVG-y49alAKqlbO0Rd3HJEfPaOYiuIPBLXMz6dOvINxGAevO5ut8jGMMS_R5FlPphzGABB9FMC8mwD176YRvJap58s1ZE8wXOwpKUvIpW31A50ANd7VOsZq5P5uEtUEmMLntSapVqOLNLa-ae9bw9GuYwY1ZTQAomInosxNDcXlRtRgNh2ANoqktW6OX30ATgcRX2h7FGtJ0CGxgxLcPIxN7awHe1Bpq0cDaHKnJd3Hed2)
You don't have to look hard to see that California is becoming a dangerous place to live, **and for those of us in Los Angeles County, it's quickly becoming deadly.**

[**We can stop this now and show that we won't be part of this reckless experiment.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5b7ce0af552543cebd3c61586b524b9d&_e=WHVgkHeSpdbrcN3P4P_B8-nZtpQNlmOvhAUcxEKrEAmhnO9EvooOVUrY5mO0A8Ti_WM4tnbmireqhZcrQ2bChJiatYIEh03BKk4hFbThGQrxIKzxMr7oTp8d_pUNdjr4fW7PavJC5mae6cif21TsRONgn9JWXttuYKtuGENAGMtwtaensZV_BfnXl3HbETWYLBP2pDjmAFS1_uY_-TFVG-y49alAKqlbO0Rd3HJEfPZeGCDbFEW403VH-rKWWUFuhc5lefmxyxNFHe3XfmLJtp1eCkOd2qTy_ace_NjFOF0kwcIhs19OuqkFVMUsSpQeLwcjbxkDULT_ktcWkidx-ECC7AQBkPXnSUnJACWrZPdZpS6plJGLQBnRzkh8mp284ReyB70Q61PPtyGDhPX_WnhFEydBr4dFytlYfU-f-yPB-kXtpiN1dWRCA2rktlxb) In L.A. County, we are on the verge of recalling District Attorney George Gascon.

**He is a monster, and we can't allow him to serve another day in office.**

The effort to recall Gascon kicked off this month! Now we have less than 150 days to collect at least 800,000 signatures from L.A. County voters and we’re going to need your help to make it happen.

We need this campaign to be a well-oiled machine; to do that, we need the support of every conservative in California. | Battleground, WA – Joe Kent’s campaign manager Ozzie Gonzalez released the following statement in response to the new Trafalgar Group poll showing Joe Kent maintaining his lead among the four Republicans in the race.
---
| Our campaign has been leading in the number and size of our public events, volunteer recruitment, county GOP endorsements, and individual contributions. And despite facing a constant bombardment of dishonest attack ads, we are still in first place among Republicans. This is the third poll in a row showing Joe in the lead.

However, this race is still far from over. Rep. Jaime Herrera Beutler still has millions of dollars from foreign corporations, Big Pharma, and tech oligarchs to try and cover up for her votes for impeachment, Red Flag Laws, the vaccine tracking database, and amnesty or her votes against securing our border and withdrawing our troops from Syria.

The message these polls has consistently shown is clear: the other Republican candidates in the district must consolidate behind Joe to ensure we retire Jaime Herrera Beutler and elect an America First conservative who will fight for us as hard as Jaime fights to get checks from foreign corporations.
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc McMain For Congress, Inc
body:
Meanwhile at the border... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a4297ef24200/dhs-could-label-grandma-a-terrorist?e=2429acb6f7)
---
| | [ ](https://marcforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=41459556cfecfd1402c31ae88&id=94e83d601b&e=2429acb6f7)
---
| | Peter,

The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) stooped to a new low last week when they issued a terrorist advisory bulletin stating that Americans vocalizing frustrations about election fraud or COVID-19 mandates could be considered potential “domestic violent extremists.”
**Meanwhile at the southern border...**
---
| [ ](https://marcforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=41459556cfecfd1402c31ae88&id=657c151583&e=2429acb6f7)
---
| Brandon Judd, head of the National Border Patrol Council, testified recently that: _“Right now, the border is controlled by cartels”._

He also reported that Border Patrol are so busy addressing large groups of illegal immigrants, that patrols of the southern border normally managed by 75 to 90 agents are now frequently manned by as few as _**four**_.

We have had an invasion of over three million illegal immigrants from over 150 nations into our country since Biden took office, and _**the DHS is ignoring requests from Border Patrol for help.**_

_Yet the DHS is concerned about Americans exercising their First Amendment rights to engage in discourse about election fraud and COVID-19 mandates?_
These are tactics from the Stasi Playbook and cannot be tolerated.
As your next Congressman I will fight to uphold the constitutional separation of powers which rejects tyrannical behaviors like these.

Support our movement for constitutional governance when you make a donation today:

| Peter,

We've had a terrific start to Election Year thanks to supporters like you. Building momentum early is one of the best ways we can ensure we run the strongest campaign possible as we inch closer to Election Day, [_**and I 'm counting on your grassroots support as we reach our first deadline of the fundraising quarter.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/xuXFfahXlg6Jgm1_66GnybuqMNVxGzZryf2MyuQQPW0=/cNQFvi_O4_bY3JO5V6PRu2UYL1prqhf3Yv2B2SxLAco=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220216-1-EM&amount=25)

The first few weeks of Election Year have been busy. I've led the charge to tackle corruption in Congress with my bill, the TRUST in Congress Act, which would ban members of Congress and their spouses from trading individual stocks by requiring they sell their individual stock holdings or put them in a blind trust.

With redistricting finalized late last year, we've built up a great team and are recruiting amazing volunteers to collect signatures and mobilize across our 11 localities!

**And, believe it or not, we 're already more than halfway through the first fundraising quarter of Election Year. [_That is why today I ask humbly for you to consider a contribution to our campaign._](https://act.myngp.com/el/xuXFfahXlg6Jgm1_66GnybuqMNVxGzZryf2MyuQQPW0=/cNQFvi_O4_bY3JO5V6PRu2UYL1prqhf3Yv2B2SxLAco=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220216-1-EM&amount=25)**

Abigail

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | Confirmed – President Biden is set to give his State of the Union address on March 1st. We need to know if Democrats in Cresco are planning to watch his State of the Union Address in a few weeks. | | | –Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. | | Peter, I’m running to represent Michigan’s new Eleventh District. In a moment, I’m going to explain why I’m so excited to run in the place me and my family have called home for generations. [_**But before I get into it, can you chip into our campaign right away? It’s an honor to have you on this team.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41875222/330693900/-1667347133?noskip=true&refcode=em_20220216_f_a_launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiZmM2YS01NjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uqkic1IgsTPkDloUOh5J3A2ZllObQih0awlF2OZURHg=) Every day, I’m honored to serve my constituents on Capitol Hill, fighting to uphold the values we hold dear. We have a fight ahead of us and it’s going to take all hands on deck to continue to deliver for the progressive movement. I’ve spent my career fighting for working Americans and their families, and I’m proud to bring those ideals with me to Congress. Whether it’s supporting workers’ rights in the halls of Congress, or assisting in unionization efforts on the ground in my district, I know how far we can go when we work together for one another. [_**Peter, I’m excited to be on this journey with you — will you watch our launch video and then chip in to become a founding grassroots donor of this campaign? Our most common contribution is $10.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41875223/330693901/-1667347133?noskip=true&refcode=em_20220216_f_a_launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiZmM2YS01NjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uqkic1IgsTPkDloUOh5J3A2ZllObQih0awlF2OZURHg=) Our team is growing, and the momentum continues to build. Our progressive coalition knows how to win tough fights, and I’m proud to have folks from our communities, labor unions, and national progressive leaders like Senator Elizabeth Warren on our team. It's clear that Michiganders want the progressive agenda to remain in Congress, and I’m proud to lead the charge. The road to November is long, Peter, but I know we can do this if we work together. I’m proud of the work we’ve already accomplished, but there’s still so much left to do. _**[Watch our launch video then chip in to support this grassroots movement. It’s people like you — not special interests — who will power us to victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41875224/330693903/-1667347133?noskip=true&refcode=em_20220216_f_a_launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiZmM2YS01NjhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uqkic1IgsTPkDloUOh5J3A2ZllObQih0awlF2OZURHg=)**_ Let’s go!

Friend, Elections are expensive. It’s just the truth of the matter. In order to run a successful campaign, we need to get ads up on TV and digital platforms, hire and train a diverse and talented staff, mobilize volunteers and voters across the state, and more. Doing all of that takes significant resources. Michael talks the talk when it comes to campaign finance reform, so he doesn’t take a cent from super PACs or corporate special interests. That, combined with the fact that our Republican opponents are writing themselves massive checks to fund their own campaigns, means we have to work harder to raise the resources we need to win. **With so much on the line, we need to stay on track with our fundraising to protect and expand our Senate majority.****We don't have to outraise them, but we do have to keep pace with our goals.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41885042/330739238/292594599?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220216_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODhiMjU3Yi04MDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aUIu_QS-UCyRMfK1TfNGM7b35exk2TsPVIcJoUkvWBA=)****

Peter,

name: John Fetterman
subject: Open for some photos from our recent campaign stops:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I'd *love* to share some updates from the road with yinz.
#
Hey Derek — it's John.
Gisele and I spent this weekend visiting 5 counties across Northwestern PA, and I’m *still* overwhelmed with gratitude.
In Smethport, a town of 1,600 people in a county Trump won 72%-26% in 2020, over 100 people showed up.
In Clarion, a town of 5,500 people in a county that Trump won 75%-24% in 2020, 60 people showed up.
In Harmony, a town of 1,100 in a county Trump won 65%-33% in 2020, 80 people showed up.
And our other two stops in Warren and Venango, counties where Trump won 68%-29% and 70%-28%, respectively, also brought out dozens of folks.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44185?refcode=ema20220216-4613&t=1&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz) | [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44185?refcode=ema20220216-4613&t=2&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz)
---|---
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44185?refcode=ema20220216-4613&t=3&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz) | [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44185?refcode=ema20220216-4613&t=4&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz)
_Even though it was Superbowl AND Valentine’s Day weekend!!!_
There’s a *lot* of cynics who’d tell me that putting 600+ miles on my Ram to visit these five towns is a waste of time. Well, the hundreds of inspiring supporters + donors I met on Saturday prove they’re wrong.
People shared their real concerns with me: About our crumbling roads and bridges, about access to broadband in rural areas, and affording health care. And I shared how I plan to prioritize these core issues as a U.S. Senator.
**Our campaign’s motto is every county, every vote** — and we mean it. No town is too small, rural, or “red” for us to count out. We’re running a 67 County campaign because every Pennsylvanian deserves someone to fight for them.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44185?refcode=ema20220216-4613&t=5&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz)
_No weekend on the road is complete without a Sheetz run._
Derek, seriously, I'm so deeply proud to be able to share all of these campaign photos + updates with you. Because the truth is that YOU are the only reason why our grassroots campaign is able to travel from county to county to earn the votes of working Pennsylvanians and their families.
**Grassroots contributions — most of which come in response to emails like this one — are what allow us to travel to all of these campaign stops. You're literally keeping this show on the road!** So now that we’re over halfway to our next public reporting deadline with the FEC, I must ask once more:
**[Will you fund more campaign events like these by chipping in your first $5 right now? Even a modest donation would help — even just a buck or two — will help us reach every voter, including areas that are often forgotten.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44185?refcode=ema20220216-4613&t=6&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44185?refcode=em20220216-4613&amount=5&t=25&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz)**
Thank you so much for all you do for our campaign.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. **We're just over halfway to our next public reporting deadline with the FEC** , so it'd be incredible if you could chip in any amount you can spare to this email. Keeping fundraising steady is how we can stay on the road meeting voters — which is where Gisele and I really need to be! **[So please chip in $5 if you can today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44185?refcode=ema20220216-4613&t=26&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220216-4613-footer&t=27&refcode2=4613_434096_j14Kyz&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=28&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=4613%2E434096%2Ej14Kyz)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: TEAM Blue PAC is targeting Justice Democrats candidates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last summer, the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House, Hakeem Jeffries,
joined Rep. Josh Gottheimer in creating ‘Team Blue PAC’ supposedly to stop
Democrats from “fighting each other instead of fighting the other team.”

But what Team Blue PAC is actually doing is sending tens of thousands of
dollars into safe blue districts to stop primary challenges from Justice
Democrats.

It’s alarming that critical resources from Democratic Party leadership are
going to protect incumbents from having to face any competition in these
deep blue districts instead of protecting the swing seats Democrats are in
danger of losing in November.

A Democratic majority won’t mean anything if it doesn’t include candidates
willing to take on the corporations and put people first. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94635?refcode=em20220216-22006&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=22006%2E1203867%2E6blkQm ]That is why
we’re asking: Can you make a contribution so we can expand our voting bloc
in Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94635?refcode=em20220216-22006&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22006%2E1203867%2E6blkQm ]Contribute $3

Sometimes it feels like the establishment is focused on fighting harder
against progressive principals, nurses, bartenders, and labor organizers
than Republicans. In fact, Team Blue PAC is already spending money against
our slate of Justice Democrats, but we can’t move forward by electing the
same Democrats who have spent the last four years obstructing
progressives.

The establishment is targeting Justice Democrats because they know that
the candidates we elect to Congress will govern according to their
progressive values, not the influence of Wall Street. And while Justice
Democrats are fighting to fundamentally transform politics, Team Blue PAC
is working just as hard to maintain the harmful status quo. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94635?refcode=em20220216-22006&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22006%2E1203867%2E6blkQm ]Will you
back us in this fight by contributing $3 right now?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94635?refcode=em20220216-22006&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=22006%2E1203867%2E6blkQm ]Contribute

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=22006%2E1203867%2E6blkQm ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=22006%2E1203867%2E6blkQm ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220216-22006-footer&t=1026&refcode2=22006_1203867_6blkQm&akid=22006%2E1203867%2E6blkQm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=22006%2E1203867%2E6blkQm

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Here's the deal:

**I'm Mitch McConnell's number one target. **
While I'm focused on delivering for Granite Staters, the GOP is flooding New Hampshire's airwaves with millions of dollars in attack ads to smear my record and rally their far-right base.
**[Before I go any further, can I ask you to make your first $5 donation to defend this vulnerable seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41885486/330741576/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk674-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjYzZTdkOC04MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_QuPIa6WxsVXqBZFtWw6ePhYzwtJz_K35SY00Yl_ZQE=)**
If I lose, Mitch McConnell will add another Republican to his ranks, and Democrats will have virtually no chance of holding the Senate majority. That's why extreme GOP groups have spent more money against me than any other Senate Democrat in the country — over $7.5 million and counting.
I don't have the bottomless pockets of dark money super PACs like Mitch McConnell does. My campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you. We can win this race and protect our Senate majority, but it's going to take all of us working together.
**[That's why I'm reaching out today, friend. Can I count on you to make your first $5 donation to keep this seat and the Senate blue? body:
I keep my promises.
| Friend,
---
I promised you that despite the highest court in our state REFUSING to take our case against the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) and uphold the law, I would _never_ be deterred.
---
**That’s why when I am governor, I will create a new Office of Election Integrity & Public Trust Unit within the state Department of Justice to ensure YOUR vote counts.**
---
_But to clean up our elections, we must first win this toss-up governor’s race._
---
