There’s no two ways about it Friend, confidence in our elections was severely damaged in 2020.
---
_Processes were changed at the final hour in violation of the law, and of course, Tony Evers and the Democrats have no interest in following the law because these illegal changes benefited them._
---
What we have today in the WEC is a backwards agency that issues guidance that they, themselves, determine is or is not legal. That ENDS on my watch.
---
Creating this new unit with clear statutory responsibilities will provide greater oversight of our elections and teeth to enforce the law against violators.
---
If Tony Evers refuses to protect your fundamental right to have your vote count, then he certainly doesn’t deserve to be your governor.
---

Friend,
---
I hate to bring you bad news, but the Wisconsin Supreme Court has REFUSED to uphold the law, denying our case against the Wisconsin Elections Commission for their unlawful guidance.
---
It is truly a sad day when our state’s highest court will not act to ensure YOUR vote counts.
---
**_But I will _never_ be deterred. The Court’s decision simply means the stakes of our toss-up governor’s race are that much higher._**
---

clean_body: I keep my promises. | Friend, I promised you that despite the highest court in our state REFUSING to take our case against the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) and uphold the law, I would never be deterred. That’s why when I am governor, I will create a new Office of Election Integrity & Public Trust Unit within the state Department of Justice to ensure YOUR vote counts. But to clean up our elections, we must first win this toss-up governor’s race. There’s no two ways about it Friend, confidence in our elections was severely damaged in 2020. Processes were changed at the final hour in violation of the law, and of course, Tony Evers and the Democrats have no interest in following the law because these illegal changes benefited them. What we have today in the WEC is a backwards agency that issues guidance that they, themselves, determine is or is not legal. That ENDS on my watch. Creating this new unit with clear statutory responsibilities will provide greater oversight of our elections and teeth to enforce the law against violators. If Tony Evers refuses to protect your fundamental right to have your vote count, then he certainly doesn’t deserve to be your governor. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Sat, Feb 5, 2022 Subject: RE: Case Denied To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I hate to bring you bad news, but the Wisconsin Supreme Court has REFUSED to uphold the law, denying our case against the Wisconsin Elections Commission for their unlawful guidance. It is truly a sad day when our state’s highest court will not act to ensure YOUR vote counts. But I will never be deterred. The Court’s decision simply means the stakes of our toss-up governor’s race are that much higher. To ensure our elections are secure and free of fraud ahead of 2024, we must FIRE Tony Evers so we can enact election security. We cannot trust a radical Democrat like Tony Evers to protect the integrity of our elections. He already VETOED 6 separate election security bills in one fell swoop. And all the while, Evers has the gall to attack me for wanting to ensure that every LEGAL vote counts. There is too much on the line this year, Friend. The very core of our democracy – your fundamental right to have your vote count – depends on our ability to defeat Tony Evers in this must-win race. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

subject: Matt is the real deal.

body:
| Look team, before I ask you to donate today, there’s something I want you to know: I’ve worked for all sorts of political campaigns for _years,_ and I can proudly say Matt West is the FIRST candidate I’ve worked with who truly understands the issues:
* **Matt’s not just a scientist who’s studied climate change (unlike most politicians in D.C.), but he’s LIVED through the record-shattering heatwave here in the Pacific Northwest. He knows the consequences of inaction.**
* **Matt’s traveled the district and met with Oregonians about today’s most pressing issues — the rise in inflation, homelessness, social security, and so much more. Matt’s not just paying you lip service — he's listening to your voice.**
* **And while politicians today kneel at the altar of billionaires and Corporate PACs, Matt rejects any donation that isn’t from grassroots supporters like you. He understands that real change comes from people-powered movements like ours.**

Friend, my point is Matt West is a genuine leader. He’s ready to serve Oregon and fight like hell for you. But I really need your help to get him over the top in fundraising this month if we want to stand a chance in the primary election. **[We’re 8 hours away from our crucial mid-month deadline and 57 donations short of our goal. He knows the consequences of inaction. Matt’s traveled the district and met with Oregonians about today’s most pressing issues — the rise in inflation, homelessness, social security, and so much more. Matt’s not just paying you lip service — he's listening to your voice. And while politicians today kneel at the altar of billionaires and Corporate PACs, Matt rejects any donation that isn’t from grassroots supporters like you. He understands that real change comes from people-powered movements like ours. Friend, my point is Matt West is a genuine leader. He’s ready to serve Oregon and fight like hell for you. name: Josh Riley

| Peter,

[_**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in to our campaign before the mid-month deadline tonight. But first, let me explain why this ask is so important.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41885698/330743676/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220216-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODc3OGM4OS04NDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t7OEg7KZfATSsZldruK5n5ebWq1xCBZg1V8Qieabxz4=)

Right now, we have a razor-thin majority in the House of Representatives and we’re tied 50-50 in the Senate.

And given what we have witnessed in Washington in the last couple of years, it is clear that our Democracy could be on the line in the midterm elections.

So here’s the deal, Peter: if we want to protect our fragile Democratic majority in November, holding seats will not be enough – we need to flip Republican seats like this one, too.

[_**And that’s why I’m reaching out. Will you chip in $5, $10 or more before the clock strikes midnight? We’re falling just short of our $10,000 goal, and every dollar helps bring us closer →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41885699/330743677/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220216-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODc3OGM4OS04NDhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t7OEg7KZfATSsZldruK5n5ebWq1xCBZg1V8Qieabxz4=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: The GOP is Missing in Action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
What are these RINOs doing? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066169?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e57c820bb7&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Dear Patriot:

We found out last week that the CIA is collecting bulk data on every single American—illegally spying on the very people it claims to protect.

Special Counsel John Durham released more information about how Hillary Clinton and the DNC illegally spied on President Trump and his campaign during and after the 2016 election.

Republican Rep. Troy Nehls revealed that the Leftist assassination squad known as the U.S. Capitol Police broke into his Congressional office and photographed confidential material in an attempt to intimidate him.

Canada, our neighbor to the north—our largest trading partner—declared martial law and brutally broke up peaceful protests against its draconian and tyrannical Plandemic lockdowns, mandates, and internal passports.

And all of that was just in the last few days.

**Meanwhile, where is our Republican Party? Where are our self-proclaimed conservative “fighters,” our “warriors,” the people who tell us they represent us?**

They’re **__nowhere__** to be found.

They’re **_absolutely silent_** —just like they were silent when Communists stole the 2020 election.

My RINO opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, hasn’t said **__one word__** about the Deep State spying on his constituents.

He hasn’t said **__one word__** about the Democrats’ Russia hoax or their illegal espionage against President Trump.

He hasn’t said **__one word__** about the rogue Feds breaking into his own colleague’s office and intimidating him.

He hasn’t said _**_a single thing_**_ to support the heroic Canadian truckers fighting for their freedom, and he hasn’t said anything about Prime Minister Trudeau declaring martial law and suspending Canadians’ civil and human rights.

He only talks about “human rights” when it gives him the pretext to incite war in far-flung places like Ukraine so he can please his Deep State Military-Industrial Complex donors.

**Steve Womack doesn’t care about what happened to President Trump—he undermined Trump at every turn, blamed Trump for January 6 th, and called Trump supporters, along with anyone who tells the truth about election fraud, “un-patriotic, un-American extremists.”**

_My opponent isn’t alone, though. Almost the entire Republican Party is AWOL, fiddling on the roof while our country is turned into a totalitarian police state._

_It’s time to get these worthless jellyfish out of office and replace them with warriors who will stand up against the Deep State and FIGHT for the people._

**We’re running out of time—we might only have 1 or 2 elections left to turn this ship around before we really do lose it forever.**

**[_Step 1 in taking our country back is to REPLACE every single one of the toothless RINOs that keep holding us back_ _._

_I will FIGHT the Deep State, and they know it. That's why the __Establishment_ _ is doing everything it can to stop me._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=c78da022b4&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me tell the GOP Establishment that the people are DONE with their cowardice_ _ \-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=af9c81817b&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, who aren't going to tuck tail and run when they get called mean names._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=6b367db054&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=9e3002b612&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
NeilforArkansas.comPO Box 652Bentonville, AR 72712-0652

name: Imani Oakley
subject: Corporate Democrats just declared war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

Many of you may remember Rep. Josh Gottheimer as one of the few Democrats who tried to block President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda. Or maybe you remember him as the “Democrat” who voted with Trump more than any other member of the party.

Either way, what you really need to know is that last year, Rep. Gottheimer banded together with Rep. Hakeem Jeffries to create a corporate-backed PAC called Team Blue, with the sole mission of preserving Rep. Gottheimer’s Blue Dog ideology by attacking progressive campaigns like ours.

Today, they announced their first slate of endorsements. And guess who made the top of their list?

That’s right — Rep. Donald Payne Jr.

Corporate Democrats have declared war on our movement, Peter, and we need to fight back. Click here to rush a $27 donation and help us show these politicians the power of our progressive movement. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-february2022?refcode=teamblue]

This is just the beginning. Between the sexist attacks from New Jersey’s corrupt political machine and the tens of thousands in corporate money pouring into his campaign, Rep. Payne Jr. is gearing up for a real fight.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: The Recall Succeeded
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [A Political Earthquake](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqdr01cJaOcSWE_g0hPSprVsrUKYqOVaJpwa_h6VtXXzA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_16_final&n=1) America’s most liberal city just recalled from office 3 school board members who refused to open schools. The political earthquake of 2022 has begun. It was not even close. 79% of San Franciscans voted to oust Board Member Alison Collins. Board Member Gabriela Lopez was recalled by 75% of voters and Faauuga Moliga was removed by 72%. Also yesterday, after large campus protests, El Dorado Union High School District announced it will no longer force students to wear masks. It's really that simple. And in more excellent news, a new poll is brutal for Newsom. Just 11% of voters say he's doing a good job on homelessness, 20% on crime, 27% on schools. Politicians might finally be getting the message. The Public Safety Committee just agreed to vote on my bill to repeal Prop. 47. Together we’ve built a movement, and it’s starting to upend politics at every level. [Help me keep our movement growing](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_16_final&n=2) [Join us on Thursday evening](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioq55pgteefgkyyYf5WSYuda&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_16_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_16_final&n=4).

clean_body: We want to hear from you personally. | | | Peter, This is a grassroots movement, powered by everyday people who are tired of Kyrsten Sinema’s obstruction and want to replace her with a real Democrat. So we want to hear directly from supporters like you and get feedback on our strategy. The more qualitative feedback we get from supporters in our first official Strategy Survey, the more insight we'll have from the ground about how we can best mobilize Arizona voters and defeat Kyrsten Sinema in a primary. As a reminder, the Primary Sinema Project funds Arizona organizers on the ground who are holding Sinema accountable and laying the groundwork for another Democrat to replace her ASAP. We’re counting on feedback from our Strategy Survey to help us improve our grassroots fundraising and bring even more people into our movement. Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot, and we can’t wait to share what we learn from you and your fellow supporters. More soon, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Want comedy that’s actually funny? Want to hear exclusive interviews with the top minds in the conservative movement? We’ve got you. In the past few months, we’ve had a lot going on. We’ve sued the Biden Administration for their unconstitutional vaccine mandate, we’ve built up our investigative reporting team, and we’ve debuted a new comedy show -- Adam Carolla’s Truth Yeller. And we’ve got more in store. Ben just launched a new series called “The Search,” where he takes you behind the scenes so you can see where the conversation goes when the camera isn’t rolling. His first episode with Jordan Peterson was just released! See the Behind the Scenes preview here for a sneak peek! Speaking of watching... our first original Daily Wire production, starring none other than Vincent Gallo, will be released this month! And our movie featuring Gina Carano will be released later this year. Make sure you watch the trailer for Shut In and to get access to our feature films. Don’t worry – there’s more where that came from. We’re constantly creating new media here at the Daily Wire because if we don’t, the Left wins. Thank you, Team Daily Wire 1831 12th Ave South Ste. 460, Nashville, TN 37203 |

clean_body: I hope I can count on you | | | I'll be honest, friend – things aren't looking great. My Election Year membership campaign expires at midnight, but I'm still 513 members short of my goal. Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. That's why they're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat – no matter how much it costs. Right now, Marco Rubio is more vulnerable than ever – but we need resources to compete with him. With time running out before tonight's deadline, I see that you still haven't activated your membership. Senate control is riding on what happens here, so I hope I can count on you to give right now: = Thanks, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Our district will look different
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

It’s official: We’re 90 DAYS from Primary Election Day.

North Carolina’s new redistricting maps are yet to be finalized, but we do
know that the current NC-02 district will look different. So, we
*absolutely* must have the resources to reach new voters and spread the
word about Erica’s vision for bold, transformative change in rural eastern
North Carolina.

If
you’ve been waiting to support Erica, now is the time. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40464?refcode=em20220216-884&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=884%2E3698%2EOICMEM ]Will you chip in
$5, or anything you can, to help us kick our campaign into
overdrive and send Erica to Congress?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40464?refcode=em20220216-884&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=884%2E3698%2EOICMEM ]Donate $5

This campaign is about sending progressive representation to Congress that
will fight tirelessly for everyday people, small farmers, and all of our
neighbors who have long been ignored and neglected.

Growing up on the family farm, Erica understands the dignity of work. She
knows what it means to work all day to put food on the table and to fight
to survive while carrying crushing medical bills and student debt.

She believes in bold climate action and creating good-paying union jobs,
universal broadband internet, and economic justice. Erica is the *only*
pro-choice Democrat in this race — and the only candidate that has pledged
to take $0 from corporate PACs.

But we’re up against anti-choice and far-right extremist opponents —
including a well-funded January 6th insurrectionist working to turn NC-02
red.

That’s why with 90 days until our primary, it’s absolutely necessary to
ramp up our efforts to elect Erica. She is the proven progressive champion
for working people who can defend this wide-open U.S. House seat.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40464?refcode=em20220216-884&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=884%2E3698%2EOICMEM ]So, will you make today the day you chip in $5 to support Erica Smith? We need
your help to power our organizing efforts and win this race.

Thank you

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220216-884-footer&t=1023&refcode2=884_3698_OICMEM&akid=884%2E3698%2EOICMEM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=884%2E3698%2EOICMEM

name: =?utf-8?Q?Garrett=20Soldano?=
subject: Lansing Lobbyists set RECORD - they want our tax dollars
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Not how government should work, Peter. | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=71e81275d6&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | Peter -

Politicians in the Lansing Swamp have _never_ been this out of touch with the citizens of Michigan.

This week, [The Detroit News reported](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=c6bcda7792&e=fe4b890356) that the Lansing lobbying core spent $44.2 million to influence the decision of Michigan lawmakers - **an all time high.

_Why?_** State government is flushed with cash because of Biden's COVID giveaways, fueling the inflation crisis that is crushing families in Michigan and across the country.

Now, lobbyists are trying to get their hands on that money - **OUR taxpayer dollars** \- to boost their own interests, and the career politicians on both sides the isle are giving in.

This is one of the reasons why Michigan has long been ranked [the most corrupt state in the entire nation](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=400d459b04&e=fe4b890356) \- with politicians, special interests and the corporate elite doing anything they can to keep power in their hands and keep We the People out of our government.

Our grassroots movement is the political establishment's worst nightmare, Peter.

**I'm not backed by the corporate media or the career politicians - this campaign is fueled by patriotic citizens like you.**
__[Pitch in $25 Now to Defend Freedom](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=6dead2c13b&e=fe4b890356)__
**This isn't about me, folks.** This is about all of us - patriotic citizens taking a stand and demanding that our FREEDOM be restored and that our GOVERNMENT serves the people.

We've seen what the elites are willing to do to citizens like us. Look at the tyranny in Canada and the government's attack on working class truckers. _We must fight back and stand up for our freedoms._

**That is precisely why we need a Republican nominee who will fight for the people** , not the political class and status-qou.

It is time for real change in Michigan. _It is time for REAL Americans_ to get in office who will do what's right and represent the people.
We are DONE with silver spoon politicians ruling over us.

**I need your help to fight back against the political establishment.
[Can you make a contribution of $10, $25 or any amount to support our grassroots campaign today?](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=4741eb28ac&e=fe4b890356)**

---
| [DONATE](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=eab4bea597&e=fe4b890356 "DONATE")
---
| What our movement has already been able to achieve is remarkable, Peter, **but we still have a difficult journey ahead of us.**

[A donation of any amount](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=853934955b&e=fe4b890356) will help expand our grassroots field team and spread our message online and on TV.

I couldn't do this without the incredible energy and assistance of our volunteer army. Sign up here to take a grassroots workshop training and join our team: [https://forms.gle/SuCn56xdeCfS82LV9](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=88774b13f2&e=fe4b890356).

The Power of One Leads to the Power of Many, Peter. Together, we will UNITE the citizens of Michigan and restore our state.

In Liberty,
---
| |
---
| Garrett Soldano
Grassroots Republican for Governor

_P.S. - watch my full Facebook live on the subject by clicking below 👇🏼_
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=563de20b64&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [DONATE](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=bbcb18c752&e=fe4b890356 "DONATE")
---
| | | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081

As one of Jessica’s supporters, you know that she’s the real deal.

She has a clear vision for her campaign that’s deeply rooted in community, love, and safety — exactly what we need more of in Congress. You don’t see a lot of campaigns focused on those values (and that have fun along the way!), and I’m so excited to work with her every day to get her elected to Congress.

But to get her there, we are working overtime during the next nine days of early voting to reach every neighborhood in TX-28 and show why Jessica is the best choice to lead the district into a new era of progressive change.

clean_body: I just wrapped up a meeting with the team about our campaign finances. | | | Peter, it’s Jordan — Finance Director for Team Cisneros. I just wrapped up a meeting with the team about our campaign finances, which is why I am reaching out to you today. Early voting is already underway and we are working overtime to reach as many voters as possible in the district. But I’m a little concerned our momentum is slipping — we are behind on our $10,000 goal to help supercharge our efforts during early voting. We set goals like these to make sure our team has the resources to run a competitive campaign and spread the word about our bold movement for change. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: As one of Jessica’s supporters, you know that she’s the real deal. She has a clear vision for her campaign that’s deeply rooted in community, love, and safety — exactly what we need more of in Congress. You don’t see a lot of campaigns focused on those values (and that have fun along the way!), and I’m so excited to work with her every day to get her elected to Congress. But to get her there, we are working overtime during the next nine days of early voting to reach every neighborhood in TX-28 and show why Jessica is the best choice to lead the district into a new era of progressive change. Thank you for your support, — Jordan H. Finance Director, Jessica Cisneros for Congress | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

| | | This is about setting the record straight. | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wrxiVjJVo8kNicQiFnsBVpRGuQ0JDMYhZQtI9WSAAbOe896O0S6MFeiSqZbCyjSXW8ag-qyuYoMlhF0V6kfGbQeAvMRjtxrXn4vygoc2cYePiHzMt_SfIdPH-o5qatSMx0hnb--Dpc3GQ_P2yebW9iGfNcNEpIBN2FLX8SBnlZYQZWKZ_upl1o7iV8_db0GbZE31hr4tWlWRuKZPgWkwO-gwXFUoqtwJRDSxbIIi_DPv2g8Twu4ul7ZMeYME_63m7DJkqmFkV3PhIT0EYbht0gcFO6IC6ZT9qO398yfQzbbrZzZdWUayTcopjTioca63PQZKnHDBwP6I31BAvX5_p2zDchIKpkvggNyzixQus7-LUyhSZIaym9ctzM2S_vec-jyUmenvy7XK_ASJh9aVqvQjVRQkBdHVtNbvXKTta9cCCHtNve40cqgszp9OWE24uQ9yccia5GUsVeptdlwP7pdi3cElhFDlkQB19fIUpuOFgk05uMwfIZ4ILOrLN9YBk/3jm/h7y27eRNSAG5F4HvA4EWRA/h0/zE4GBbe_rv5kKiXrDkwpl6J8iCf4WQfRMZjKnbJj_30)

| Team, my name is Ruben Gallego, and I represent Arizona in Congress.

Before that, I was a Marine who served in Iraq. So I know the difference between “legitimate political discourse” and what an insurrection looks like. I was also on the floor of the U.S. House, listening to Paul Gosar lie to the American people when Trump insurrectionists tried to break in.

So when the Republican National Committee recently voted to claim that the **January 6** commission was a witch hunt for people participating in “legitimate political discourse,” I knew I couldn’t stay quiet.

I’m not going to let my state or my country be taken over by insurrectionists determined to damage our democracy. So I’m personally reaching out to you to split a donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party so we can work together to defeat every single insurrectionist here in Arizona.

**[Team, I’m personally reaching out to you to split a donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party. Can you make a $5 donation today so we can work together to defeat every single insurrectionist here in Arizona?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wrxiVjJVo8kNicQiFnsBVpRGuQ0JDMYhZQtI9WSAAbOe896O0S6MFeiSqZbCyjSXW8ag-qyuYoMlhF0V6kfGbQeAvMRjtxrXn4vygoc2cYeNzawDwqwat-Y5OD_JEpnqwqOjtb2t8SHHsJ4LQFKHp9FzSPx8k4YWGLuF0jhTAHIGdkD1oGqyY_0765gpdS471GvhD620cv9zhTxAbpWOC4_vrQMPajBTpACVaXerkXCG0X3-J1oolCfIKxBQjYbbcIbvF6XmmH6wU8AF2OpDHbReLwGauVph2je1UrvXNZ5q-N5v7LeDlKWTe_hbzlSk9gJsD2M1dib824Mm_9tr4dJVSmE1xxI1yWHpxZlK_pXgPWAQRdMOnZT8vf2fKc98XYRL_1mVCb3RErmVM2cCYw9WkKCYjrYZLjYe9Mcj8FKrKXYXX8pvIGYWL0Oe8-AkExi3jNxgtDqOm1KgzbR2xzqxjL0Lji1ZmTuPeUnrxlwA/3jm/h7y27eRNSAG5F4HvA4EWRA/h1/WnL0BCAnKkj5xCbzy6R-Iz49u1K3GbxXCXCcWCdE1-4)** [
DONATE ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wrxiVjJVo8kNicQiFnsBVpRGuQ0JDMYhZQtI9WSAAbOe896O0S6MFeiSqZbCyjSXW8ag-qyuYoMlhF0V6kfGbQOzhcIZUDJzpFpwsMCEEFp0eFI6blKuh3EwxotDguCkNt7FuPs8182nXfC1maCsmgHsrWLulpg65sLyHFK2S90NZFstykdGPAR4j9ZgMo7vcFnmqTB-mdKSj5E81e1q-Vbd8drT8ikDbM-lPLQQUZ6XV9Fl2r3krtD10amLl9YjdScsG91ABntEVVp_aLSc0EkuTvkqdq_s0aVjHjaMUv9etYi-1yDbRDTDp35YIzeFl9NnZ6QqPSP5_IspH0pL8qfZ5HwOd1a8nx_HEdyXCh24EzA5ivUJL3qbHbtL4vhEJ2_OmCoQ1KUsZln6ZmWinHqluefdTO-tKvrWuA8bNlbUT2U1c7JhPVN3wFkJyc0TiTYOtNbpbzVwj0XB-fQYBwBHvKZX1UmmgJJcVNHwG86g/3jm/h7y27eRNSAG5F4HvA4EWRA/h2/aCa6j7xQM-bMWv1yE500Mt6hlASaQfP03K3Sw0LJSZ8)
I didn’t just stand by on January 6. My military instincts kicked in that day. As someone who has been on a battlefield, I know January 6 was not legitimate political discourse. It was an attempted coup.

Even though they witnessed the same things I did, every member of the AZ GOP in Congress stood up and voted to overturn our legitimate election results even after those insurrectionists tried to take our Capitol.

**Since then, we’ve found out Paul Gosar and Andy Biggs held meetings with organizers before January 6.** The head of the AZ GOP has been subpoenaed for her role in that day’s events. And countless members of the AZ legislature are continuing to tell straight-up lies about our elections and the insurrection.

Well, since I didn’t stand idly by on January 6, I’m not going to just sit here and take it now either!

**[Team, please consider splitting a donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party, so we have the resources we need to defeat the AZ insurrectionists and the elected officials who support them this November.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wrxiVjJVo8kNicQiFnsBVpRGuQ0JDMYhZQtI9WSAAbOe896O0S6MFeiSqZbCyjSXW8ag-qyuYoMlhF0V6kfGbQeAvMRjtxrXn4vygoc2cYeMBSSTMIoWJSYitccHRgBtEmb0uzh_5VV-vu3fxQFuER8N2JxvJs8B_OjQOjlSDIfpkCJYP0N62UPAmWDh6H8HSlvllkFuCZWH8dwTIJ2O3Gc2Xr4pZ7zXaFLqz4_IEl5EHZNO3ZbmIiFCg3IcZMmoOAVfX2kcmF5TBi1vzcUPJSHhYVb_s64bN5RT6UBx3FYjWOX7kecmk3H9ED6iRvRCT1z8Oh9g2fp-gFJFNXylie4kIiDLWZkBOkVMWZV0suPzFaopGL11S6iud--Jkvg3QsQGQAltmJQ2DtnCttfEeuoWLLAwWyXnogB3vEW-IOTQVrZk69b4JhvPlx1QBIRV46EWWwQ521ueABc2tSJVz3kD1tFKEOOlq_pdhnRb5F8Q/3jm/h7y27eRNSAG5F4HvA4EWRA/h3/mBAxzuSy0JlDLNW5iD-r1tX-Qo5JdHf7lP6U5UH0FUE)**

clean_body: | | | This is about setting the record straight. | | | Team, my name is Ruben Gallego, and I represent Arizona in Congress. Before that, I was a Marine who served in Iraq. So I know the difference between “legitimate political discourse” and what an insurrection looks like. I was also on the floor of the U.S. House, listening to Paul Gosar lie to the American people when Trump insurrectionists tried to break in. So when the Republican National Committee recently voted to claim that the January 6 commission was a witch hunt for people participating in “legitimate political discourse,” I knew I couldn’t stay quiet. I’m not going to let my state or my country be taken over by insurrectionists determined to damage our democracy. So I’m personally reaching out to you to split a donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party so we can work together to defeat every single insurrectionist here in Arizona. I didn’t just stand by on January 6. My military instincts kicked in that day. As someone who has been on a battlefield, I know January 6 was not legitimate political discourse. It was an attempted coup. Even though they witnessed the same things I did, every member of the AZ GOP in Congress stood up and voted to overturn our legitimate election results even after those insurrectionists tried to take our Capitol. Since then, we’ve found out Paul Gosar and Andy Biggs held meetings with organizers before January 6. The head of the AZ GOP has been subpoenaed for her role in that day’s events. And countless members of the AZ legislature are continuing to tell straight-up lies about our elections and the insurrection. Well, since I didn’t stand idly by on January 6, I’m not going to just sit here and take it now either! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, Congressman Ruben Gallego For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: This campaign is 🔥 up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, this is
important:

Our campaign is currently $15,000 short from where we need to be to reach
our mid-month fundraising goal.

We’re relying on donations from emails like this to make sure we stay on
track with our fundraising and make sure our team has the funds we need to
replace Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220216?refcode=em20220216-1572&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1572_346206_CTEQc0&akid=1572%2E346206%2ECTEQc0 ]Will you chip in $25.14 (our average donation) or anything you can
right now to help us hit our goal before midnight tomorrow? We’ll explain
later in this email why your support is more important than ever at this
critical moment for our campaign.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220216?refcode=em20220216-1572&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1572_346206_CTEQc0&akid=1572%2E346206%2ECTEQc0 ]Contribute $25.14

For the past week, Charles has been on the road with our team meeting
voters across Kentucky and spreading our message for bold, progressive
change.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220216?refcode=em20220216-1572&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1572_346206_CTEQc0&akid=1572%2E346206%2ECTEQc0 ][IMG]

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220216?refcode=em20220216-1572&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1572_346206_CTEQc0&akid=1572%2E346206%2ECTEQc0 ][IMG]

We can feel the excitement on the ground to turn Kentucky blue. The
conversations we’re having with voters is the beginning of our work to
unite our Commonwealth and make sure we finally send someone to the U.S.
Senate who will fight for us.

But we know that if we want to win, we need to continue ramping up our
voter outreach efforts, planning more trips like this, and make sure our
people power is felt on Election Day.

Here’s the harsh reality we face: This kind of organizing work is
expensive. From training volunteers, paying for gas, and running our
political ads — there’s a lot of expenses ahead of our campaign. On top of
that, we need significant resources and funding to compete with the
corporate PAC and special interest money that has protected Rand’s seat.

It’s going to take a powerful, grassroots funded movement to organize and
mobilize enough folks to take back Kentucky’s seat at the table.
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220216?refcode=em20220216-1572&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&refcode2=1572_346206_CTEQc0&akid=1572%2E346206%2ECTEQc0 ]That’s why we’re asking for your support right now. Please chip in
$25.14 or anything you can if you want to see us run and help us reach
this critical mid-month goal before our midnight deadline tomorrow.

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220216-1572-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1572_346206_CTEQc0&akid=1572%2E346206%2ECTEQc0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1572%2E346206%2ECTEQc0

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Friend,

I need YOUR help to keep up our campaign's momentum!

I am so thankful for all your support but with February being the shortest month of the year, we have to work twice as hard. Our campaign is working hard every day to spread our message but we need your help.

It’s time to get America back on track and clean up the mess Joe Biden and the Radical Left have made. Together we can build back our economy and make our country affordable again.

Can I count on you to contribute just $28 today for the 28 days of February to help keep our campaign strong?>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-16-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast216)

| Dear Patriot, I have a project that I need your help on. You see, the pro-Life movement is at a crossroads like never before. **Pro-abortion activists are petrified that Roe v. Wade is going to be overturned by the Supreme Court this summer.** Here are a few of the headlines from the panicked liberal media: _The Supreme Court Looks Ready to Overturn Roe v. Wade_ _With 'Roe' in peril, anti-abortion activists rally in Washington_ _Fate of abortion access looms over new Supreme Court term_ This is all great news. But here's the bad news: the Democrats still have a card to play to ensure that the abortion industry survives. There is a bill working its way through Congress to codify Roe v. Wade into law. **In fact, this bill has already passed the House of Representatives, and is now up for consideration in the Senate.** If this bill passes, everything is back to square one. The Supreme Court's decision would be irrelevant, and all of the tremendous pro-Life bills that have passed in the states over the past few years would be wiped off the books. Abortion would be codified into law, and millions of unborn children nationwide would never see the light of day. I cannot abandon those unborn children. Their futures rest in our hands, and we must do all that we can to protect them, even at their most vulnerable stage. **The Democrats’ ability to pass this bill rests on one important objective: increasing their majority in the Senate.** They already have the votes in the House. And they just need to pick up a few more in the Senate. That's why they are targeting my seat so aggressively. They know that replacing a pro-Life champion like myself with a radical pro-abortion Senator would be a game-changer for them. And that's why it's so important that I defeat the Democrat Party in the election this year. [For all those reasons, I am asking you today to help me continue to block pro-abortion legislation in the Senate by chipping in $100, $50, $25, or $10.](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3D9Yjs_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7vFyRH-2F9CYizw5JlgMM-2FwpUjcTdUs0Bpex7BvI4b1zGiMyXYbVJH4TAQPK907eawec53hDFHt0Rz7Oa5IzUZfk7-2FgOmiM9WYLgHn94FGHBiBdjkHqf1lLhaB-2BlR9dRSjerRXaGp-2Bes0Rz-2Fj-2B9hzFlNQv2FMyBXfbwEKg2KQMrkwLLv0DQz0NahncYxJ20nlvTjJ4k4CKKFZnQVMRscBlzQrbdbRih1u2qi3HrCevDRLg7fbg-2Bsd7zGexNjR-2BpfJMcNWG0q1tOyLcgNqRIz2B12nUQScz7bja7DU2NdplWFYyLHaDP1owtjOhrhPpFCDnJpRXt-2BMuvOXDSKeQ9WxUWTw-3D-3D) Growing up with a father who was an OBGYN, I have seen how precious newborn children are. I have also seen how helpless they are, and how badly they need our protection. **What kind of society would abandon the weakest and most helpless among us, and allow them to be terminated by the millions?** History will not look kindly on us if you and I don't do something about this immediately. I am confident that the Supreme Court will come back with a sensible ruling that allows state legislatures to protect the unborn. But if the Democrats manage to codify Roe v. Wade by passing it through Congress, none of that will matter. The only way they can accomplish that is by increasing their majorities in the upcoming elections. And you and I have the ability to stop them. [That's why I am asking you to join with me today to stop the Democrats from putting a pro-abortion Leftist in my seat. Will you chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away?](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DXBnB_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7vFyRH-2F9CYizw5JlgMM-2FwpUjcTdUs0Bpex7BvI4b1zGiMyXYbVJH4TAQPK907eawec53hDFHt0Rz7Oa5IzUZfk7-2FgOmiM9WYLgHn94FGHBiBdjkHqf1lLhaB-2BlR9dRSjerRXaGp-2Bes0Rz-2Fj-2B9hzFlNfE5waus4rS5-2BRA94el05JlTpjG8ERvsKwgrQ9sXBzsYoCcozYvtGSPo8Lta4nxO5c1RsCuFQj-2BDoYhfLLYAzjL3mLnye5XgruNvrI8-2FOy7n4apyv-2B20bN1IGcPWvVdpYDpOBnzV-2FP2QfVa4oDxJjGBmwscJxzq0bowsvr-2BtiLDZmBsxIweUdFwUGBNT1mJb5A-3D-3D) In Liberty, Rand Paul ****

| **** P.S. The Supreme Court is poised to overturn Roe v. Wade this summer. But the Democrats are looking to pass a bill to codify Roe v. Wade into law. In fact, it has already passed the House and is now under consideration in the Senate. **If that bill passes, abortion will remain the law of the land, no matter what the Supreme Court does.** That would lead to the abortions of millions of unborn children. Their hopes, dreams, and futures would be destroyed in the blink of an eye. I can't let that happen. clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, I have a project that I need your help on. You see, the pro-Life movement is at a crossroads like never before. Pro-abortion activists are petrified that Roe v. Wade is going to be overturned by the Supreme Court this summer. Here are a few of the headlines from the panicked liberal media: The Supreme Court Looks Ready to Overturn Roe v. Wade With 'Roe' in peril, anti-abortion activists rally in Washington Fate of abortion access looms over new Supreme Court term This is all great news. But here's the bad news: the Democrats still have a card to play to ensure that the abortion industry survives. There is a bill working its way through Congress to codify Roe v. Wade into law. In fact, this bill has already passed the House of Representatives, and is now up for consideration in the Senate. If this bill passes, everything is back to square one. The Supreme Court's decision would be irrelevant, and all of the tremendous pro-Life bills that have passed in the states over the past few years would be wiped off the books. Abortion would be codified into law, and millions of unborn children nationwide would never see the light of day. I cannot abandon those unborn children. Their futures rest in our hands, and we must do all that we can to protect them, even at their most vulnerable stage. The Democrats’ ability to pass this bill rests on one important objective: increasing their majority in the Senate. They already have the votes in the House. And they just need to pick up a few more in the Senate. That's why they are targeting my seat so aggressively. They know that replacing a pro-Life champion like myself with a radical pro-abortion Senator would be a game-changer for them. And that's why it's so important that I defeat the Democrat Party in the election this year. Growing up with a father who was an OBGYN, I have seen how precious newborn children are. I have also seen how helpless they are, and how badly they need our protection. What kind of society would abandon the weakest and most helpless among us, and allow them to be terminated by the millions? History will not look kindly on us if you and I don't do something about this immediately. I am confident that the Supreme Court will come back with a sensible ruling that allows state legislatures to protect the unborn. But if the Democrats manage to codify Roe v. Wade by passing it through Congress, none of that will matter. The only way they can accomplish that is by increasing their majorities in the upcoming elections. And you and I have the ability to stop them. In Liberty, Rand Paul ** | | | P.S. The Supreme Court is poised to overturn Roe v. Wade this summer. But the Democrats are looking to pass a bill to codify Roe v. Wade into law. In fact, it has already passed the House and is now under consideration in the Senate. If that bill passes, abortion will remain the law of the land, no matter what the Supreme Court does.** That would lead to the abortions of millions of unborn children. Their hopes, dreams, and futures would be destroyed in the blink of an eye. I can't let that happen. clean_body: It’s clear we’re only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. | Fellow American, We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof: | "Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign. " - The Hill, 2/9/2022 Many of Hollywood's top celebrity activists are funneling thousands of dollars each into the campaign account of our opponent. It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. More deep-pocketed Hollywood celebrities are going to send max-out contributions with the intent of keeping their favorite Democrat in the Senate. We've set a goal of raising an additional $35,000 before midnight tonight and could use your help. That may sound like an arbitrary number, but it's the amount of money we need to be raising - DAILY - to run the most competitive campaign possible. While our opponent supports Hollywood's values, I'm fighting for Georgia and our conservative values. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Catherine Cortez Masto (D)
subject: If we lose Nevada, we lose the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6049?t=6&akid=1281%2E878179%2EYm4Sz4) Friend, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically.

**National Journal just named me the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot, which means Mitch McConnell will be zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat he needs to flip the Senate. If we lose Nevada, we lose the Senate.**

I'm no stranger to a tough race – but this is going to be the closest Senate race of the year. The entire force of the GOP is coming after me, so I can’t do this alone. I’ve got to be honest, friend: I’m facing a major fundraising gap and I need your immediate help.

The GOP is already blanketing Nevada with more than $4 million in attack ads to defeat me. We just ran the numbers and I need to raise at least $25,000 by midnight to have the resources to fight back – but right now I'm falling short. **Please, friend, can you help me turn this around before it's too late?** Here's the best link to make your donation: [**https://act.protectvoting.org/go/cortez-masto-allin**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6049?t=7&akid=1281%2E878179%2EYm4Sz4) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6050?t=8&akid=1281%2E878179%2EYm4Sz4)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6051?t=9&akid=1281%2E878179%2EYm4Sz4)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6052?t=10&akid=1281%2E878179%2EYm4Sz4)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6053?t=11&akid=1281%2E878179%2EYm4Sz4)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6049?t=12&akid=1281%2E878179%2EYm4Sz4)
Any amount makes a difference in our fight to defend the Senate. Thanks for giving what you can.

_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!

\- Catherine
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1281%2E878179%2EYm4Sz4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1281%2E878179%2EYm4Sz4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1281%2E878179%2EYm4Sz4) to request fewer emails. | | | Hi there, Phew! I just got off a livestream with Marianne Williamson, Katie Halper, Briahna Joy Gray, Krystal Ball, and Julianna Forlano. I was one of a slate of non-corporate candidates being interviewed as part of a fundraiser for Marianne’s endorsed candidates.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41887436/330773246/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjU0NDY4NS05MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBthyqz3y0aN4vEP4SS9teK8xUcbzjBpqxx9BuZZTWg=)

Can you join the fight by giving a small donation now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41887437/330773247/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjU0NDY4NS05MzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBthyqz3y0aN4vEP4SS9teK8xUcbzjBpqxx9BuZZTWg=) There is a lot of justified skepticism about electoral politics right now, and one point I made during my interview was that if we continue to do electoral politics the way we have, we won’t achieve our goals. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Folks, I urgently need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Folks, a recent poll came out showing me tied with a far-right
Trump Republican. With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, we cannot
afford to fall behind in this campaign.

If we're going to protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we have
to win here in New Hampshire. But the GOP has endless resources, and
they're pulling out all the stops.

So far, top Republicans like Betsy DeVos and Mike Pence have visited the
Granite State to rally their far-right base. And Republican super PACs are
flooding New Hampshire's airwaves with millions in dark money, over $7.5
MILLION AND COUNTING.

If this recent poll indicates anything, it's that these attacks are
starting to break through. It's clear that this race will be an uphill
battle, but I'm no stranger to tough fights. In 2016, I won by only 1,017
votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in
history.

I know we can turn these polls around and pull ahead, but we urgently need
your help.

If we're going to win, it will take an army of grassroots supporters.
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7636?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]We don't need mega donors like Republicans, but we do need people like
you, friend, to split $25 whenever you can.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7636?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7636?t=1010&amount=50&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7636?t=1011&amount=100&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7636?t=1012&amount=200&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7636?t=1013&amount=250&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7636?t=1014&amount=30&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]Other Amount

New Hampshire is a real swing state, and news outlets across the country
are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for
reelection. This is a critical moment in the campaign, and it's vital that
we have the resources to hold this seat.

Your support is so important to my campaign and me, and we're counting on
you. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7636?t=1015&amount=25&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]So please, if you can, split a donation between my campaign and
Tim's to help protect our vulnerable Senate majority.

Thank you for being on our team!

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7635?t=1006&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]Maggie Hassan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1003&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1004&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1005&akid=2361%2E3611125%2E0XtpIz ][IMG]

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: BREAKING re: Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We just announced that we’re officially holding another debate.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220216-672-footer-ak&t=2&akid=672%2E90090%2Emnc-Ee)
Hey,
It’s official: **We’re going to be debating Josh Mandel again on Monday, February 21st in Cleveland.**
Morgan is ready to debate anyone, any time, anywhere – because voters deserve to hear from the candidates who are running to represent them. And she’s ready to defend her progressive priorities for Ohio against Josh Mandel’s far-right conspiracy theories and lies.
[**_But we want to show that there’s a powerful grassroots movement on our side, so_****can you rush a $5 contribution to our campaign right now?**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25845?t=3&akid=672%2E90090%2Emnc-Ee)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25851?refcode=em20220216-672&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=672%2E90090%2Emnc-Ee)**
Last month, in her first debate against far-right Republican Josh Mandel, Morgan showed that she’ll fight for working families in Ohio. Now, we’re preparing to go head to head again to show why **Morgan is the only candidate, Democrat or Republican, who can deliver real change for Ohio.**
Morgan is the _only_ Democrat who can turn out Ohio’s Democratic base like never before. [**_If you chip in right now, we can show Josh Mandel and our other opponents the strength of the movement we’ve built._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25845?t=23&akid=672%2E90090%2Emnc-Ee)
Onwards,
Morgan Harper HQ
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220216-672-footer&t=24&refcode2=672_90090_mnc-Ee&akid=672%2E90090%2Emnc-Ee)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

Morgan is ready to debate anyone, any time, anywhere – because voters deserve to hear from the candidates who are running to represent them. And she’s ready to defend her progressive priorities for Ohio against Josh Mandel’s far-right conspiracy theories and lies. Last month, in her first debate against far-right Republican Josh Mandel, Morgan showed that she’ll fight for working families in Ohio. Now, we’re preparing to go head to head again to show why Morgan is the only candidate, Democrat or Republican, who can deliver real change for Ohio. Morgan is the only Democrat who can turn out Ohio’s Democratic base like never before. Onwards, Morgan Harper HQ | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

| | Team,

Just last week, the House voted on historic legislation to finally help our Postal Service get on solid footing.

The bill will make the Postal Service financially solvent, improve rural delivery, **and _clear the backlog_ of deliveries** impacted by the supply chain. Supporting our Post Office and union postal workers has always been a priority for Marcy, and she was proud to co-sponsor the bill.

**[Marcy is a champion for union workers like our postal employees, and we need to keep her in Congress. Peter,

I need your help to put one of the biggest swing House seats _**on the entire West Coast**_ back in Republican hands.

California's 49th Congressional District - _home to Camp Pendleton, the largest Marine Corps base on the West Coast_ - was represented by Republicans for decades... Then came the Blue Wave.

But now, thanks to redistricting, **this seat is one of the top-targeted Congressional races in the entire country and a centerpiece to our nationwide strategy to win back a Republican House majority.**

I'm Lisa Bartlett – Orange County Supervisor, small business owner, Japanese American, conservative Republican and patriot, [**and I need your help to defeat leftist Democrat incumbent Mark Levin and flip this seat back.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3cc8b87b7f314819998d442bc4990793&_e=UN7ZAMcPcZ3bScO3inBjBaXFNsE9ZJzqzznEBfvq9U-juiLwT-aFx9WMkzqiP32Ei-7zbIE5fOePufWAiVkDTYroIFXj3SWxXppe21H5rON6gCOZgQ3vNsUYJIyur4wh11nMJv1gxv4hd0eLS3q1O2OzoeTsYvPGMxqidiKRgOZprUTdfR9lGHu1Ks04wXdZePiCZ_7bju-el86QSPlJ6OgrQi4jNxA-Uq7IYzkiSqLj6pyLsFhMdryU1bssk4PKecUHvcOYh41tGAnoQY82rN4LoEdUpsqwG_oukNC1Z0wI1xY-VCIevfbkZwnQuF1cQ1HtKlvEmqByOxJxWoI2-zCFUOMHFtY9ajXBq5IAYigu1MYDKVGPM3DmiSI_WLzFZkx49gJ0q_4nZfSHgtYexY0u1W2Ta6c2eoGlbwQGNc7XWuQk13PQQDKI0EBR_zm7jhQ6CHird8HyB-CPncOZZPkxQ1Qvj0Xx9lA5-D5SQzQ%3D)

[**HELP LISA FLIP CA-49 ››**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3cc8b87b7f314819998d442bc4990793&_e=UN7ZAMcPcZ3bScO3inBjBaXFNsE9ZJzqzznEBfvq9U-juiLwT-aFx9WMkzqiP32Ei-7zbIE5fOePufWAiVkDTYroIFXj3SWxXppe21H5rON6gCOZgQ3vNsUYJIyur4wh11nMJv1gxv4hd0eLS3q1O2OzoeTsYvPGMxqidiKRgOZprUTdfR9lGHu1Ks04wXdZePiCZ_7bju-el86QSPlJ6OgrQi4jNxA-Uq7IYzkiSqLj6pyLsFhMdryU1bssk4PKecUHvcOYh41tGAnoQY82rL-8S6EWCeex45eyn5DURsj6QkYAx0DYG1O4UE-25tvFW2I_1dHs9dLRND-N4Z15EK8-h_tq-oS8UoxrvkGfIbNUMBzofrwuy1UwL7TIG2TArtJbMn5SHMnMX2KJVX-PGjirRx8ccaQbKmzemkiG5ixQh8EXBaGMFNwgHKJz8viiE5OhcTpY_yhPWh564T-V0myF8NpgVuBeXaMB8QS5ohI%3D)
With Republicans only needing a net pickup of 5 House seats in the midterms to take back the majority, flipping this seat could make all the difference.

Think about it -- **winning this seat gets us 20% of the way back to controlling the House** and being able to stand up to Biden's destructive and failed agenda.

But my opponent has a huge war chest, having raised $1.9 million last year.

[**That means to flip this seat, we're going to have to work together - and you can start by chipping in a small amount to help support my campaign. A donation of just $10, $25, $50 or even more from everyone reading this email will help put us in contention.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3cc8b87b7f314819998d442bc4990793&_e=UN7ZAMcPcZ3bScO3inBjBaXFNsE9ZJzqzznEBfvq9U-juiLwT-aFx9WMkzqiP32Ei-7zbIE5fOePufWAiVkDTYroIFXj3SWxXppe21H5rON6gCOZgQ3vNsUYJIyur4wh11nMJv1gxv4hd0eLS3q1O2OzoeTsYvPGMxqidiKRgOZprUTdfR9lGHu1Ks04wXdZePiCZ_7bju-el86QSPlJ6OgrQi4jNxA-Uq7IYzkiSqLj6pyLsFhMdryU1bssk4PKecUHvcOYh41tGAnoQY82rPhMulmR2ZYHql3k3OlJH484YUCtCMKVlHDTtU2osR8JNQfrCG0U1ERml5zEmRILrF2zz9liUy9ErV54YzsSm57lhfmWKXSgejlnIPaZv63qVHVOa6Hisj7AyXnB3S1vyRvy2ZKhNSyZA_-Q1v7ENGmaRt-U0cs6RM_OesxabadIZoafymqx16h3U_wtYR58n3zAmGEZR9Uwxuo3i1tk8fU%3D)

[**HELP LISA FLIP CA-49 ››**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3cc8b87b7f314819998d442bc4990793&_e=UN7ZAMcPcZ3bScO3inBjBaXFNsE9ZJzqzznEBfvq9U-juiLwT-aFx9WMkzqiP32Ei-7zbIE5fOePufWAiVkDTYroIFXj3SWxXppe21H5rON6gCOZgQ3vNsUYJIyur4wh11nMJv1gxv4hd0eLS3q1O2OzoeTsYvPGMxqidiKRgOZprUTdfR9lGHu1Ks04wXdZePiCZ_7bju-el86QSPlJ6OgrQi4jNxA-Uq7IYzkiSqLj6pyLsFhMdryU1bssk4PKecUHvcOYh41tGAnoQY82rLonXUdem7Z-NM0TtFGEoqiUsQ4SLOTwY6mPlzf1oHbIxdhaRpfvHUjeFr92FNGS_vNDnnowfxkynbjM7E9AHfIAnArrk6-_BOiyjwfOhNfbNb0lh2OSBwyETAmx_Dy-1RcfjkBOnDU5dXHIOioODIp8sOi1qGkDGh0oJofIPzR4g-mitX0pVsJte5SpUqccaxLSlYmzrbJPnYIy6222B2Q%3D)
Our country can't afford - **and I mean _LITERALLY_ can't afford** - to let Biden and the Democrats continue adding to our national debt, driving up inflation, and increasing government control over our lives.

This past year under Biden has been a complete disaster, and restoring Republican control of Congress is Step 1 to righting the ship.

But to win the House, we MUST flip CA-49. Right now, [**can I count on your support to help me secure a victory that could change the fate of our nation?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3cc8b87b7f314819998d442bc4990793&_e=UN7ZAMcPcZ3bScO3inBjBaXFNsE9ZJzqzznEBfvq9U-juiLwT-aFx9WMkzqiP32Ei-7zbIE5fOePufWAiVkDTYroIFXj3SWxXppe21H5rON6gCOZgQ3vNsUYJIyur4wh11nMJv1gxv4hd0eLS3q1O2OzoeTsYvPGMxqidiKRgOZprUTdfR9lGHu1Ks04wXdZePiCZ_7bju-el86QSPlJ6OgrQi4jNxA-Uq7IYzkiSqLj6pyLsFhMdryU1bssk4PKecUHvcOYh41tGAnoQY82rLdU7JYaPHBMGR83K1dw1r9quwpw1aNunl8JuwrKaNwnd1VReq99okZ56Ici1sIa9W36wp2yOTaH3c0pVs0tzxbuMOWzcKXG5YheU8j_dVdWZYB-7sL2BnJRo1lVX3g5-dBZbyusXSJeeGtQNtbRjI1gkc5h6Ooqgivbb45XDVLBdLYET6MNMjqXWTGGYMhnaQUegnYH6ClfTy8dGF5rxQc%3D)

Thanks,

Lisa Bartlett
Republican for Congress

**Hillary Clinton.**

Handed the Democrat nomination on a plate by a completely corrupted system, the largest presidential campaign war chest in history, favored in virtually all the polls and by the entire liberal media establishment and most of the American political elite of both parties, **Hillary Clinton** would have been in the Oval Office if it weren’t for **Donald J. It’s a huge responsibility - being the leading outside group still supporting President Donald Trump and candidates nationwide!

But now we know that the truly deplorable “deep state” war against our 45th President began with her - and her 2016 presidential campaign:

That they hired the computer hackers who broke into the servers at Trump Tower and even the White House, looking to fabricate evidence and frame up Donald Trump with sordid and absurd allegations of “Russian Collusion.”

That’s what we officially learned in the last few days, Peter, after Special Prosecutor **John Durham** , appointed by Trump Attorney General **Bob Barr** to investigate the outrageous “deep state” scheme against President Trump, officially revealed Crooked Hillary’s role.

Now, you and I both know we can’t expect the liberal, “mainstream” Fake News media, the Democrats on Capitol Hill, or the Biden Justice Department to do anything about this outrage, Peter.

That’s why we must win BIG in the rapidly approaching 2022 Midterm Elections, Peter, because like President Trump himself just said, **_“in my time, I have seen Democrats pull some nasty tricks, but this is the worst of it. It's unacceptable, that's why we need to elect Republicans...!”_**

[**Peter, we know it was YOU and grassroots conservative patriots like you**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=d18a194355bb4f84a3174d5d15c73437&_e=bgVXFR4ZSKSZUufYjfDGOeloy2c9u7hyiQochpiXgfph9LI5Ggv-0wXfLM61Lo3ZrCZourJJuhMJPQFfw2GSV1ikEGNs55_p355GydhvwmJxCcdm0BaIldZ9mXLJE6ZvLrJsZysdfQwFBBK41y1O7Otgqe4pZx-1psDVAX3F0s-2-0_XwhbldXK-vCQKrNKSqFuKZtiDkPF79-kchfsqYNn1iWELtT2e2fnenYR1gZXH7G00CAya3VsKR5jcZnhqqaNGGPHNWt2u-QYhKOtpUdj_hWwf2RVI0pMqsLY_jLa3qcnLhG5sDEkC6ttS0tR2WXRwoNgPuiNV5wtXRWzWxf6H-GB4GTXdUnrgOL_BPlukAlXTcvgptdneHmm2SXPt79CkOBUiMJlRat8wEUWW3z5d9dNoDWSMN6CWEoq747rGbnLvXAWdftI9PcDBj4Jn) that made the difference for our historic effort to put Donald Trump over the top and in the White House to begin with.

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Arizonans have constitutional rights. Mexican Drug Cartels do not.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Read my latest editorial

Joe Biden’s recent statement that “no amendment is absolute” in reference to
the Second Amendment should trouble all Americans, but we shouldn’t be
surprised. After all, this Administration has repeatedly violated our First,
Second, and Fourth Amendment rights with their mandates, regulations, and
attacks on any American who dares exercise their constitutional rights.

Unlike Biden and the Democrats, “shall not be infringed” is clear to me. What
is also clear to me is this administration’s determination to continue
violating our rights while encouraging record numbers of drug smugglers, human
traffickers, and illegal immigrants to pour across our border, putting Arizona
families like mine at risk every day, even as he tries to take away the guns we
depend on to protect ourselves. I’m running for Attorney General because
Arizona has a duty to protect its citizens, including my family, from that
threat.

The federal government’s continued assault on our freedoms and simultaneous
neglect of our border cannot go unchallenged. Arizonans deserve a government
that protects their constitutional rights and is committed to securing our
southern border.

Now, the folks in DC may not know this, but we also have a Tenth Amendment
that reserves powers to the States and the people. It’s time we started using
those powers to protect Arizonans’ constitutional rights and restore our
state’s sovereignty.

How do we do that?

Number one, we recognize we will never comply our way back to liberty. If
Arizona wants its power back, we’re going to have to take it. That means when
the federal government violates the First, Second, or Fourth Amendment rights
of Arizonans, our Attorney General must step in and say, “we will not comply.”

As Attorney General, I’m going to draw a line in the sand. When the federal
government tries to undermine our election laws, we will not comply. When they
try to take our guns, we will not comply. When they try to tell us how to spend
our tax dollars, we will not comply.

If Joe Biden’s hands aren’t tired from signing all those executive orders,
I’ll make sure his feet are tired from standing in court.

Number two, we reject the false narrative that the federal government alone
has jurisdiction over our border and Arizona lacks the constitutional authority
to secure it. The truth is the federal government has completely abdicated its
responsibilities at the border and, as a result, Arizona is facing an invasion
we are empowered to repel under Article I, Section 10, Clause 3 of the U.S.
Constitution.

Not only do we have the legal authority to secure our border, we also have a
moral and ethical duty to our citizens to do it. As Attorney General, I will
not sit idly by while a multibillion-dollar criminal enterprise floods our
state with drugs, violence, and illegal immigrants. The cartels are behind this
invasion, and we must eradicate them from our state. I’ll start by treating
them like the terrorists they are and push our state legislature to designate
them as such.

Arizonans have constitutional rights, and they must be protected. The Mexican
drug cartels do not, and they must be destroyed. Since the crowd in DC doesn't
seem to get that, it’s more important than ever that our next Attorney General
does.

- Tiffany Shedd is a Republican candidate for Arizona Attorney General

Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.
Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.

| Friends, Early voting has begun this week in Texas and I need your help!

All Americans know that voting remains the bedrock of our Democracy and in the troubling times of the pandemic, we know that many Americans will want the choice to vote early in 2022. My opponent and his Republican allies in Congress have consistently threatened and undermined the Early Voting process over the last 2 years.

[_**Don't let them get away with it!**_](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=7ef43a9e8f&e=4712f71bea)

I'm committed to ensuring that all Texans can access the voting method that is safest for them and I want to show Ronny Jackson that I'm not alone.

**_[Can you chip in $5 TODAY to stand up for Voting Rights? ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=a50d50964e&e=4712f71bea)_**

We can make a better, fairer Texas and America for all of us if we stand together.

All my thanks,

Kathleen Brown
Democrat for TX-13

body:
The Washington Post just reported what we all knew to be true: Ryan Zinke is a corrupt politician who is only out for himself. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953woiJTPNyd4kdozAt3MOqOkTfiaugejoCu0_4Ot2zZGayonHFVJrypXCBRbpafS1JiCEFdGbcLcInEeapDIRehF5sJgTuQkB8O-DsUYm6k9zIsaIYdojBFbhCFBr0cMsth-a_fA8ESGjDckY9dgKYUsJ50EGfsE600vSuWIg2Pk_orWny-DQ0JDQj8VHC99-M-LIE82f4mtUSQm6sg9SiG3asZhxCgb879YnPpzZ79oF8tmADa1jRGhKFTCOiX0NJZNWIOcQ9VPUdEvks_WO2VwfVYFpOWhZUHFHmTlHfcYZJu6nI1X5wreXapGpjwe9Z4GZ3wjI42ke0ZHEVxg0yfd/3jm/lhTCxXynRl6GFZbfpawh-w/h0/ve7TKDiSUlvbIQPmVP9_kmret7GU3rr4Nr1Tj3ZrXqk) **BREAKING:**
**“Ryan Zinke broke ethics rules while leading Trump’s Interior Dept.”**
– _The Washington Post_ , 2/16/22

[**Rush a donation to our Rapid Response Fund to stop corrupt Ryan Zinke from making it back to Washington →**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953woiJTPNyd4kdozAt3MOqOkTfiaugejoCu0_4Ot2zZGayonHFVJrypXCBRbpafS1JiCEFdGbcLcInEeapDIRehFUWxt2NK3ikn4qpGEbPcdYvNSRm0kW2WgT7ufoZXtlOsyh28xG0DzUTyQ987FW4zGPHU1UiaPaw1_YRuzuFrRm72AWZVCA38FsTkZvtFogwmvwyROw8r8nwjop6tFg-2mY1Oeyy9Xeebs_4EXnVNCPTCC3CJ58ggb8tf7oYyAlM6GyZTzFNSv9-u81YIT9KbIYAPTillFRN1ph87W_DsDwyh5zF3u9hWPifk19Uj1dZkenC4XjTLDo5Fgwg2DirU6/3jm/lhTCxXynRl6GFZbfpawh-w/h1/bj1HA_4L-aVgWo6Nx7GLLLiOgNYVsYB5bqnfzUHXU1E)

* * *
**_The Washington Post_ just reported what we all knew to be true, Friend: Ryan Zinke committed dozens of ethics violations while serving in the Trump Administration.**

According to this report, Zinke lied to federal officials about using official government resources to negotiate a real estate development deal in Montana that would enrich him and his family personally.

**This is exactly the behavior that’s helped put a stable life out of reach for too many Montanans — politicians abusing the public trust to make money for wealthy out of state developers using Montana’s land!**

The levels of corruption are off the charts. Zinke went to Washington and got himself rich while people back home can barely afford a place to live, and he knows he can get even richer if he makes it back to Washington to rack up more violations.**That’s exactly why he’s running for Congress again.**

_**[We need to make sure Montana voters know just how deep Zinke’s corruption runs. So we’re launching our Rapid Response Fund with a goal of raising $5,000 TODAY from grassroots supporters like you who are ready to stop Ryan Zinke in his tracks. Can you chip in?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953woiJTPNyd4kdozAt3MOqOkTfiaugejoCu0_4Ot2zZGayonHFVJrypXCBRbpafS1JiCEFdGbcLcInEeapDIRehFYEn3XoF7o3-lkbRaS_fMSC8OPrCzhJYwW1Ru6Rs82Wax_QjGLuJh8QtXohVTrmjHvvs9O_tWxH3QbPX75jap59StxUUbUhXXd0MX2_cDnpxM7v84MWLZatirom2g4_gVycGYASmGjkfG421XJmUV5s5wmrn1S2l5l_uqrgi6Wv_dvBbgu-jKp3JIUON611hrpTHdBtvrHT-YS_JNxMdrmeN5oIGuRf45CRvcq28wmNF3U4UbNAt1MIP88R04ivmq/3jm/lhTCxXynRl6GFZbfpawh-w/h2/LHbzG81IBks-RCE7sVEGK21lQo3ZBrkEoFwpKHFWPfE)
**_
Public pressure from folks like everyone who signed our petition to ban Congressional stock trading have already brought reform to the point it could actually pass. Corruption like this is the kind of issue that can win general elections — if we have the resources to make sure voters know about it.

Thank you for standing against Zinke’s corruption today, Team Winter

P.S. Ryan Zinke increased his fortune to over $30 million while he was in Washington, but Tom Winter doesn't have a fancy house in California or fly private planes to woo multimillionaire donors. He’s counting on people like you. **[Can you step up with a contribution today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953woiJTPNyd4kdozAt3MOqOkTfiaugejoCu0_4Ot2zZGayonHFVJrypXCBRbpafS1JiCEFdGbcLcInEeapDIRehFzOgliwPMHWwtsmQHSi2wlJK2ajqWCH1oan54LhqBVzRuBBMycUNUuGre52LpGI2HvFDeHg71UrK7GIk82MzrisWflYiOk8cz-B0ReldCE9ODfblPmbyKEB1f2q5HQieDyjG0RLyz_IyOyH0ejB2FW_Nl8fxny5DptXEjGWxDzlGu8GXZt4-WjP-kaccxd7jCsph6oB0IBW1GMNPfuIfDHJJzEz6lDQN6q5VnmUqGOpxkRq7nDmiq-ibrioxN20Hs/3jm/lhTCxXynRl6GFZbfpawh-w/h3/nMutVI_MgQI6LSr6Bjbbc1HtMR2L0w2YwSR-OvrSfL4)**
