name: Jayapal HQ
subject: In order to keep this work going strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
When you donate to our movement, you're showing up for our urgent fights.
#
Peter,
We’re trying to make sure that we hit our fundraising goals this month so Pramila can keep up the strongest fight possible to deliver for the people.
Pramila is focused on the critical legislative fights that remain this year and the critical election work of 2022. That means she’s continuing the work to protect voting rights, democracy, and abortion rights while she also hits the campaign trail to elect more progressives. It means she will continue her fight for Build Back Better, action on climate change, and the cancellation of student debt while she helps Democrats maintain their majority in the U.S. House.
[**In order to keep this work going, she needs your grassroots support. So, Peter, can you chip in $3 towards our $7,500 mid-month goal before midnight?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10828?refcode=em20220216-1037&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1037%2E420207%2E9QuClp)
**[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10828?refcode=em20220216-1037&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1037%2E420207%2E9QuClp)**
When you donate to our movement, you’re helping fund:
* Our work during an election year to protect and expand our Democratic majorities in Congress. We can’t let the GOP take back power.
* Pramila’s tireless advocacy to combat the influence of corporations and big money special interests.
* Pramila’s work in Congress to deliver for working people, families, and our communities. We can make bold, transformative change happen and pass our progressive priorities.

When you donate to our movement, you're showing up for our urgent fights. Together we have achieved so much since I was first elected to Congress in 2016, and together we'll continue the fight for transformative change so we can deliver for the millions of people that put President Biden in the White House and Democrats in control of the House and Senate.
[**Please, make one of the grassroots donations we need before midnight. 2022 is going to be a big year and we need to start strong.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10828?refcode=em20220216-1037&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1037%2E420207%2E9QuClp)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220216-1037-footer&t=22&refcode2=1037_420207_9QuClp&akid=1037%2E420207%2E9QuClp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1037%2E420207%2E9QuClp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1037%2E420207%2E9QuClp)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Friend,
For years, a dark cloud of alleged ethics violations hung over Zinke’s tenure at the Department of the Interior (DOI).

**Today, federal watch dogs confirmed that Ryan Zinke did in fact break federal ethics rules "repeatedly."** While at the DOI, Zinke abused his position to advance a development project on property owned by his family's foundation.

**What's worse is that he blatantly LIED about his involvement.**

In his ethics pledge, Zinke promised not to "participate personally and substantially" in any matter involving the foundation. Instead, he directly participated in negotiations with the chairman of Halliburton and other developers.

There's a reason why Zinke resigned from the Department of Interior in disgrace. He’s proven he’s willing to lie to continue his corrupt behavior. Now, he wants to represent MT-01 in Congress? Not on our watch:

[**Cora is committed to transparency and good governance for Montana. That's why she isn't taking money from corporate PACs. clean_body: Zinke's proven he’s willing to lie to continue his corrupt behavior. Now, he wants to represent MT-01 in Congress? Not on our watch. | = | | = BREAKING: Federal Watchdogs confirm Ryan Zinke LIED about his shady involvement on a development deal while leading Trump’s Interior Department. Now, he’s running for Congress in Montana’s 1st District. = | = Friend, For years, a dark cloud of alleged ethics violations hung over Zinke’s tenure at the Department of the Interior (DOI). Today, federal watch dogs confirmed that Ryan Zinke did in fact break federal ethics rules "repeatedly." While at the DOI, Zinke abused his position to advance a development project on property owned by his family's foundation. What's worse is that he blatantly LIED about his involvement. In his ethics pledge, Zinke promised not to "participate personally and substantially" in any matter involving the foundation. Instead, he directly participated in negotiations with the chairman of Halliburton and other developers. There's a reason why Zinke resigned from the Department of Interior in disgrace. He’s proven he’s willing to lie to continue his corrupt behavior. Now, he wants to represent MT-01 in Congress? We should be very scared of our future in America if Trudeau is demanding bank accounts be shut down for political purposes while Biden is silent. Biden MUST be held accountable for his silence. | | | | | | | | Paid for by Harbin for Georgia

This could be a dangerous tipping point for our nation, friend. Donald Trump packed the Supreme Court with far-right justices who now **appear poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , threatening reproductive rights nationwide. **And now several GOP-led states are passing measures to restrict access to abortion, including right here in Florida. What's worse: Republicans even rejected an exception for rape, incest and human trafficking.
But there's hope: Congress can pass pro-choice legislation that finally enshrines reproductive rights. **I will always****fight for reproductive rights, which is why I****voted in the House to make _Roe v. name: Peter Welch
subject: What an old jacket means to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Recently, I was taking a look at an old photograph — and I noticed something.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=106%2E61531%2EYgOn0p)
Hello,
Recently, I was taking a look at an old photograph — and I noticed something.
The picture was from a hike I’d taken decades ago at Mount Rainier. It was a fun, but grueling, hike with friends and family.
And in the picture, I was wearing the same blue windbreaker that I had on while I was looking at the photo.
I’ve gotten some great wear and tear out of it through the years — from long hikes to everyday walks and everything in between — I always know I’m headed on an adventure when I pull it out of my closet. But even as I’ve hiked here in Vermont and across New England over the years, it’s hard not to notice how our environment is changing, and how the weather is getting more extreme.
The great outdoors we have access to here are extraordinary — from cross country skiing in the winter and swimming in Lake Champlain in the summer, to the incredible foliage in the fall and breathtaking views from mountaintops — and I want our future generations to have equal opportunities to explore and take advantage of all we have to offer.
A healthy environment doesn’t just provide the air we breathe and the water we drink, it supports entire industries in our state, creates recreational opportunities for families, and makes us all feel better to be outside.
It’s why I’ve made protecting the environment a top priority throughout my career in public service, it’s why I’m working so hard in the House to pass a Green New Deal, and it’s why I’m running for Senate to represent Vermont: we need to get this done, and we need to do it now.
[**If you can, please chip into my campaign right away. It’s going to take all of us, working together, to protect our environment and combat climate change for Vermont and for our future.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1414?t=3&akid=106%2E61531%2EYgOn0p)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

Peter

I’ve gotten some great wear and tear out of it through the years — from long hikes to everyday walks and everything in between — I always know I’m headed on an adventure when I pull it out of my closet. But even as I’ve hiked here in Vermont and across New England over the years, it’s hard not to notice how our environment is changing, and how the weather is getting more extreme. The great outdoors we have access to here are extraordinary — from cross country skiing in the winter and swimming in Lake Champlain in the summer, to the incredible foliage in the fall and breathtaking views from mountaintops — and I want our future generations to have equal opportunities to explore and take advantage of all we have to offer. A healthy environment doesn’t just provide the air we breathe and the water we drink, it supports entire industries in our state, creates recreational opportunities for families, and makes us all feel better to be outside. It’s why I’ve made protecting the environment a top priority throughout my career in public service, it’s why I’m working so hard in the House to pass a Green New Deal, and it’s why I’m running for Senate to represent Vermont: we need to get this done, and we need to do it now. disclaimer_text: Paid For By Charlie For Governor**
body:
| | | [ ](https://charlieforgovernor.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f407e0a8a35bc04db6508d81&id=40d537852f&e=df21354de5)
---
| **GOV. BOB EHRLICH ENDORSES CHARLIE**
Governor Bob Ehlrich endorsed Charlie Gerow for Governor yesterday at a campaign event in New Freedom, York County.

“Charlie is a common-sense conservative in a state that needs it, said Ehlrich. “Charlie is in the race for governor for all the right reasons, he’s ethical and he cares about the people of this state. As governor, Charlie will unleash the economic power this great state. I’m honored to support my long-time friend Charlie Gerow for Governor.”

Ehlrich was Governor of Maryland from 2003-2007.

clean_body: Keep up the momentum! | Friends, This is huge news for our campaign: 2016 Trump Campaign Manager Kellyanne Conway just endorsed my run for the U.S. Senate seat in Ohio. She knows firsthand that I know how to win in Ohio, and that I’ve delivered TWO BIG WINS for PRESIDENT TRUMP. Our campaign is committed to Putting America First Again and all the momentum is in our favor with less than 100 days left until our crucial primary. | | This is where we take the lead. This is where we save Ohio and America. I’ve already delivered conservative victories for Ohio and I’m ready to do it again. So, if you’re able, please rush what you can below to support our America First campaign and help keep Ohio red! | | | God Bless, Jane Timken Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio Jane Timken for Ohio 9856 Archer Ln, Dublin, OH 43017 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

| | Peter,

| **I need your help staying on the ballot!**

With our movement getting closer to replacing the failed radical MLG agenda with true Conservatism, we need as much support as possible to overcome any challenge that comes our way.

_Right now my campaign is incurring costs with attorney fees as we make our case to stay on the ballot!_

This pro-American movement is ready to secure our borders, end needless mandates, and bring back small businesses for New Mexico, and that is why **appearing on the ballot is a crucial step that we cannot afford to lose!**

body:

**Our mid-month deadline is TONIGHT, and we need to raise $2493 if we’re going to meet our goal.**

If we don’t meet this goal, we’re letting the **Communist China censors WIN.**

The mainstream media has already given into them and censored our ad.

**_I don’t want to think you’re afraid of communists too, Friend._**

Democrats and “woke” corporations won’t take any action - it’s up to patriots like you and I to STOP them once and for all.

Pitch in BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can meet our MID-MONTH goal and DEFEAT Communist China and their cronies in the Democrat party. **Pitch in here:[https://secure.winred.com/michaelwaltz/mid-feb-goal-deadline](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e1c0405ea719470983e59ad3bc04b333&_e=b8YVayUCzZPLcEVv_IkhMLml8IRVTMl7po6PUEEdpZNbjNK0GH2W3BCy1yId2nn72dchU_l6Ti6mW5_g-lNMbtyKHo6Pm3UALnAzbeI5rn488JmL0D0dK6tWKVU5RgwZ1Hg__5NQoNFuWEYfOe0pAi-sob3r5QD5C3KbrdD9SqGGU9QdCMdtoqfyL5kU6dAntzmmWTfuKTfZC8rhbbYxMQaADarDwPRH8FBzq6emfpQMcanzpcnguWmct-RB5gq6xTCbWVnJd_sIn7I1V1xU7TUMErlxSrDfYmZcYd5BvXZ_83GPNMoLUezXJJZHeChjXPzLYg5P52nxeiXPjRlurD2zVfjzw2MlhRfDRrsHEi7WyBGzWRpAX0_Gq7PkgwcQAnt_DSuaNtD32ZT6_wKN3g%3D%3D)** Thank you, Mike Waltz \-------Forwarded Message-------

clean_body: Peter, I know I reached out yesterday, but this is urgent. Our mid-month deadline is TONIGHT, and we need to raise $2493 if we’re going to meet our goal. If we don’t meet this goal, we’re letting the Communist China censors WIN. The mainstream media has already given into them and censored our ad. I don’t want to think you’re afraid of communists too, Friend. Democrats and “woke” corporations won’t take any action - it’s up to patriots like you and I to STOP them once and for all. Pitch in BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can meet our MID-MONTH goal and DEFEAT Communist China and their cronies in the Democrat party. Pitch in here: Thank you, Mike Waltz \-------Forwarded Message------- From: Col. Mike Waltz Date: February 14, 2022 Subject: YOU’VE BEEN SELECTED Peter, Our mid-month deadline is TOMORROW NIGHT at 11:59 PM. After NBC censored our ad and caved to Communist China we help with fundraising to push back. That’s why I’ve selected 150 top patriots to join my team and lead the fight against the evil Chinese Communist Party - and you are at the top of my list. JOIN THE FIGHT I served in some of the most war-torn places on earth in combat as a Green Beret. I saw governments try to control their people and censor their voices with the most horrific means possible. But I never thought I’d see that kind of censorship right here in America. The only way to stop the censorship is to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE with a Republican majority that will FIGHT Communist China and their partners in the liberal media. The clock is ticking for us to WIN this fight, and our mission depends on you. so we can meet our mid-month deadline and STOP communist censorship once and for all. In Service, Col. Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (FL-6) Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. On Saturday, Senator Lindstrom attended the Annual Heart City Bull Bash in Valentine, Nebraska -- a great community tradition that we had so much fun attending! Thanks to the Nebraska Cattlemen for hosting us at their Gubernatorial Forum and the members of the Valentine community for attending, asking questions, and allowing Sen. Lindstrom the opportunity to discuss the issues that matter most to rural Nebraska.

Team Lindstrom took an awesome tour at Handlebend in O’Neill, Nebraska last week. This small business owned by Matt Dennis and Michael Stepp is a staple in the area — and a perfect example of what happens when Nebraskans step up to lead in their community. Thanks for having us and we look forward to coming back soon!

clean_body: | | | | Here's what we've been up to.. Friends, It has been such a busy week for Team Lindstrom! From , to traveling across the state to meet with the great people of Nebraska -- our momentum is rapidly growing. Take a look at some of our campaign highlights from the past week: | | | | | On Saturday, Senator Lindstrom attended the Annual Heart City Bull Bash in Valentine, Nebraska -- a great community tradition that we had so much fun attending! Thanks to the Nebraska Cattlemen for hosting us at their Gubernatorial Forum and the members of the Valentine community for attending, asking questions, and allowing Sen. Lindstrom the opportunity to discuss the issues that matter most to rural Nebraska. | | | | | Team Lindstrom took an awesome tour at Handlebend in O’Neill, Nebraska last week. This small business owned by Matt Dennis and Michael Stepp is a staple in the area — and a perfect example of what happens when Nebraskans step up to lead in their community. Thanks for having us and we look forward to coming back soon! We will continue to travel the state this week listening to voters. If you are in the following areas, Brett would love to meet you: Saturday, February 19th Kimball Meet and Greet WHERE: Sagebrush Event Hall & Restaurant - Meadowlark Room 615 E 3rd Street | Kimball NE, 69145 WHEN: 8:00AM-9:00AM HOW: Click to RSVP! Sidney Meet and Greet WHERE: Sidney Elks Lodge 1040 Jackson Street | Sidney, NE 69162 WHEN: 10:00AM-11:00AM HOW: Click to RSVP! Ogallala Meet and Greet WHERE: Front Street Steakhouse & Saloon 519 East 1st Street | Ogallala, NE 69153 WHEN: 12:30PM-1:30PM HOW: Click to RSVP! Imperial Meet and Greet WHERE: Sweden Creme 1134 Broadway Street | Imperial, NE 69033 WHEN: 2:30PM-3:30PM HOW: Click to RSVP! Benkelman Meet and Greet WHERE: Western Keg Bar & Grill 105 E. 6th Avenue | Benkelman, NE 69021 WHEN: 4:30PM-5:30PM HOW: Click to RSVP! Sunday, February 20th Alma Meet and Greet WHERE: KJ's Cafe US-183 | Alma, NE 68920 WHEN: 12:00PM-1:00PM HOW: Click to RSVP! Central City Meet and Greet WHERE: The Venture Center 1532 17th Avenue | Central City, NE 68826 WHEN: 3:30PM-4:30PM HOW: Click to RSVP! If you are interested in hosting a meet and greet for Senator Lindstrom, please mailto:mackenzie@votelindstrom.com?subject=I want to host a meet and greet!&body= and I will be in touch soon. www.votelindstrom.com A strong grassroots operation takes each one of you to help us keep going strong right up until Election Day and beyond. We need your help! Below are several different ways you can help grow our conservative movement today: | | www.votelindstrom.com We are happy to report that our Lindstrom for Governor 4x8 signs are HERE with a campaign team ready to deliver! If you would like a 4x8 sign or know of someone who would like a 4x8 sign -- please mailto:tmidkiff@votelindstrom.com?subject=4x8 Signs&body= to our Political Director, Tori Midkiff, and she will be in touch shortly. We are thankful for your support and truly can't do this without you. Have a great rest of the week and we hope to see you soon on the trail! Blessings, Mackenzie Haddix Communications Director Friends of Lindstrom Committee | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2433 S. 130th Circle, Omaha, NE, 68144

# [Judicial Watch: Records Reveal Tech Operatives Allegedly Used by Hillary Clinton Campaign to Spy on Trump WH Had Contract with Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57913&L=26797&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGVjaC1vcGVyYXRpdmVzLWhpbGxhcnktY2xpbnRvbi1jYW1wYWlnbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
Judicial Watch announced today that it received 127 pages of records from the Georgia Institute of Technology of communications among four individuals. These records reveal that the individuals, who are mentioned in the Durham probe indictment of Michael Sussmann, worked with the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) from 2016-2021. The documents also suggest the group was interested in targeting then-Trump campaign adviser Steve Bannon.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57913&L=26797&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGVjaC1vcGVyYXRpdmVzLWhpbGxhcnktY2xpbnRvbi1jYW1wYWlnbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

### [Sr. DOD Advisor: Military Needs Minorities to Retain Competitive Edge, Achieve Critical Missions ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57913&L=26798&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWlsaXRhcnktbWlub3JpdGllcy1jb21wZXRpdGl2ZS1lZGdlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) Judicial Watch Pushing a Department of Defense (DOD) initiative to recruit and promote minorities, a senior Pentagon official proclaimed this month that diversity, equity and inclusion will help the U.S. military achieve critical missions and make forces more lethal. “Diversity, equity and inclusion in the military are necessities for the United States,” according to Bishop Garrison, a senior advisor to Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin who worked as a defense and homeland security official under Obama and a foreign policy advisor on Hillary Clinton’s presidential campaign. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57913&L=26798&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWlsaXRhcnktbWlub3JpdGllcy1jb21wZXRpdGl2ZS1lZGdlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
---
### [Judicial Watch Sues HHS for Records of Communication from Top FDA Officials Who Resigned Reportedly over COVID Booster Shots ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57913&L=26764&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY292aWQtYm9vc3Rlci1zaG90cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for records of communication from Dr. Marion Gruber and Dr. Philip Krause, the former director and deputy director of the US. Food and Drug Administration’s (FDA) Office of Vaccines Research and Review, who reportedly resigned during the White House’s push to approve the COVID-19 “booster shot”. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57913&L=26764&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY292aWQtYm9vc3Rlci1zaG90cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---
### [Capitol Police claim Jan. 6 emails and videos are not public records; assert ‘sovereign immunity’ to Judicial Watch suit ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57913&L=26771&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2FwaXRvbC1wb2xpY2UtamFuLTYtZW1haWxzLXZpZGVvcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Blaze Media Judicial Watch has challenged an attempt by the U.S. Capitol Police to block the conservative watchdog group’s lawsuit to obtain videos and emails from the Jan. 6 riot.

The organization is seeking records related to the security of the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, communications between USCP and federal law enforcement, and all video footage from inside the Capitol between 12 p.m. and 9 p.m., when the riot took place. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced today that it received 127 pages of records from the Georgia Institute of Technology of communications among four individuals. | | | Because no one is above the law! | February 16, 2022 ---|---|--- | | == == Judicial Watch announced today that it received 127 pages of records from the Georgia Institute of Technology of communications among four individuals. These records reveal that the individuals, who are mentioned in the Durham probe indictment of Michael Sussmann, worked with the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) from 2016-2021. The documents also suggest the group was interested in targeting then-Trump campaign adviser Steve Bannon. == | | | Judicial Watch Pushing a Department of Defense (DOD) initiative to recruit and promote minorities, a senior Pentagon official proclaimed this month that diversity, equity and inclusion will help the U.S. military achieve critical missions and make forces more lethal. “Diversity, equity and inclusion in the military are necessities for the United States,” according to Bishop Garrison, a senior advisor to Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin who worked as a defense and homeland security official under Obama and a foreign policy advisor on Hillary Clinton’s presidential campaign. == Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for records of communication from Dr. Marion Gruber and Dr. Philip Krause, the former director and deputy director of the US. Food and Drug Administration’s (FDA) Office of Vaccines Research and Review, who reportedly resigned during the White House’s push to approve the COVID-19 “booster shot”. == == Blaze Media Judicial Watch has challenged an attempt by the U.S. Capitol Police to block the conservative watchdog group’s lawsuit to obtain videos and emails from the Jan. 6 riot. The organization is seeking records related to the security of the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, communications between USCP and federal law enforcement, and all video footage from inside the Capitol between 12 p.m. and 9 p.m., when the riot took place. == | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

Peter Willis,

This morning, during my team’s daily campaign call, the question about what to have for lunch today came up.

The main topic of debate quickly turned into who has the best cheesesteak in the Commonwealth!

This is a matter I take very seriously. So, instead of talking between ourselves, **I wanted to know YOUR opinion,****Peter Willis**.

[_**Share your answers with me and I’ll be sure to stop at some of your favorites as I travel across the Commonwealth. >>>**__

body:
Our movement is growing

| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=25aac2975e4a4797905f9142385d9db7&_e=uYky5ybw5cG6gk2zRilnq0cGPecio9L3wmBaONvUqlRwoEqve2TA2CZZ1U-2mdjVCdCB1FuDCGD_ffJkIsfCDsmSYjfWDWg9VwUaPSU7XXlBXW9cjqSJoTqgnIwC3HbHL_d-P_8yyp82yqzBrLMhDVq--89PEOGx64Md9MsOuBaLtDsjWOdCwvgS_EBPmCvLpgaj2QsnNS1HRxhfiilcuuw8VwZFa7i9qvfa7Hy0dCDDVnZu-CxfU7leTg4KZJzZ_pYUVd2lmRRv_ECQbo4DbcZma9hMEuqxrARv_wersTZ5I3BDhJYmUwjy11SOjkbn9WgaQ09hKioR7UHbUJqf78VMGnM5R29yD0bNDggrnkSsaFSZ_Tv77gaxkioD_8KHPS41j42Ne8NBY0jtzofWLFZiRj8A2lI9jq0EsC1U5DraH2TR7J_fqdej9PpLtIpV49m_zvHapnSZ5wwXgmN6YB-qV_YyrVUarAMciQhIgLlXmG_S88vZnTTaxZVm4nEqtIXjo4K-T_6Xd8mYPgQ_9A%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

__**It’s only February, and Radical Leftist Abigail Spanberger is getting nervous.**_ _

She knows the **#YesToYesli** movement is **quickly growing and gaining momentum** , and she is calling on her liberal cronies in Washington to save her seat in VA-07. | [**TURN VA-07 RED!** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=25aac2975e4a4797905f9142385d9db7&_e=uYky5ybw5cG6gk2zRilnq0cGPecio9L3wmBaONvUqlRwoEqve2TA2CZZ1U-2mdjVCdCB1FuDCGD_ffJkIsfCDsmSYjfWDWg9VwUaPSU7XXlBXW9cjqSJoTqgnIwC3HbHL_d-P_8yyp82yqzBrLMhDVq--89PEOGx64Md9MsOuBaLtDsjWOdCwvgS_EBPmCvLpgaj2QsnNS1HRxhfiilcuuw8VwZFa7i9qvfa7Hy0dCDDVnZu-CxfU7leTg4KZJzZ_pYUVd2lmRRv_ECQbo4DbcZma9hMEuqxrARv_wersTZ5I3BDhJYmUwjy11SOjkbnIA_259QUHnii7c-6YXjyHShHo1dWnA6QX7_AVaXxENFUo11wH3IvJfpt3h3sasnEm5yHgS9MWTGqeITm-bG-kad4dTDHJclqGoAdblhlLH-oVpMGaRPfNbzekzP_vLfmsM80RqDcllk-WPoY_x7Ria9yacuVfomDZ6MPbeguDVzt6-c_BioRZQP-A1CYw5Pc1bwbGn-SPIPLxZkdRS-_pA%3D%3D)
---

Spanberger has shown all of us what her priorities are. **Our borders are open, the FBI is targeting parents for speaking up at school board meetings, they botched the withdrawal from Afghanistan, and gas prices are crippling working-class families.** She claims she will go against her party's radical ways, but consistently falls in line on policies they support. [**FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT!** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=25aac2975e4a4797905f9142385d9db7&_e=uYky5ybw5cG6gk2zRilnq0cGPecio9L3wmBaONvUqlRwoEqve2TA2CZZ1U-2mdjVCdCB1FuDCGD_ffJkIsfCDsmSYjfWDWg9VwUaPSU7XXlBXW9cjqSJoTqgnIwC3HbHL_d-P_8yyp82yqzBrLMhDVq--89PEOGx64Md9MsOuBaLtDsjWOdCwvgS_EBPmCvLpgaj2QsnNS1HRxhfiilcuuw8VwZFa7i9qvfa7Hy0dCDDVnZu-CxfU7leTg4KZJzZ_pYUVd2lmRRv_ECQbo4DbcZma9hMEuqxrARv_wersTZ5I3BDhJYmUwjy11SOjkbn-YKp9bRs1CisNtF-KweUYbuR3JAsKGgHFxu3Si24Uj1YQ2OQePoH2KxlzqbNYN2-4r511t8yEilPwvP6fNtNw4UyBfxdYC-fAg_Qe4tPqQHVtw9-IZb7OoyRRyfvSX8VMw_wjIKsB0hxY5aE3D2sC17gUbV19T0fh3jAmsUkqyQfMQS59c-4pyc8pZ_PYrhD11BkqNyFvmnQy5o9otLzBw%3D%3D)
---

**Spanberger believes in raising taxes on hard working Virginian families, raising the prices of everyday goods, and implementing Socialist spending plans that will endanger small businesses across our Commonwealth.**

name: Travis Brimm, CheriBeasley.com
subject: humbly asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
With such a big target on our campaign...
#

Hey y'all -
We’re about halfway through our first full fundraising quarter since Cheri became Democrats’ presumptive nominee in North Carolina, and I’d like to ask for a moment of your time to explain why a $3 donation to our campaign today is so important.
At the end of this quarter, we have an official FEC deadline — meaning we are required to report our numbers publicly afterward.
The truth is everyone — our opponents, political pundits, Republican super PACs — will be looking at these numbers to size up our campaign.
They want to gauge whether or not Cheri has the resources and grassroots support to flip this seat for Democrats, and they’ll use any signs of vulnerability against us. So we cannot afford to let that happen.
With such a big target on our campaign, we need to keep building on our momentum. But we still have a ways to go to hit our goal, so that’s why we’re humbly asking for your support:
[**Will you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign to elect Cheri Beasley and flip North Carolina’s open Senate seat? We need a lot more people to pitch in to reach out goal before this quarter’s FEC deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220216-1-t1&refcode2=422.357359.7V_Ydl&noskip=true&t=1&akid=422%2E357359%2E7V_Ydl)

Travis Brimm

name: Greg Lopez for Governor HQ
subject: The Fight for the Soul of Colorado Begins!
body:
Jared Polis Enters the Governor's Race
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
County Party Officer,
This is C. J. Garbo, Greg's campaign manager. I am writing as Jared Polis announced yesterday he is running for governor, and I am glad to be working for the only candidate who can defeat him in November.
I am exhausted from the fear-mongering, the tyranny, and being told what is best for me and my family by those who are incompetent, cannot manage a budget, and decide they can choose best which business is essential and non-essential for me and my community.
IT STOPS NOW.
[County Party Officer, please consider supporting our campaign with a few dollars so we can ramp up our offensive against a Governor who fancies himself accountable to no one](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GtO9Ea769J78u5dXb2JSUym3mQ3mP2yHB7WlLWTnXZtn7j-kJUNZ1Z0yiJrGgfxppNymLR8KdpzmoEseCsHBRFWNx2F62uWOZlK7Coc1mGWTEB4Nooz-3XntI4S7heDJm90bcP1mYLN-US5fEQL7ug==&c=CrIh4Y94BmqzmF2nfmpcF4XF5XaoHP8XJzgiM1g1jB7yxYFpYzODpA==&ch=PaXwllcNeQ0xgk0tW3ocPyyhgmxTFcXRvoSJOxxXPFdTvZhzLbR5AA==)[.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GtO9Ea769J78u5dXb2JSUym3mQ3mP2yHB7WlLWTnXZtn7j-kJUNZ1Z0yiJrGgfxppNymLR8KdpzmoEseCsHBRFWNx2F62uWOZlK7Coc1mGWTEB4Nooz-3XntI4S7heDJm90bcP1mYLN-US5fEQL7ug==&c=CrIh4Y94BmqzmF2nfmpcF4XF5XaoHP8XJzgiM1g1jB7yxYFpYzODpA==&ch=PaXwllcNeQ0xgk0tW3ocPyyhgmxTFcXRvoSJOxxXPFdTvZhzLbR5AA==)
Nobody will outspend Jared Polis. However, with your help, we can continue to finance Greg's effort to out-smart and take votes away from him to victory!
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GtO9Ea769J78u5dXb2JSUym3mQ3mP2yHB7WlLWTnXZtn7j-kJUNZ1TR0bTvkS6XjhwUBYPNls19w2f5GXfUQnSxwWpEn1PHNVz1XiPBTh6ukjgYaLxW5G6Ua1aCLZrauGVvjgg69Ti2pR8jPx62eIEPKW-9TqVjLel6PL0j2K05nP85fJHE7XVeUSrW6sUZCQCzRiLvb_6cZOgNltecfWg==&c=CrIh4Y94BmqzmF2nfmpcF4XF5XaoHP8XJzgiM1g1jB7yxYFpYzODpA==&ch=PaXwllcNeQ0xgk0tW3ocPyyhgmxTFcXRvoSJOxxXPFdTvZhzLbR5AA==)
---
#LopezListens, and he is the only candidate who can capture the Hispanic vote, as well as Unaffiliated and Democrat voters who feel betrayed by Jared Polis.
With your support, Greg will take his campaign into the heart of communities where no other Republican campaigns: Denver, Arapahoe, and Adams counties.
Greg is putting people over politics and will be one of us for all of us.
Thank You So Much, C. J. Garbo Campaign Manager, Greg Lopez for Governor P.O. BOX 1413 Parker, CO 80134 [www.Lopez2022.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GtO9Ea769J78u5dXb2JSUym3mQ3mP2yHB7WlLWTnXZtn7j-kJUNZ1Q4B8xEs7ApIVX20-mmmkhbCLZBIJVM5HnPZso-BtGq1ocsO8dX10lo29cHJ-cg8t8ugetRaQPjMVIjlouVSBPpBCE20t09TMw==&c=CrIh4Y94BmqzmF2nfmpcF4XF5XaoHP8XJzgiM1g1jB7yxYFpYzODpA==&ch=PaXwllcNeQ0xgk0tW3ocPyyhgmxTFcXRvoSJOxxXPFdTvZhzLbR5AA==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: You're Invited! Come Celebrate!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
A GREAT Time Of Food, Friends & Fun! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-February 11 Vol. 2, #4**
---
| | |
##
11 February 22
**It's Time To Celebrate! **

**You're invited to the Jeff Warner For Congress
Campaign Kick-Off Celebration!**

Saturday, February 26
5-7p
Severna Park Elks Lodge
160 Truck House Road, Severna Park, 21146
This is a time primarily intended to inspire, motivate and encourage you as you meet others who share our mutual concern for the direction of the District and of the nation. We'll share a pasta meal together, hear briefly from Jeff, and have a great time socializing.

We have intentionally kept the cost low solely to cover our costs. **We don't want finances to stop anyone from attending.** We want to fill the hall, so please tell your friends, family, and other like-minded people about this!

**Minimum suggested donations to cover our costs are listed below.** Please make whatever donation you can in order to attend. We want a great fun-filled evening that will be refreshing and we can’t do that without you there!
* Single Adult - $15
* Couple - $30
* Family - $40 (A family is a parent/guardian with legal child(ren))
* Additional Campaign donations are appreciated
* The campaign will make a solicitation for funds at the event, but please don't feel compelled to give.

[**RSVP HERE**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=ee5fd00e00&e=12a37459a2)
Your participation is important since it will send a strong message regarding the uniqueness of our movement. Please use this event as an opportunity to invite others to attend who share our mutual concern for the District and for the nation.

**Please RSVP by Monday night, February 21.** If you miss this deadline, be sure to reach out to see if openings remain.

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=2b7b8fb094&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")
---
|
---
| | | _© 2021 Jeff Warner For Congress, All rights reserved._
Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

[info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com](mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=2a2a68c4a4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=2a2a68c4a4).
---

name: Team Morgan Harper
subject: Do you have a moment? It’s important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We know you’re probably getting a lot of emails today, but we wouldn’t be reaching out if it weren’t important:
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220216-673-footer-ak&t=2&akid=673%2E90090%2E88vJNz)
We know you’re probably getting a lot of emails today, but we wouldn’t be reaching out if it weren’t important: Unlike some other candidates filling your inbox, this campaign is totally built on grassroots support, and we need that people-power now.

**We set a goal to hit 700 contributions by mid-February, and despite being more than halfway through the month, we’re still behind where we need to be.**[**_Will you chip in today before time runs out?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25570?t=3&akid=673%2E90090%2E88vJNz)

You might be asking what this goal means and why it’s so important. **This mid-month fundraising deadline is especially critical because we are just 76 DAYS OUT from the primary election.**

Strong and **consistent** fundraising can show everyone that we have what it takes to win (and we do!). But if we fall short, we could lose out on critical resources that allow us to do more — like bring on more organizers, canvass voters statewide, run digital ads, tour the state —**making it that much harder for us to keep our momentum going.**

Look, Morgan has traveled all across Ohio since she launched this campaign. We’ve seen how much passion there is for a different type of candidate — and how much hunger there is for change.

**So we know we can win this.** But today we need to show everyone else that we truly do have what it takes. We need just 21 more supporters to step up today and help us hit our mid-month goal.

[**_We can’t afford to keep falling behind — not with the primary so close at hand. If you can, please make a gift to help our campaign catch up before_**** _midnight tonight_****.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25570?t=4&akid=673%2E90090%2E88vJNz)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25576?refcode=em20220216-673&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=673%2E90090%2E88vJNz)**
Together, let’s show everyone what this movement is truly made of.
Thanks!
Team Morgan Harper
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220216-673-footer&t=24&refcode2=673_90090_88vJNz&akid=673%2E90090%2E88vJNz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=673%2E90090%2E88vJNz)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Jordan Moskowitz - Political Director
subject: Conservatives Great Success at Ballot Box!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Help Take Back Our Local Governments!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_recap_1&n=1)
---
Hi Friend -- Yesterday's primary elections saw many Conservatives clear the first hurdle in taking back our local governments! For too long, far-left liberals have been infiltrating our local governments and school boards to advance their ideas of Critical Race Theory and increased government overreach. **Our success at the ballot box yesterday is a sign that voters across Wisconsin have said enough is enough!** We wouldn't be in this position without these brave candidates who put their names on the ballot and our grassroots leaders and activists who are hard at work to get them elected. **Friend, we must do everything we can to help get these candidates across the finish line**. The best thing we can do to help these candidates out is sign up to knock doors and make phone calls. We will get you all trained up on how to use our voter contact tools. To sign up here to volunteer, click **[HERE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eXv_5DaexUSZI9PlfXgIO8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_recap_1&n=2)**. If you aren't able to volunteer, but still want to help out, consider donating to our local candidate election fund, [**HERE**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVOt5rkuzt85PinFH0lLYkYxBQZ2Ur3sRmbMW0UGMP7iGsbgUikGScg08Px1h53g-0&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_recap_1&n=3). All these funds go directly into helping conservatives win at the local level! We would not of had this much success without your support. **We thank you for your support and look forward to winning on April 5th!** Best, Jordan Moskowitz
Political Director
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_recap_1&n=4) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_recap_1&n=5) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_recap_1&n=6) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_recap_1&n=7)

Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin.
Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee.
148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_recap_1&n=8).
WISGOP · 148 E Johnson St · Madison, WI 53703-2120 · USA
clean_body: Help Take Back Our Local Governments! | Hi Friend -- Yesterday's primary elections saw many Conservatives clear the first hurdle in taking back our local governments! For too long, far-left liberals have been infiltrating our local governments and school boards to advance their ideas of Critical Race Theory and increased government overreach. Our success at the ballot box yesterday is a sign that voters across Wisconsin have said enough is enough! We wouldn't be in this position without these brave candidates who put their names on the ballot and our grassroots leaders and activists who are hard at work to get them elected. Friend, we must do everything we can to help get these candidates across the finish line. The best thing we can do to help these candidates out is sign up to knock doors and make phone calls. We will get you all trained up on how to use our voter contact tools. To sign up here to volunteer, click . If you aren't able to volunteer, but still want to help out, consider donating to our local candidate election fund, . All these funds go directly into helping conservatives win at the local level! We would not of had this much success without your support. We thank you for your support and look forward to winning on April 5th! Best, Jordan Moskowitz Political Director Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee. 148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

name: Beto HQ
subject: What a 28-day month means for our fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Reporters are already starting to reach out to ask if we're going to be outraised by Abbott and his corporate mega-donors again.
#
**Here’s the deal:** Usually we have 30-31 days to hit our monthly fundraising goals, but this month _we only have 28 days_. On top of that, we have our next TEC mandatory filing deadline in just three days!
Reporters are already starting to reach out to ask if we're going to be outraised by Abbott and his corporate mega-donors again.
We set a goal to raise $750,000 before midnight on Saturday (the next TEC deadline) and with a short month, we don’t have the time to catch up if we fall short of our goal by the deadline.
[ Will you please make your first contribution of $3 or more to help hit this make-or-break goal and power our campaign to defeat Greg Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53204?refcode=ema20220216-176532&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=176532%2E444211%2Eg2R7gz)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53204?refcode=ema20220216-176532&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=176532%2E444211%2Eg2R7gz)**
All eyes are on this campaign to see if we have what it takes to flip Texas. We can't let something as trivial as a 28-day month keep us from hitting our goals and having the campaign infrastructure we need to take on Greg Abbott.
Our organizers and volunteers are hard at work to reach 3 million voters before March 1st. We’re building the biggest, boldest organizing program that Texas has ever seen to defeat Greg Abbott and elect Beto.
[ Donate now to help build a campaign that can reach every Texan. We can't count out a single vote.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53204?refcode=ema20220216-176532&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=176532%2E444211%2Eg2R7gz)
**[Donate »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53204?refcode=ema20220216-176532&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=176532%2E444211%2Eg2R7gz)**
Thank you. Together, we'll work for every single vote and write no one off. That’s how we win.
— Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220216-176532-footer&t=23&refcode2=176532_444211_g2R7gz&akid=176532%2E444211%2Eg2R7gz)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=24&akid=176532%2E444211%2Eg2R7gz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=176532%2E444211%2Eg2R7gz)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: Help Us Get Our Last Signatures!
body:
Join us to circulate the last petitions needed!

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signaturepush&n=1)
---
Friend -- We are so excited to see the campaign gain momentum as we continue to spread our message across the great state of Michigan! Thousands of signatures have been collected and the end is near but we need your help to finish the job and get Ralph’s name on the ballot. If you are willing to help and push for these final signature please send an email to **adam@ralphrebandtforgovernor.com** ASAP. We have a short Zoom meeting on Friday, February 18th at 8:15 AM and another opportunity on Tuesday for anyone who would be interested in joining and helping complete this.**** **Please reach out to Adam through the email above for more information and the meeting link.** Thank you again for all of your prayers and support to make Michigan a Lighthouse to the Nation! Ralph Rebandt For Governor
[http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signaturepush&n=2)
Ralph Rebandt For Governor · MI 48094, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signaturepush&n=3).
You can also keep up with Ralph Rebandt For Governor on [Twitter](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNOLWyCuYNiwV9ZFyY__b-ZA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signaturepush&n=4) or [Facebook](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uhbeqVmbeXGs-kYC9NuYd-tJTgdOC5xFCeUG_TRnUZF&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signaturepush&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signaturepush&n=6), software for leaders.
